1.1: -2 Aaba Tiopiro: Hiiro uubi-ro rimoi-do iiobodimo raarai, odii tauo piꞌatimo, ioromahoroi-da made himoꞌa uubi-ro idomai-da iaꞌaumoi-da ioroaduꞌutimo emerai-ha pirimaꞌaimo.
1.3: Aaꞌo rauri, Aaba Tiopiro, moo rio-ka ara madei ata ma riꞌati meaha, ka ma rotiodoai rooi-do, mabu ioromahoroi-da iiobodimo raarai mea hiꞌa-ha tauo piriooho.
1.4: Moo-ro iibai rododiai mabu roo umoo hiꞌa ma iiꞌi-ri, roo turiaha iematomudioumo raarai, Iesu-ri ihaha-ka. Ioare ootoi iioaduꞌoi-ka
1.5: Heroda Iudea Pai iemidioi-da, pemidio Aiai poue iemaꞌatidioumo dubui ata, ruu pairai Sakaraia-ka, ruu Abaidia guui meree-ka, Aiai Dubuae omaꞌati paꞌai-da. Ruu ooboi Erisabeta, Aiai poue iemaꞌatidio dubui, Arori guui-da oobo-ka.
1.6: Riiti oroiꞌioi mea oobo-ra dubu-raka Iehoma hohoi-da. Paidubui madei-re, ka Bubui-re ai-pimabedioido.
1.7: Irai riiti meree bia, mabu Erisabeta kaaro-ka, kamia riiti paꞌuri hiꞌa-ka.
1.8: Himio ata, Sakaraia himia paꞌai uubi rautu irudeme motoi-da omaꞌati himioi ioohiai-da, ruu poue omaꞌati ma aꞌai-ri, Iehoma hohoi-da,
1.9: pouei emaꞌati bubui pobodoumo, rii oorio paꞌaimo, aaꞌo omaꞌati ma aꞌai meree ma emeeꞌaumoi-ri poohoumo, ruu apuimoi-ka, ribo mea herei ma iitoi-ri, irudeme motoi rioi Dubuae totoi-da.
1.10: Aaꞌo himio mabui-da, ribo mea herei iitoi-da, turiaha uubi kekai-da ai-pirudemeumo.
1.11: Kaida poobodi ruui-do Paidubui arerui, herei iito totoi iha tui hapuoi-da.
1.12: Sakaraia-ro ruu iemeeꞌai-da urio podaudio, ka ruu toei-ro aiha peidai.
1.13: Irai arerui-ro ruu oduuꞌai-ka, “Toe aꞌaiꞌa, Sakaraia. Iehoma-ro, roo irudemeai tauo oromai maaka, roo ooboi Erisabeta-ro, roo meree emetei aꞌai ohio, ka pairai ita idodo, Ioare.
1.14: Rooi-do geema geꞌii-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, kamia hiiro-hiiro uubi geꞌii aꞌai aꞌai kaumo Ioare oobodi-da.
1.15: Mabu Paidubui, hohoi-da ruu erehe hiꞌa dubu-ro ooꞌai aꞌai. Ruu-ro mire obo idioꞌa. Ka ruu Dubuae Urioi-ro maamui topii haato imamiai aꞌai.
1.16: Hiiro Isaraꞌera uubi imaimai aꞌai rii himia Paidubui, Iehomai-do.
1.17: Ka ruu Paidubui epuui-da odai aꞌai, urioi-re erehei-reida, himogabo dubui Eria aibo. Abeamiꞌoi kaukai ma imeheꞌeai, mereei rautu gaaꞌu-ha ma emidioumo. Ka ruu-ro iroroomidio tiatoi, imaimai aꞌai, mea emidio oroiꞌioi eito. Uubi imaumodii aꞌai, Paidubui ooꞌui eito.”
1.18: Sakaraia-ro arerui atohetai-ka, “Moo-ro ara raai ihahai, raꞌaibou-da umoo iiꞌi raꞌai? Moo dubu paꞌuri-ka, kamia moo ooboi rautu paꞌuri-ka.”
1.19: Arerui-ro ruu oduuꞌai-ka, “Moo Gabiriera-ka. Moo Iehoma hohoi-da rotii, ka moo ruu-ro rotiodoai ara made meai roo ma romoaduꞌoi-ri.
1.20: Irai roo-ro, moo madei eidai bia, ara madei ihahai ruu himia hiꞌa himio mabui-da oobodiiꞌai. Mabu roo-ro madei eidai biai-ri, roo oroaduꞌuti oropoiꞌoi aꞌai. Roo piroha emidioi aꞌai, modau-die aaꞌo madei ihahai moobodii.”
1.21: Aatu himioi uubi pauo piraromoumo, Sakaraia irudeme motoi-da tutuu-ha iomotiimoi-ri.
1.22: Ka ruu iohuuꞌoi-da, made aaꞌoi modobo bia uubi eito. Rii-ro umoo iiꞌi-ka, ruu aape raa tauo eaꞌa maaka, irudeme motoi-da. Ruu-ro rii-do madei aaꞌoi modobo tiatoi-ri, tui-da perememeꞌuio.
1.23: Ruu iirudemea himio mabui ioropoiꞌoi-da, ruu aiha paraimai motoi eito.
1.24: Ipi-ro iopoꞌii-da, ruu ooboi Erisabeta topii emeeꞌai-ka, ka tu-hapuo (5) ome motoi haato pemidio.
1.25: Erisabeta-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Paidubui-ro ara raai tauo ododiai maaka mooi-do. Doꞌou ara himiou, ruu rioi tauo obodii maaka, ka moo uubi-ro ireemehiipodioumoi, ai-remahuꞌeta.” Iesu ootoi iioaduꞌoi-ka
1.26: Erisabeta topii tikiti (6) omei ioohiai-da, Aiai Iehoma-ro arerui Gabiriera potiodoai, goꞌotoi Rasaretai-to Garereia goroi-da.
1.27: Ruu made pomodau, Iosepa iomodabuaimo meree-behei eito. Ruu, rii Pai, Damida guui meree-ka. Meree-behei pairai, Maria-ka.
1.28: Arerui ooꞌui-ka, ida paaꞌo, “Miroi roo rautu-ka! Paidubui, roo rautu-ka. Ruu geema hiꞌa geꞌii-ka rooi-do.”
1.29: Maria iraromoi pauo pimidai arerui iaaꞌo madei-da, ka ruu rio-ka umoo ma iiꞌi madei ihahai.
1.30: Arerui-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Maria, toe aꞌaiꞌa. Aiai Iehoma geꞌii-ka rooi-do.
1.31: Roo topii emeeꞌai aꞌai, ka ohio-meree ootoi aꞌai, ruu pairai ita ahoꞌoo, Iesu.
1.32: Ruu geema-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, ka ruu ahoꞌoi aꞌai kaumo ohu hiꞌai Paidubui Meree. Aiai Iehoma-ro ruu Pai ododiai aꞌai, ruu rariai Damida emerai.
1.33: Ka ruu Iakobo aramiꞌoi Pai emidioi aꞌai, ka ruu Pai erarai oropoiꞌoi aꞌai bia.”
1.34: Maria-ro ruu madei pomoaimai, “Ararau mooi-do raꞌaibou oobodi maꞌai? Mabu moo dubu tama umoo bia.”
1.35: Arerui-ro omoaimai-ka, “Dubuae Urioi-ro roo atimai aꞌai, Aiai Iehoma erarai, rooato, ooꞌai aꞌai, aaꞌo rau-ri, Dubuae mereei ahoꞌoi aꞌai kaumo, Iehoma meree.
1.36: Iraromai, roo riamabiai Erisabeta, pooꞌa ruu paꞌuri, uubi aaꞌoi ruu kaaro-ka, irai doꞌou, ruu topii tikiti (6) omei-ka.
1.37: Ata raa aahuu bia Aiai Iehomai-do.”
1.38: Maria-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Moo Paidubui himoꞌa meree-ka. Roo aaꞌo emerai mooi-do ita oobodi.” Ka arerui-ro, ruu aiha pemeheai. Maria-ro Erisabeta iaamiai-ka
1.39: Tutuu bia, Maria hioi-to eremaumodi-ka, ioroi, roꞌoa-roꞌoa goꞌoto atai-to, Iudea goroi-da.
1.40: Hiei-da ruu odoroi-ka, Sakaraia motoi, Erisabeta geꞌii made emaꞌai-ka.
1.41: Ka Erisabeta-ro, Maria geꞌii madei ioromai-da, ruu topii ioidio mereei geꞌii ai-piamuhiodidio. Ka Erisabeta Dubuae Urioi-ro aiha piimamiai,
1.42: ida geema madei-to paaꞌo, “Roo turiaha upibaiꞌoi-da, Iehoma meai, geegai roo reꞌei-daka, roo topii emidio mereei-re.
1.43: Moo raꞌu meai-ra, Paidubui maamui-ro moo ma raamiai?
1.44: Mabu, roo madei aaꞌoi-da moo topii emidio mereei geꞌii iapuhiodidio.
1.45: Geꞌii-ka, roo boꞌu-ro iraromo pupuo eidai, Paidubui iaaꞌo madei ihahai oobodi aꞌai.” Maria raahoaꞌei-ka
1.46: Ka Maria-ro aaꞌo-ka, “Moo kaukaui-da, Paidubui ai-remarahue;
1.47: Moo urioi rautu geema geꞌii raꞌai, Aiai moo oitorai Dubui-ri,
1.48: mabu ruu-ro, moo ruu himoꞌa meree, oobo behai, iraromai-ri. Doꞌou imodau iiꞌai aꞌai himioi, turiaha uubi-ro moo geꞌii-to ahoꞌoodioi aꞌai kaumo,
1.49: mabu Erara Aiai-ro, mooi-do aꞌai raara paipai-ri. Ruu pairai Dubuae-ka.
1.50: Ruu giiꞌepui odai aꞌai, roo boꞌu-ro memaabe ruui-do, doꞌou abeamiꞌoi eito, mereei eito, aramiꞌoi eito, rariamiꞌoi eito.
1.51: Ruu tui-da paipai aiaꞌaia raara pidodiai, ka boiꞌo-ro oroomomioumo, rii himia iraromoi-da, ruu-ro iburuti-ka.
1.52: Ruu-ro pai erara iemidioumo uubi ai-pimooruodio, ka himoꞌoi pimioo.
1.53: Ruu-ro rioi goroꞌoro uubi meamea raarai-da piomoto, ii raara hiiro-hiiro uubi tutuu-ha pitiodoai.
1.54: Ruu-ro, ruu himoꞌa mereei, Isaraꞌera ai-pomoaabai, ruui-do giiꞌepu iraromoi piraromai,
1.55: Aberahamo himia rariamiꞌoi eito iaraa-ha, rimo abeamiꞌoi eito iaaꞌo aiboi.”
1.56: Maria, Erisabeta rautu, retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) ome aibo pemidio, ida paraimai goꞌotoi eito. Ioare Babatiso iootoi-ka
1.57: Erisabeta mereei araraꞌii-ka, mereei aiha pooto, ohio.
1.58: Ruu riaraamiꞌoi-re, ruu taitai uubi-reiro, ruu Paidubui-ro iomoaabai mea geegai ioroomaimoi-da, geꞌii paꞌaimo ruu rautu.
1.59: Puura gaaꞌui ioroohodi didimoi, mereei tama ahiai idabuaimoi-ka, ka pairai ma idodoumo Sakaraia, ruu abeai pairai-da.
1.60: Irai ooto maamui-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Abia, ruu pairai, Ioarei-to, ita ahoꞌoumo.”
1.61: Rii-ro ruu oduuꞌaimoi-ka, “Roo riaraamiꞌoi-da, iire pairai ahoꞌoumo bia.”
1.62: Ka rii-ro mereei abeai ememeꞌuioi-ka, mereei ruu-ro boꞌui-to ahoꞌoi maꞌai.
1.63: Ka Sakaraia erememeꞌuioi-ka iꞌati raa-ri. Ka rii urio podaudioumo ruu iꞌati-da, “Ruu pairai Ioare-ka.”
1.64: Aaꞌo ipi haato, Sakaraia madei araꞌerai-ka, Aiai aiha pemarahue.
1.65: Riiti taitai uubi, geega toe paꞌaimo, ka madei iodai-da roꞌoa-roꞌoa mati Iudeaito, uubi-ro aaꞌo raarai madei aiha poromoaꞌoiamo.
1.66: Diamoi ioroomaimoi-da, uubi geemai-ro ai-piraromoumo, ida paraatomo, “Ara mereeu raꞌu-ro ooꞌai maꞌai?” Mabu ruu Paidubui erara meree-ka. Sakaraia ieremamaihidio madei-ka
1.67: Dubuae Urioi-ro, Ioare abeai Sakaraia iimamiai-da, araibau peremamaihidio:
1.68: “Ai-remarahue kaumo Paidubui Iehoma, Isaraꞌera uubi Urio Abeai, mabu ruu tauo ooꞌu maaka, ruu uubi oroiꞌioi eito ma imaimai-ri.
1.69: Ruu-ro erehe hiꞌa ioitouti mereei tauo rimaꞌai maaka, Damida guui-da, Damida Iehoma himoꞌa meree-ka.
1.70: Aiai-ro epuui-to dubuae himogabo uubi madei modoboi, ruu iereemamaihidio aiboi,
1.71: ruu-ro rimo iahiꞌii aꞌai, rimoi-do boho uubi-re, kamia rimoi-do udo uubi-rei erehei goroi-da.
1.72: Ruu-ro rimo rariamiꞌoi giiꞌepu pimaꞌai, mabu ruu-ro ai-piraromai rii rautu iereemedeeꞌaumo Dubuae madei.
1.73: Rimo rariai Aberahamo rautu iereemedeeꞌaido madei,
1.74: rimo boho uubi erehei goroi-da ma riahiꞌii, ka ruu himoꞌa ma raꞌaimo toe tiato-ha.
1.75: Ka rimo ruu hohoi-da, dubuae-ra gamoꞌo-raida ma rodaumo, rimo oroiꞌioi aꞌai himioi-da.
1.76: Ka roo, moo meree, roo ahoꞌoi aꞌai kaumo hoꞌu hiꞌai Paidubui himogabo dubu. Mabu roo Paidubui epuui-da odai aꞌai, ruu gaboi emaumodi,
1.77: ruu uubi umoo ma imaꞌai, oroiꞌioi eito ma iiraimaimo, rii memihoi imapihiti-da.
1.78: Mabu Aiai geema giiꞌepu-ka rimoi-do, aaꞌo rau-ri rimo ioitouti aꞌai mereei oaho himioi hehei aibo oruoi aꞌai aromoi-da,
1.79: hehei-da ma emidioumoi-ri, duꞌi-da emidio uubi-re, ka oroihi duꞌi-da emidio uubi-re, ka rimo otoi gamoꞌo gaboi-da ma rimadaꞌuimo miroi eito.”
1.80: Ka mereei pupuo-ha piiꞌi tuupi-re urioi-rei rautu, ka opuhe mati-da pemidio, ida didimoi-to poobodi uubi geemai eito, Isaraꞌeraato.

2.1: Aaꞌo himioi, Roma hepui paidubui, Kaisara Agusito-ro, erara made edeꞌai-ka, uubi gamara paira bukai-da, pairai ma ideꞌaumoi-ri, Roma hepu geemai goroi-da.
2.2: Epuu paira imeꞌei-ka, Kurerio Suria hepui gamara iiemidioi-da.
2.3: Ka turiaha uubi aiha piiraimutimo, rii himia-himia rariamiꞌoi, goꞌoto-goꞌotoi eito, pairai ma imodoumoi-ri.
2.4: Ka aaꞌo rau-ri Iosepa, Rasareta goꞌotoi emeheai-ka Garereiaato, odai Beterehemai-to, Iudea goroi-da ooꞌa. Ruu rariai Damida ioobodi goꞌotoi-ka. Mabu ruu Damida guui-da dubu-ka.
2.5: Ruu iodai-da, ruu iomodabuaimo ooboi Maria, ai-pomodau pairai gaaꞌu-ha ma ideꞌaidoi-ri. Maria topii irio hiꞌai-ka.
2.7: kiauka, ruu boma mereei aiha pooto ohio, hipurai-da omoomai-ka, boromokaui duui iihodioumo ipuai-da, aiha pomutaꞌa. Mabu dima motoi-da, riiti emidio hiaꞌe tiato-ka. Mamoei dabi uubi-re Arerui-re
2.8: Ka aaꞌo duoi, mamoei iaꞌe uubi aamiꞌa, aaꞌo goꞌotoi taitai hauꞌii-da, mamoei paꞌai dabi paꞌaimo.
2.9: Ida poobodi Paidubui Arerui, ka Iehoma erehe hiꞌa hehei-ro, rii turiaha imemiai-da, iha toei paꞌaimo.
2.10: Irai Arerui-ro aaꞌo-ka, “Toe aꞌaimoꞌa, moo-ro riꞌo meai-re, kamia hiiro-hiiro uubi-ro geꞌii hiꞌa, ma aꞌaimo made rimomoꞌu.
2.11: Doꞌo hiꞌau riꞌo oroiꞌioi eito imodai aꞌai mereei, Damida goꞌotoi-da tauo oobodi maaka, Iehoma-ro Iapui Paidubui, ruu Pai-ka.
2.12: Ka riꞌo-ro umoo ma iiꞌimoi-ri emeeꞌai aꞌai kaumo, ruu hipurai-da omoomatidio, boromokau duu_i iihodioumo ipuai-da oidio.”
2.13: Ka tutuu bia hiiro hiꞌa areru oobodimoi-ka aromoi-da, ruu rautu oodabuaimoi-ka, Iehoma raahoaꞌei-da emarahueumoi-ka,
2.14: “Aromoi hoꞌu hiꞌai-da, Aiai Iehoma emarahueumo, kamia miroi hepui-da mooꞌa-ka, Aiai Iehoma-ro geꞌii imaꞌai uubi eito!”
2.15: Arerui aromoi eito iraimaimoi-da, mamoei dabi uubi-ro, oromoaduꞌoi-ka, “Aiha rodau kaumo, Beterehemai-to, Paidubui-ro rimo made, imetiodoai raai emeeꞌai.”
2.16: Ka horehore-ha podaumo, Maria-ra Iosepa-rai imeꞌai-ka, meree gagei boromokaui duui iihodioumo ipuai-da poidio.
2.17: Rii-ro iemeeꞌaumoi-da uubi imoaduꞌuti-ka, arerui-ro mereei iatomudio emerai.
2.18: Ka aaꞌo madei ioromidioumo uubi turiaha urio podaudioumo.
2.19: Maria-ro aaꞌo raarai aiha piraromai moꞌui-da, ka pupuo hiꞌai-to piraromo.
2.20: Mamoei dabi uubi-ro Iehoma raahoaꞌei-da emarahue-ha piraimaimo. Mabu rii-ro turiaha ioromidioumo, kamia ieaꞌaumo raarai arerui-ro aiha iatomudio emerai-ha pimeeꞌaumo. Iesu pairai iidodoi-ka
2.21: Puura gaaꞌui iorohodi didimoi-da, mereei tamai ahiai-ka, pairai aiha pidodoumo Iesu. Arerui-ro iemaꞌai pairai-ka, ruu maamui topi-da orododiai tiatoi-da. Iesu oaꞌuei-ka, Irudeme motoi-da
2.22: Riiti dubuae ma iiꞌidoi-ri, ieremaumodido himioi ioropoiꞌoi-da, Mose bubui-da iaaꞌo emerai, Iosepa-ra Maria-rairo ruu aiha pomodaido, Ierusaremai-to, ma oaꞌueumoi-ri Paidubui eito.
2.23: Paidubui bubui-da iꞌatimo emerai, “Epuu tutuei ohio-ra, ma oaꞌuei Paidubui eito”.
2.24: Kamia ai-podaido, poue raa ma omomohuduaimoi-ri, Paidubui bubui ohidioi-ri, iaaꞌo emerai, badu-oti tiato-ro ooꞌaato, ka upi momoꞌooti-to.
2.25: Aaꞌo himioi Ierusaremaa-to pemidio dubu ata paira-ka Simiora, ruu mea hiꞌa-ka. Kamia Aiai ai-pemabeedio, ruu ai-pomoti Isaraꞌera uubi ma imoabai meree-ri. Dubuae Urioi ruu rautu-ka,
2.26: ruui-do Dubuae Urioi-ro, tauo pomoaꞌeemia, ruu iihiai aꞌai bia, modau-die Paidubui iapui mereei memeeꞌa.
2.27: -28 Urioi-ro Simiora iimaamiai-da, ruu aiha podoro irudeme motoi eito. Ka maamu-ra abea-rairo Iesu pahapahai iomooꞌuidoi-da, bubui iaaꞌo raarai idomoiatidioi, Simiora-ro mereei aiha poobai ruu tui-da, ka Iehomai-do geꞌii made aaꞌoi-ka,
2.29: “Ara doꞌou, Aiai-o, roo ieremamaihidio madei ihahai tauo oobodi maaka, roo-ro moo, roo himoꞌa mereei, rotiodoai iihiai eito, miroi-da.
2.30: Mabu moo himia idomai-da tauo remeeꞌa maaka, uubi ioitouti aꞌai mereei.
2.31: Roo-ro aiꞌoi eremaumodi, uubi abeai hohooi-da,
2.32: roo rioi, roo hehei Iesu-ro, imoaꞌemiai aꞌai, Iuda guui-da paira tiato uubi eito, kamia tomioi imomoꞌui aꞌai, roo himia uubi Isaraꞌerai-do.”
2.33: Mereei maamu-ra abea-rai urio podaudioido, Simiora mereei-ri iaaꞌo raarai-da.
2.34: Simiora-ro meai imaꞌai-ka riibi, ida paaꞌo mereei maamui Mariai-do, “Ara mereeꞌu Iehoma-ro papui, ruuato hiiro uubi Isaraꞌera-to iraahioi aꞌai kaumo, kamia hiiro uubi ireibuai aꞌai kaumo. Ruu Aiai reꞌei-da hooho-ro oroaꞌeemia, ka hiiro uubi-ro eremamaraiboi aꞌai kaumo,
2.35: kamia rii piro-piro iraromoi hauꞌi eito imobodii aꞌai. Ka eꞌa hiꞌua aibo pauo iraromoi-ro, roo himia hiꞌa kaukai amuai aꞌai.”
2.36: -37 Ka hiei-da pemidio paꞌuri hiꞌa himogabo oobo ata, ruu pairai-ka Ara, Paruera meree-behei-ka, Asa guui-da. Ruu semeri (7) burio beha pemidio dubui rautu, ka doꞌou, ruu eiti-poa (84) burioi-ka, himui. Ruu-ro irudeme motoi emeheai bia, duo-ra himio-raida ruu-ro Iehoma ai-pemarahuedio, imaꞌui-re irudemei-rei rautu.
2.38: Aaꞌo himio mabui haato, ruu eredeꞌai-ka, kiauka Aiai eito keito made aaꞌoi-ka, ka mereei made imoaduꞌoi-ka turiaha goꞌoto-goꞌotoi ioroomotiimo uubi eito, Iehoma-ro Ierusarema-ra Isaraꞌera-ra uubi, ma ioitouti-ri. Rasaretai-to iiraimai-ka
2.39: Iosepa-ra Maria-rai, Paidubui Bubui modoboi-da imaꞌaimo omaꞌati, ioropoiꞌoi-da rii ireheꞌeai-ka iiraimai, Garereia hepui eito, rii himia goꞌotoi Rasaretai-to.
2.40: Mereei pupuoi rautu-ha piiꞌi, ruu pupuo moꞌui geema-ha pooꞌa. Aiai meai, aiha pooꞌa ruuato. Ohioi Iesu, Irudeme Motoi-da
2.41: Turiaha burioi Orohodi mahuai eito, Iesu maamu-ra abea-rai ioroaꞌoiadioumo emerai, imidai-ka odai Ierusaremai-to.
2.42: Iesu tuero (12) burioi-da, rii odaumoi-ka mahuai eito, rii iꞌatidioumo emerai.
2.43: Mahuai ioropoiꞌo didimoi, rii aiha pireheꞌeaimo iraimai goꞌotoi eito, maamu-ra abea-rai umoo iiꞌi bia, meree ohioi Iesu aiha pemeheaimo Ierusaremaato.
2.44: Riiti-ro ai-piraromoido tabai goroi-da imimadaꞌui, irai himio gaaꞌui didimoi-da pomahoroido ororoohoi riaraamiꞌoi-re uubi-rei tuia-tuiai.
2.45: Irai riiti-ro emeeꞌaido bia. Aaꞌo rau-ri, ai-piraimaido Ierusaremai-to ruu oohoi.
2.46: Retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) himioi didimoi-da pemeeꞌaido, ruu irudeme motoi-da, Iuda imatomudio uubi tuiai-da pemidio, iroomidio-ra iatohe-rai paꞌai.
2.47: Ka turiaha uubi urio podaudioumo, ruu umooi iemeaꞌaumoi-da, mabu ruui-do iatoheumo madei, gamoꞌo-ha pimoaimuti.
2.48: Ruu maamu-ra abea-rairo iemeeꞌaidoi-da, pauo-ha piraromoido, kaida paaꞌo maamui-ro, “Moo meree, ireibai raꞌu-ri ododiai rimoiti-do? Roo abeai-re mooi-re, roo-ro hora kaukau ridodiai, roo oohoi-da.”
2.49: Iesu-ro madei imoaimai-ka, “Riꞌoiti-ro moo raꞌu-ri rooho duido, riꞌoiti umoo ma iiꞌi, moo abeai motoi-daka.”
2.50: Irai riiti-do iaaꞌo madei, riiti-ro umoo eidaido bia.
2.51: Ka ruu rautu atuha piraimaibiimo Rasaretai-to. Ka riiti-ro ruu iotomuido madei ai-peidai. Ka ruu maamui-ro ara raarai aiha piraromo, ka pupuo-ha pideꞌa ruu kaukai-da.
2.52: Ka Iesu tuupi-re moꞌui-rei rautu, iha aahuu-aahuui pitoꞌa, Aiai Iehomai-re uubi-reiro ruu ihaha rioi pemaꞌaimo.

3.1: Roma pai, Kaisara Tiberu, iemidio pipitiri (15) burioi-da, pemidio, Poroto Pirato, Iudea gamarai. Heroda ruu Garereia hepui pai-ka, ka ruu raamu-abeai, Piripi, Iturea-ra Tarakori-rai hepui pai-ka, Risaria ruu Abirere hepui pai-ka.
3.2: Ka Arasi-ra Kaiopasi-rai, Iehomai-do poue emaꞌati uubi epuuhoroti-ka. Ka aaꞌo himioi Aiai Iehoma madei ooꞌui-ka, Sakaraia mereei Ioarei-do, opuhe mati-da.
3.3: Ka aaꞌo madei itooi-da aaꞌo-ha poroaꞌoia Ioridara oomoi hapuo-hapuoi, “Ireheꞌeaimo riꞌo memihoi reꞌei-da oboi-da ma imaaheemoi, ka Iehoma-ro riꞌo memihoi imapihiti aꞌai.”
3.4: Tauo-ha piꞌati, Iehoma himogabo dubui Aisaia bukai-da, “Ata meree itoo aaꞌo opuhe mati-da, ‘Paidubui gaboi emaumodimo rooꞌo-ha, ruu ma ooꞌui.
3.5: Roꞌoai boboi iiopoumo, roꞌoai ubu-ubui patapata idodiaimo, Kima gaboi ma iꞌimuti, gamoꞌo-ha ma iiꞌai, roꞌoai bobo-boboi ma imoopoi.
3.6: Ka Iehoma-ro, uubi ioitouti iotiodoai mereei, turiaha uubi-ro eaꞌai aꞌai kaumo.’ ”
3.7: Hiiro hiꞌa uubi iohai-ka, Ioarei-do, obo ma imaaheemoi-ri, ruu-ro rii-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Riꞌo auo-ka! Riꞌo boꞌu-ro imoaduꞌo Iehoma otiodoai toto aꞌai riiboi-da riꞌo odaudioi aꞌai kaumo?
3.8: Ire raarai ita idodiaimo, ka ruuato riꞌo-ro oroahuꞌomai aꞌai kaumo riꞌo memihoi-da tauo pireheꞌeaimo. Ka riꞌo himia ipituiai-da omahoroumoꞌa oromoaduꞌuti araibau, ‘Aberahamo riꞌo rariai-ka.’ Moo-ro riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai Iehoma-ro ara roꞌoa kopi-kopi-da Aberahamo koemai uubi idodiai modobo-ka!
3.9: Ibuoi tauo-ha peremaumodi, ruꞌai hipi-da ma iahioi-ri turiaha, mea hura aꞌai tiato ruꞌai iahioi aꞌai erai tuiai-da miheuꞌato.”
3.10: Ka uubi-ro ruu atohetai-ka, “Rimo raꞌaibou aꞌai-ra?”
3.11: Ioare-ro rii imoaimai-ka, “Boꞌu reꞌei-darie retoꞌa (2) teti, ata gaaꞌui ma emaꞌai hobou-ha mereei eito, kamia boꞌu reꞌei-darie dui, ma eremaꞌati.”
3.12: Kamia taketi imoamee uubi aamiꞌa, ooꞌumoi-ka, oboi-da ma imaaheemoi-ri, ka rii-ro ruu atohetai-ka, “Imatomudio dubu-o, rimo raꞌaibou aꞌai raꞌai duumo?”
3.13: Ruu-ro rii pimoaimai, “Roma gamarai bubui-ro iedeꞌa modoboi ohui-da imoamei bia.”
3.14: Heamo uubi aamiꞌa-ro ruu atohetai-ka, “Rimo mia raꞌaibou-ra? Rimo raꞌaibou aꞌai-ra?” Ioare-ro rii imoaimai-ka, “Meree ata mori, erehe eito oaidai bia, kamia auma tiato mereei, ematuhuti aibo ahoꞌoi bia. Riꞌo himia taꞌii-ha ma imidai udo tiato-ha.”
3.15: Uubi iraromoi, iioi omahoroi-ka, kamia rii ioroomotidioumo, Ioare Iehoma-ro, uubi imoabai-ri iapui mereei roꞌoamooꞌa-o?
3.16: Ka Ioare-ro rii turiaha iduuꞌai-ka, “Riꞌo moo-ro oboi-da rimaaheemo, irai meree ata raa mooꞌu. Moo ruu aibo bia, ruu geema-ka, moo mea bia ruu oto tamai imi ma romopimuti, ruu-ro riꞌo Dubuae Urioi-re, erai-reida, imaaheemoi aꞌai.
3.17: Ruu ruꞌa hurai itode kukui tui-da ai-oꞌapudio, ruꞌa hurai ma itodei-ri, meai ruu du motoi-da, ma iraahoꞌoi, ka memihoi oropoiꞌo tiato erai eito ma ipeduai.”
3.18: Himia-himia emerai-da poaduꞌo, Ioare-ro paimeai, uubi eito, ka uubi ai-pimoaduꞌuti, rii ioroiꞌioumo emerai-da ma ireheꞌeaimo.
3.19: Irai Ioare-ro pai dubui Heroda erehe madei-to pemaaꞌo, mabu ruu raamu-abeai, ooboi Herodia ai-poahiꞌi, kamia hiiro-hiiro memiho raara ai-paꞌai.
3.20: Kamia Herodai-do memiho hiꞌa iiꞌi, Ioare ruu-ro duꞌi motoi-da pibiꞌa. Iesu oboi-da ioaahemai-ka (Matiu 3:13-17; Maka 1:9-11)
3.21: Turiaha uubi oboi imaaheemo didimoi-da, Iesu obo oaahemai-ka. Ka ruu iirudemeai-da, aromoi aiha paraꞌerai.
3.22: Ka Dubuae Urioi, ruiai emerai pooruo, ruu ohui-da emiꞌei-ka. Ida made ata aromoi-da paaꞌo, “Roo moo rio mereei-ka, moo iha geꞌii raꞌai rooi-do.” Iesu rariamiꞌoi-ka. (Matiu 1:1-17)
3.23: Ka Iesu omaꞌati iiomahoroi, ruu teeti (30) burioi-ka. Uubi iraromoumoi ruu Iosepa mereei-ka. Iosepa Heri mereei-ka,
3.24: Heri Matatu mereei-ka, Matatu Remi mereei-ka, Remi Mereki mereei-ka, Mereki Iarai mereei-ka, Iarai Iosepa mereei-ka,
3.25: Iosepa Matataia mereei-ka, Matataia Amosa mereei-ka, Amosa Rahumu mereei-ka, Rahumu Eseri mereei-ka, Eseri Ragai mereei-ka,
3.26: Ragai Mahata mereei-ka, Mahata Matataia mereei-ka, Matataia Semeira mereei-ka, Semeira Ioseka mereei-ka, Ioseka Ioda mereei-ka,
3.27: Ioda Iorara mereei-ka, Iorara Resa mereei-ka, Resa Serubabere mereei-ka, Serubabere Searetiere mereei-ka, Searetiere Reri mereei-ka,
3.28: Reri Mereki mereei-ka, Mereki Adi mereei-ka, Adi Kosama mereei-ka, Kosama Eramadama mereei-ka, Eramadama Eo mereei-ka,
3.29: Eo Iosua mereei-ka, Iosua Eriesere mereei-ka, Eriesere Iorima mereei-ka, Iorima Matatu mereei-ka, Matatu Remi mereei-ka,
3.30: Remi Simiora mereei-ka, Simiora Iuda mereei-ka, Iuda Iosepa mereei-ka, Iosepa Iorama mereei-ka, Iorama Eriakimi mereei-ka,
3.31: Eriakimi Merea mereei-ka, Merea Mera mereei-ka, Mera Matata mereei-ka, Matata Ratara mereei-ka, Ratara Damida mereei-ka,
3.32: Damida Iese mereei-ka, Iese Obeda mereei-ka, Obeda Boasi mereei-ka, Boasi Saramora mereei-ka, Saramora Rasora mereei-ka,
3.33: Rasora Amiradaba mereei-ka, Amiradaba Adamira mereei-ka, Adamira Ari mereei-ka, Ari Hesarora mereei-ka, Hesarora Perese mereei-ka, Perese Iuda mereei-ka,
3.34: Iuda Iakobo mereei-ka, Iakobo Isaꞌako mereei-ka, Isaꞌako Aberahamo mereei-ka, Aberahamo Tera mereei-ka, Tera Rahora mereei-ka,
3.35: Rahora Seruga mereei-ka, Seruga Reu mereei-ka, Reu Perega mereei-ka, Perega Eba mereei-ka, Eba Sera mereei-ka,
3.36: Sera Keirara mereei-ka, Keirara Apasada mereei-ka, Apasada Sema mereei-ka, Sema Roa mereei-ka, Roa Remeka mereei-ka,
3.37: Remeka Metusera mereei-ka, Metusera Eroka mereei-ka, Eroka Iareda mereei-ka, Iareda Maharera mereei-ka, Maharera Kerara mereei-ka, Kerara Erosi mereei-ka,
3.38: Erosi Seta mereei-ka, Seta Adamu mereei-ka, Adamu Iehoma mereei-ka.

4.1: Iesu ereheꞌeai-ka, araimai Ioridara oomoi-da. Ka Dubuae Urioi-ro ruu iimamiai-da, aiha pomodau opuhe ipi eito.
4.2: Ka hiei-da Satari-ro pematuhuti poati (40) himioi-to. Aaꞌo himioi-da, ruu raa ata uuho bia, ka ruu iha dui boboi peereaꞌaa.
4.3: Ka Satari-ro aaꞌoi-ka ruui-do, “Roo Aiai Iehoma mereei-ro ooꞌaato? Ara roꞌoa kopi pupuo made ma emaꞌai, ka ruu du-ro orododiai aꞌai.”
4.4: Irai Iesu-ro omoaimai-ka, “Iehoma made bukai-da, tauo piꞌatimo, ‘Uubi dui haato, oroiꞌioi aꞌai bia.’ ”
4.5: Kiauka, Satari-ro ruu omioi-ka, ohu hiꞌa mati atai-to, ka ruu-ro horehore-ha pomoaꞌemia turiaha ara hepui pai emidio erara raarai.
4.6: Satari-ro ruu oduuꞌai-ka, “Moo-ro emaꞌai raꞌai rooi-do, turiaha erarai ara raarai rautu, mooi-do piremaꞌai ka moo-ro boꞌui-do emaꞌai riraromo, moo-ro emaꞌai raꞌai.
4.7: Ka turiaha ara raarai roo-ro imidai aꞌai, roo aia mihimai, mooi-do emarahuei.”
4.8: Iesu-ro omoaimai-ka, “Iehoma made bukai-da, tauo piꞌatimo, ‘Roo Paidubui Iehoma-haido ma emarahuei, ka ruu omaꞌati behai-ha ma ododiai.’ ”
4.9: Kiauka Satari-ro ruu omodai-ka, Ierusaremai-to, ka irudeme motoi ohu hiꞌai-da itoꞌaidoi-ka, ida paaꞌo ruui-do, “Roo Aiai Iehoma mereei-ro ooꞌaato? Eemediꞌa goroi eito.
4.10: Mabu, Iehoma made bukai-da, tauo piꞌatimo, ‘Aiai Iehoma-ro ruu arerui made imaꞌaiꞌai, roo mea hiꞌa-ha ma emaabeumoi-ri.’
4.11: Tauo piꞌatimo, ‘Rii-ro, roo oꞌapuai aꞌai kaumo, rii tui-da, ka roo otoi temeteme eidai aꞌai bia, roꞌoai-da.’ ”
4.12: Irai Iesu-ro ruu omoaimai-ka, “Iehoma made bukai-da tauo piꞌatimo, ‘Roo Paidubui Iehoma, roo-ro emahibai-da, edeꞌai bia.’ ”
4.13: Ka Satari-ro Iesu ematuhuti turiaha ioropoiꞌoi-da, ruu-ro, Iesu emeheaibuai-ka. Iesu omaꞌati iiomahoroi-ka, Garereiaato (Matiu 4:12-17; Maka 1:14-15)
4.14: Kiauka Iesu ereheꞌeai-ka Garereiai-to araimai, ka Dubuae Urioi erarai ruuato aiha pooꞌa. Ka ruu pai aburai-ka turiaha aaꞌo mati iooꞌa modoboi.
4.15: Ruu-ro idabu motoi-da ai-pimatomudio, ka turiaha uubi-ro ruu ai-pemarahueumo. Iesu iiaraiboumoi-ka Rasaretaato (Matiu 13:53-58; Maka 6:1-6)
4.16: Iesu odai-ka Rasaretai-to, ruu ioomotoumo mati eito. Ka Sabati himioi-da, ruu odai-ka idabu motoi eito, ruu iꞌatidio aiboi. Ruu eibuai-ka, Iehoma made bukai ma iaapoi-ri.
4.17: Ka himogabo dubui, Aisaia titi aiha pemaꞌaimo. Apopoi-ka, iꞌatimo mati aiha pemeeꞌa:
4.18: “Paidubui Dubuae Urioi moo rautu-ka, mabu ruu-ro moo ai-pirapui, mea madei aꞌamii uubi eito ma rimoaduꞌuti-ri. Ruu-ro moo ai-pirotiodoai, uubi made ma rimaꞌai-ri, rii duꞌi motoi-da iitohitiimoi, moo-ro iiahiꞌii raꞌai, ka idomai tiato uubi idomai ma iaamodiimo, ka pauo hiꞌa emidio oroiꞌioi reꞌei-da ma rimodaadeai,
4.19: ka oaduꞌo himioi tauo oohiai maaka, Paidubui ruu himia uubi, oroiꞌioi eito ma imaimai-ri.”
4.20: Iesu-ro titi otohiti-ka, aiha pemaꞌai imoabai mereei eito, ka ruu aiha pemiꞌei. Idabu motoi rioi iemidioumo uubi, turiaha idomai ruu-hato piiꞌaa,
4.21: ruu-ro rii-do, aaꞌoi-ka, “Ara titi-madei doꞌou ihahai tauo obodii maaka, moo-ro iriapoi-da, riꞌo-ro imoromidioumo emerai.”
4.22: Rii turiaha-ro, ruu geꞌii pemaꞌaimo, kamia urio podaudioumo, ruu puꞌoi-da iohuꞌo made meai-da. Ka rii-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Ruu Iosepa mereei-ra?”
4.23: Iesu-ro rii-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Moo umoo-ka, doꞌou riꞌo-ro, aaꞌoi aꞌai kaumo, ara obeegiri mooi-do, ‘Doketa, roo himiaha-ro, oodomoia.’ Riꞌo-ro moo ata oduuꞌai aꞌai kaumo, ‘Ata raa ma raꞌai-ri ara rimo himia goꞌotoi-da, Kaperaraumaato iorododiaimo aiboi, riꞌo-ro ioromidioumo emerai.’ ”
4.24: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Moo-ro riꞌo ihaha riduuꞌai araibau. Himogabo dubui ruu himia goꞌotoi-da, emabeumoi aꞌai bia.
4.25: “Moo iaha roromiidiioumo: ihaha-ka, Eria himioi-da, upi himui hiiro-ha pemidioumo Isaraꞌeraato, aaꞌo himioi mihae iaꞌuti bia retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) burioi-re tikiti (6) omei-reida, du tiato miomai-ro turiaha aaꞌo hepui aiha peidai.
4.26: Ka Eria otiodoai bia meree atai-do Isaraꞌera goroi-da, irai oobo himu atai-do podau, goꞌotoi Sarapetai-to, Sidoro hepui-da.
4.27: Ka hiiro hiꞌa tauo pemidioumo, mobibi gimoi rautu, Isaraꞌeraato, himogabo dubui Erisa himioi-da, irai gaaꞌubuo ata oodomoia bia, iiꞌi Suria dubui Ramari beha-ka.”
4.28: Idabu motoi uubi-ro iioromaimoi-da, rii turiaha udo paꞌaimo.
4.29: Rii iireibuaumoi-da, Iesu aiha pohiꞌitimo, goꞌotoi kekai eito, ka ai-pomodaumo rii goꞌotoi iididimo roꞌoai ohui eito, rii rio-ka, ruu ohiꞌiodidioi roꞌoai dodoroi-da,
4.30: irai uubi tuiai aiha poroohodii, ka ruu himia gabo-ha podau. Iesu-ro memiho urioi iibodidioi-ka (Maka 1:21-28)
4.31: Kiauka, Iesu aiha podau Kaperaraumai-to, goꞌoto ata-ka, Garereia goroi-da, ka Sabati himioi-da, uubi imatomudioi omahoroi-ka.
4.32: Rii urio podaudioumo, ruu iimatomudio emerai-da, mabu ruu erehei rautu-ha poroaduꞌuti.
4.33: Idabu motoi rioi-da pemidio, memiho urio rautu dubu ata. Ruu aapoꞌiai-ka, pai rautu madei-to,
4.34: “Aaa, Rasareta Iesu-o, roo raꞌu rio maꞌai rimoato? Roo rimo imodoboai amooꞌu? Moo umoo-ka, roo boꞌu-ra: roo Aiai Dubuae himoꞌa mereei-ka!”
4.35: Iesu-ro erehei-to aaꞌoi-ka, “Piroha! Ohuuꞌo ara dubui-da.” Kiauka memiho urioi-ro, aaꞌo dubui aiha peheuꞌato, rii turiaha hoho reꞌei-da, ka aiha pohuꞌodidio ruuato, ruu omodoboa tiato-ha.
4.36: Uubi urio podaudioumo, ka rii himia-ro ai-poroduꞌaitutiimo, “Raꞌaibou made raumo ara? Erehei-re pupuoi-rei rautu, ara dubui-ro, memiho urioi made imaꞌai-da, aiha ihuꞌodidioi-ka.”
4.37: Ka Iesu pai, aiha paburai, aaꞌo hepui-da. Iesu-ro hiiro uubi ai-pidomo (Matiu 8:14-17; Maka 1:29-34)
4.38: Idabu motoi emeheai-ka Iesu, ka ai-podau Simora motoi eito. Simora emapua maamui hamamaa gimo paꞌai, ka rii-ro, Iesu oduuꞌaimoi-ka, ruu ma omoabaimoi-ri.
4.39: Iesu odai-ka totoi kekai-da aiha potoꞌa, ka hamamaa gimoi made emaꞌai-ka, ruu ma emeheai-ri. Kiauka gimoi-ro, ruu iemeheai-da, ruu gaaꞌubuo-ha peibua, ka ruu-ro, rii iiho du imododia-ka.
4.40: Himioi ioopiꞌoma didimoi-da, uubi-ro, Iesui-do imooꞌumoi-ka, turiaha boiꞌo-ro emidioumo, himia-himia gimoi rautu, ka ruu tui iiaꞌoi-ka rii ohui-da, ka rii turiaha meaha iiꞌimoi-ka.
4.41: Memiho urioi hiiro uubiato pihuꞌotutiimo, ka pairautu madei-to paaꞌoumo, “Roo Aiai Iehoma mereei-ka.” Iesu-ro memiho urioi bubu made imaꞌai-ka, rii made aaꞌo tiato-ha ma iiꞌai-ri, mabu rii umoo iiꞌimoi-ka, ruu uubi imoabai-ri, iotiodoai mereei-ka. Iesu idabu motoi rioi-da iimoaduꞌuti-ka (Maka 1:35-39)
4.42: Himioi ioahoi-da, Iesu-ro, goꞌotoi emeheai-ka odai, muio-ipi eito. Ka uubi-ro omahoroi-ka ruu oohoi, ka rii-ro ruu iemeeꞌaumoi-da, rii-ro emahibai-ka ruu emadohoi, ruu-ro rii imeheaiꞌai-ri.
4.43: Irai rii-do ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Moo-ro ma rimoaduꞌuti, Iehoma pai emidio erara mea madei, goꞌoto aamiꞌai pairi, mabu ire moo Aiai Iehoma-ro ododiai-ri irotiodoai omoaꞌati-ka.”
4.44: Ka ruu-ro idabu motoi rioi-da, ai-pimatomudio, Iudeaato.

5.1: Himio ata, Iesu Geresareta damoi kekai mioi-da potii, ida uubi ooꞌumoi-ka ruui-do, irai ai-poromotoꞌoimo Aiai Iehoma madei, oromidioi.
5.2: Ruu-ro retoꞌa (2) peeti imeꞌai-ka, mioi-da piaꞌoaimo, raa iobo uubi-ro pimeheaimo, ka rii pohoi pimoruꞌoumo.
5.3: Iesu oroi-ka aaꞌo peei atai-da, aaꞌo peei Simora peei-ka, ruu atohetai-ka, ma iꞌimaibuai-ri tuia aiboi eito. Iesu emiꞌei-ka peei rioi-da, ka uubi hiiroi, pimatomudio.
5.4: Kiauka, ruu oroaduꞌuti ioropoiꞌoi-da, Simorai-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Peei oabu gomoi eito, rooi-re, ka roo aamiꞌai-rei rautu, pohoi ma idobiaumo, raa ma iobomo.”
5.5: Simora-ro omoaimai-ka, “Epuudubu-o, rimo duo tutuui biai roroaꞌoia maakaumo, ata raa iobo bia. Irai roo-ro aaꞌoi-ri, pohoi idobiai raꞌai kaumo.”
5.6: Rii-ro iodobiaumoi-da, hiiro hiꞌa raa piohiaimo, pohoi taitai-ka arahiuti.
5.7: Imemeꞌuioi-ka, rii aamiꞌai pee atai rioi-da, rii imoabai ma ooꞌumoi-ri. Rii iooꞌumoi-da peeti, hiiro hiꞌa raa piomutimo, peeti taitai-ka ioruoi.
5.8: Ida Simora Petero-ro, iobodimo raai ieaꞌai-da, ruu popupopu pihimai, Iesu hohoo reꞌei-da, ida paaꞌo. “Odadeai moo reꞌei-da, Paidubu-o! Moo memiho dubu-ka!”
5.9: Ruui-re, ruu rautu aamiꞌai-rei, urio podaudioumo, rii ioboumo raa hiiroi iaꞌaumoi-da.
5.10: Gaaꞌu aibo-ka, Simora aamiꞌai ihahai, Sebedi meree ohiooti-ka, Iemisi-ra Ioare-rai. Iesu-ro Simorai-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Toe aꞌaiꞌa, doꞌoi imodau ooꞌaiꞌai himioi, roo-ro uubi iohi aꞌai.”
5.11: Rii peeti itomaimoi-ka, mioi ohui eito, turiaha raarai imeheaimoi-ka, Iesu obodooi. Iesu-ro mobibi rautu dubui iodomoiai-ka (Matiu 8:1-4; Maka 1:40-45)
5.12: Himio ata, Iesu goꞌoto ataato pemidio, ka hiei-da dubu ata, ruu tamai turiaha mobibi haaro piiꞌa, ruu-ro Iesu iemeeꞌai-da hohoo reꞌei-da ihimai-ka. Ruu oroaroi-ka, ida paaꞌo, “Paidubu-o, roo rio-ro ooꞌaato, moo odomoiai ka rodomoia.”
5.13: Iesu tui ruu ohui-da iaaꞌoai-ka, ida aaꞌo-ka, “Iee, moo rio-ka, doꞌo hiꞌau roo meaha-ka.” Kiauka mobibi gimoi-ro, ruu emeheai-ka.
5.14: Ka Iesu-ro bubu made emaꞌai-ka, “Meree ata omoaduꞌoꞌa, gamoꞌo-ha odau poue emaꞌati dubui eito. Ka roo ruui-do oroahuꞌomai aꞌai. Poue ita aꞌai, Mose bubui-da, iaaꞌo modoboi. Ka uubi-ro umoo iiꞌi aꞌai kaumo, roo meaha-ka.”
5.15: Irai Iesu odii geega iiꞌi-ka, ka hiiro hiꞌa uubi ooꞌumoi-ka, ruu oromidioi, kamia gimoi-da ma idomoi-ri.
5.16: Irai ruu odai-ka muio mati atai-to, irudemei-ri, ruu iꞌatidio aiboi. Iesu-ro dabu dubui iodomoiai-ka (Matiu 9:1-8; Maka 2:1-12)
5.17: Himio ata, Iesu iimatomudioi-da, Pariseia uubi-re, ka bubui imatomudio uubi-rei, hiei-da pemidioumo, ioꞌumo uubi turiaha goꞌoto goꞌotoi-da Garereia goroi-da, ka Iudea goroi-daire, kamia Ierusaremaatoi-re. Paidubui erarai aiha pooꞌa, Iesu-ro, gimo uubi ma idomoi-ri.
5.18: Dubu aamiꞌa-ro, dabu mereei omooꞌumoi-ka, tioi rautu, tautapei-da, ka rii-ro emahibai-ka, omodoi-ri motoi rioi eito, Iesu hohoo reꞌei-da, ruu ma omutaꞌaumoi-ri.
5.19: Irai uubi hiiroi-ri, rii pauo pemeeꞌaumo ruu ibiiꞌai. Ka rii-ro ruu ai-pomioumo motoi ubui eito, hiaꞌe ododiai-ka ubui-da. Ka ruu omooruoi-ka tautapei-da, uubi tuiai-da, Iesu hoho reꞌei eito.
5.20: Iesu-ro, rii pupuo iraromoi iimeaꞌai-da, ruu-ro dabu dubui eito aaꞌo-ka, “Dubu-o, roo memihoi tauo remapihiti maaka.”
5.21: Bubui imatomudio uubi-re, ka Pariseia uubi-reiro oomahoroi-ka rii himiai-do oromoaduꞌuti, “Boꞌu-rie ara Iehoma pairai omodoboa dubui? Iehoma beha-ka, memihoi imapihiti dubui.”
5.22: Iesu umoo iiꞌi-ka, rii iraromoi, ida aaꞌo-ka rii-do, “Raꞌu-ri miraromo duumo, ire raarai?
5.23: Modobo bia-ra, araibau aaꞌoi, ‘Roo memihoi tauo emapihiti maaka,’ kamia modobo-ra aaꞌoi, ‘Eibua, ma imadaꞌui.’
5.24: Moo-ro imoahuꞌomai raꞌai riꞌoi-do, Uubihaubi mereei erara-ka, ara hepui-da, uubi memihoi ma imapihiti.” Kiauka ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka dabu dubui eito, “Moo-ro ai-raaꞌo, eibua, roo tautapei ooꞌa tioi oꞌapuai, ka odau motoi eito.”
5.25: Kiauka gaaꞌu-ha peibua rii turiaha hohoi-da, ruu iorobu tioi oꞌapuai-ka, odai motoi eito, Iehoma emarahue-ha.
5.26: Rii urio podaudioumo, ka Iehoma rii-ro ai-pemarahueumo iha toei rautu, ida paaꞌoumo, “Urio odaudio raara tauo riaꞌa maakaumo, ara himioi-da!” Iesu-ro, Remi iahoꞌoi-ka (Matiu 9:9-13; Maka 2:13-17)
5.27: Aaꞌo didimoi, Iesu odai-ka. Ida pemeeꞌa taketi imoamee dubui, pairai Remi, ruu ai-pemidio, taketi imoamee motoi-da. Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Moo robodoo.”
5.28: Ka ruu eibuai-ka, turiaha raarai imeheai-ka, Iesu obodoi.
5.29: Kiauka Remi-ro, Iesu geema iiho omododiai-ka, ruu motoi-da, hiiro taketi imoamee uubi-re, ka uubi aamiꞌai-re, turiaha emiꞌeituti-ka iihoi.
5.30: Pariseia uubi-re, kamia bubui imatomudio uubi-reiro, pauo peaꞌaumo, ida paaꞌoumo, Iesu iimatomudio mereei eito, “Riꞌo iiho-ra idio-rai, memiho uubi-re, kamia taketi imoamee uubi-rei rautu, raꞌu-ri maꞌai duumo?”
5.31: Iesu-ro rii madei pimoaimai, “Gimo tiato uubi doketa rio aꞌai bia. Gimo uubi haa-ro oohoi aꞌai kaumo doketa.
5.32: Moo irooꞌui mea emidio uubi iahoꞌoi ooꞌu bia ma ireheꞌeaimo, irai moo ai-pirooꞌu memiho uubi ma riduuꞌai, memiho oroiꞌioi-da ma ireheꞌeaimo.” Iesu imaꞌui hapuo patohetaimo (Matiu 9:14-17; Maka 2:18-22)
5.33: Aamiꞌa uubi-ro, Iesui-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Ioare iimatomudio uubi imaꞌui-ra, iirudeme rai geega-ha piꞌatidioumo, kamia Pariseia uubi-ro uubi iimatomudio uubi rautu, gaaꞌu emerai piꞌatidioumo. Irai roo obodoumo uubi, iiho-ra idio-rai aꞌai kaumo.”
5.34: Iesu-ro rii madei pimoaimai, “Riꞌoi-do modobo-ra, riꞌo madei-da, oio idabuai oobo-ra dubu-rai idabuai eito, imiamaꞌue-ka uubi, iiho tiato ma emidioumo, oio idabuai oobo-ra dubu-rai, dubui riꞌo rautu emidioi-da? Abia.
5.35: Irai himioi ooꞌui aꞌai, oio orobai oobo-ra dubu-rai, dubui rii reꞌei-da, ma omodadeai-ri. Aaꞌo himioi-da iamaꞌue uubi imaꞌui emidioi aꞌai kaumo.”
5.36: Iesu-ro, ara obeegiri imoaduꞌoi-ka, “Meree ata-ro, oio hipurai oaheꞌai aꞌai bia, pamo hipurai-da, ma oateai-ri. Ruu-ro aia mododiai, ruu-ro, oio hipurai raato tauo ododiai maaka, kamia oio hipurai-da, tauo hipurai oateai aꞌai bia.
5.37: Kamia meree ata-ro, oio mire oboi aatei aꞌai bia tauo mire obo beumai-da. Aaꞌo emerai aia mododiai, oio mire oboi-ro, beumai apoꞌiai aꞌai, ka mire oboi hepui eito oruodi aꞌai, kamia beumai rautu memiho iiꞌi aꞌai.
5.38: Aaꞌo rau-ri, oio mire oboi, oio beumai haato, ma aatei.
5.39: Meree ata-ro, oio mire oboi rio aꞌaiꞌai bia, tauo mire oboi idio didimoi-da. Ruu-ro aaꞌoi aꞌai, ‘Tauoi mea hiꞌa-ka.’ ”

6.1: Iesu, uiti hauꞌi tuia-tuiai pimadaꞌui Sabati-da, ka ruu obodo uubi-ro uiti epu-epui imeꞌei-ka, tui-da ihiiꞌautiimoi-ka, ihai aiha piihoumo.
6.2: Aamiꞌa Pariseia-ro rii iatohetai-ka, “Raꞌu-ri maꞌai duumo, rimo bubui-da eremaabe raai, memiho-ka iibai aꞌai Sabati-da.”
6.3: Iesu-ro rii imoaimai-ka, “Riꞌo-ro tauo piapoumo, Damida raꞌu aꞌai, ruui-re, ruu aamiꞌai-rei, dui boboi-ro iiohiai-da.
6.4: Ruu odoroi-ka, Aiai Iehoma motoi rioi eito, poue iemaꞌaimo paramai eidai-ka, uuhoi-ka, ka aiha pimaꞌai ruu rautu dububaiꞌoi eito. Irai rimo bubui-ro ai-aaꞌo, Iehomai-do poue emaꞌai paramai, uuho beha meree-ro uuhoi aꞌai bia, poue emaꞌati mereei ata haa-ro uuhoi aꞌai.”
6.5: Iesu-ro, omoopai-ka, “Uubihaubi mereei, ruu Sabati Paidubui-ka.” Tu dabu rautu dubui (Matiu 12:9-14; Maka 3:1-6)
6.6: Sabati ata, Iesu odoroi-ka, idabu motoi rioi eito. Ka ai-pimatomudio, ida dubu ata hiei-da pemidio ruu iha tui dabu-ka.
6.7: Pariseiaiꞌoi-re, kamia bubu imatomudio uubi aamiꞌai-reiro, rii rio-ka Iesu memiho raa ataato ma ememeeꞌaumo, ka Iesu ma emaaꞌoumo. Ka rii-ro taitai hiꞌa-ha paarodiomo, ruu-ro Sabati-da meree ata odomoiai amaꞌai.
6.8: Irai Iesu umoo iiꞌi-ka, rii raꞌu iraromoumo, ka tu dabu rautu dubui eito aaꞌoi-ka, “Eibua turiaha uubi hoho reꞌei-da otooꞌa.” Ruu eibuai-ka hiei-da aiha pitooꞌa.
6.9: Ka Iesu-ro rii-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Moo-ro riꞌo ai-riatohetaii, rimo bubui-ro raꞌu rimapui Sabati-da ma raꞌaimo-rai, mea ododiai-ra ee, memiho ododiai-ra, oroiꞌioi omoabai-ra ee, omodoboai-ra?”
6.10: Ruu-ro rii turiaha iiarodio, ida paaꞌo, aaꞌo dubui eito, “Itutuai roo tui.” Ruu-ro aiha pododiai, ka ruu tui meaha iiꞌi-ka.
6.11: Irai rii pupuoi-to udo-ro, imidai-ka. Ka rii himia tuiai-da oromoaduꞌuti omahoroumoi-ka, rii-ro Iesu raꞌu omododiai maꞌai duumo. Iesu tuero (12) himoꞌa uubi iiapui-ka (Matiu 10:1-4; Maka 3:13-19)
6.12: Ata himioi, Iesu ioroi-ka roꞌoai ohui eito, irudemei. Ka duo tutuui hiei-da pirudeme Iehomai-do.
6.13: Himioi ioahoi-da, ruu iimatomudio mereei iahoꞌootiai-ka, ruui-do. Ida piapui, tuero (12) uubi beha, ruu-ro pairai ai-pimaꞌai, iiapui made himoꞌa uubi.
6.14: Rii pairai-ka, Simora (Iesu-ro ruu pairai ai-pahoꞌoo Petero) ka ruu riai Eridurui-re, Iemisi-re, Ioarei-re, Piripi-re, Bataromi-re,
6.15: Mataioi-re, Tomasi-re, ka Iemisi (Arepeosi meree-ohioi-ka), Simora (ruu Serote paꞌai dubu-ka),
6.16: Iudasi (Iemisi meree-ohioi-ka), Iudasi Isikariota, Iesu oaꞌuei aꞌai mereei-ka. Iesu-ro iimatomudioi-re, ka iidomoi-re (Matiu 4:23-25)
6.17: Iesu roꞌoai hoꞌui-da tuero (12) himoꞌa uubi rautu iooruoi-da, hamei-da otooꞌai-ka, ruu iimatomudio uubi hiiroi aaꞌo reꞌei-daka. Turiaha mati-mati-da iooꞌumo uubi geemai Iudea-toire, Ierusarema-toire, kamia tuia geegai barai iiꞌaa goꞌoto paipai, Taiai-re, Sidoroi-rei goroi-da.
6.18: Rii ai-pooꞌumo ruu oroomidioi, kamia gimoi-da rii ma iidomoi, memiho urioi-ro iimaꞌobeumo uubi rautu ai-pooꞌumo, ka aiha piidomo.
6.19: Turiaha uubi-ro emahibai-ka ruu ahimodi, mabu erarai ruuato ai-pohuꞌo, ka rii turiaha aiha pidomo. Geꞌii hiꞌai-re kamia memiho hiꞌai-re (Matiu 5:1-12)
6.20: Iesu-ro ruu iimatomudio mereei iaꞌaa, ida paaꞌo, “Geꞌii-ka riꞌo boiꞌo-ra, raara tiatoi, Iehoma pai emidio erarai riꞌoido-ka!
6.21: Geꞌii-ka riꞌo doꞌou rioi goroꞌoro-ra, riꞌo kaupaꞌe iiꞌi aꞌai kaumo! Geꞌii-ka riꞌo doꞌou idebi-ra, riꞌo mari aꞌai aꞌai kaumo!
6.22: “Geꞌii-ka riꞌo uubi-ro rio-tiato amimaꞌai duumo, aia miraibo duumo, ee amimehipo duumo, kamia aia maaꞌo duumo, riꞌo turiaha memiho uubi-ka, mabu Uubihaubi mereei obodoumoi-ri.
6.23: Riꞌo ibai-ha amimodoboa duumo, riꞌo geꞌii geema hiꞌa, hete rautu ma oroamauti, mabu geema hiꞌa taꞌii ai-oroomotii, aromoi-da. Rii himia rariamiꞌoi aibo-ka. Rii rariamiꞌoi-ro, aatu memiho raarai tauo piꞌatidioumo, Iehoma himogabo uubi eito.
6.24: Memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, riꞌo doꞌou raarai hiiro-hiiro uubi eito, mabu riꞌo pauo tiato oroiꞌioi-da tauo pemidioumo!
6.25: Memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, riꞌo doꞌou kaupaꞌe uubi eito, riꞌo rioi goroꞌoro aꞌai aꞌai kaumo! Memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai riꞌo boiꞌo-ro mari maꞌai duumo doꞌou, riꞌo giiꞌepu idebi aꞌai aꞌai kaumo!
6.26: “Memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, riꞌo turiaha uubi-ro, geꞌii amimaꞌai duumo, mabu rii rariamiꞌoi-ro, gaaꞌu emerai raara piꞌatidioumo ierematuhutidioumo himogabo uubi eito. Boho uubi giiꞌepu ma imaꞌai (Matiu 5:38-48; 7:12a)
6.27: “Irai riꞌo boiꞌo-ro roromidio duumo moo, riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai, riꞌoi-do boho uubi giiꞌepu-ha ma imaꞌai, meai-ha ma imododiai, riꞌoi-do udo aꞌai uubi-ri,
6.28: riꞌo boru made imaꞌai uubi-ri, Aiai Iehoma ma atohetai, ruu meai ma imaꞌai, kamia riꞌo memiho imododiai uubi eito, aiha ma irudemeai.
6.29: Meree ata-ro, roo mapeho tamai aia maatotai, hapuo atai rautu ma ememeheꞌeai, maatotai-ka. Meree ata-ro, riꞌo gugaꞌo hipurai aia mimoaidai dubu-urioi rautu ma emaꞌai.
6.30: Ma imaꞌati, riꞌoi-do aamiꞌa raara-ri oroaro uubi eito, meree ata-ro, riꞌo ata raa aia mimaidai, oomaahoi bia.
6.31: Riꞌo rioi aamiꞌai-ro, riꞌoi-do ma ododiaimo emerai, riꞌo haa-ro ma ododiai rii-do.
6.32: “Riꞌo giiꞌepu imaꞌai uubi behai giiꞌepu amimaꞌai duumo, ka raꞌu-ri eidai maꞌai duumo, riꞌo-ro mea taꞌii? Abia! Memiho uubi rautu, rii giiꞌepu imaꞌatidio uubi, giiꞌepu imaꞌatidio kaumo!
6.33: Kamia riꞌo meai, riꞌoi-do mea ododiai uubi behai eito amododiai duumo, raꞌu-ri eidai maꞌai duumo riꞌo-ro mea taꞌii? Abia! Memiho uubi rautu imiꞌatidio duumo aaꞌo emerai!
6.34: Ka riꞌo-ro aia mimaꞌai duumo, riꞌo tui imoaimai-ri iraromo uubi behai eito, raꞌu-ri eidai maꞌai duumo mea taꞌii? Abia! Memiho uubi-ro, aamiꞌa memiho uubi eito, imiꞌatidio duumo, gaaꞌu emerai, rii-ro imaꞌai modoboi-ha ma imoaimaimoi-ri!
6.35: Abiarie! Riꞌoi-do boho uubi, riꞌo-ro giiꞌepu-ha ma imaꞌai, meai-ha ma imododiai, ka ma imaꞌai, irai omoaimai-ri, oroomotii bia. Riꞌo ibai amododiai duumo, taꞌii geema-ha ooꞌai aꞌai, ka riꞌo mia ohu hiꞌai Paidubui meree iiꞌi aꞌai kaumo. Mabu ruu giiꞌepu hiꞌa-ka, memiho uubi-re, kamia ruui-do, keito made aaꞌo tiato uubi-rei eito.
6.36: Ka riꞌo abeai Iehoma aibo, uubi giiꞌepu ma imaꞌai. Aamiꞌai aumai imaapoi bia (Matiu 7:1-5)
6.37: “Uubi aamiꞌai aumai imaapoi bia, ka Iehoma-ro, riꞌo aumai imaapoi aꞌai bia. Aamiꞌai iahoꞌooi bia, rii aꞌai memihoi taꞌii ma aꞌaimoi-ri, ka Iehoma-ro riꞌo aꞌai memihoi taꞌii ma aꞌaimoi-ri, iahoꞌooi aꞌai bia. Aamiꞌai-ro riꞌoi-do aꞌai memihoi ma imapihiti, ka Iehoma-ro riꞌo memihoi imapihiti aꞌai.
6.38: Aamiꞌai eito ma imaꞌai, ka Iehoma-ro, riꞌoi-do imaꞌai aꞌai, ka riꞌo imaꞌai aꞌai huru haato modoboi-da, ka geema hiꞌa modoboi oruodii aꞌai riꞌo tui eito, riꞌo tui-da iꞌapudioi modobo tiatoi. Aamiꞌai eito riꞌo-ro imaꞌati emerai, Iehoma-ro riꞌoi-do imaꞌati aꞌai.”
6.39: Ka Iesu-ro ara obeegiri imoaduꞌoi-ka, “Idomai tiato dubu atai-ro, idomai tiato dubu atai, omodai modobo bia, ruu-ro aia mododiai, riiti orohuꞌumoi aꞌai kaido boboi-da.
6.40: Umooi ooho uubi-ro, rii imatomudio dubui umooi oohoodii aꞌai bia, irai turiaha uubi, ruu ematomudioi aia moropoiꞌo, ruu ematomudio dubui aibo iiꞌi aꞌai.
6.41: “Roo riaraamui idomai ooꞌaa ruꞌa horoi-ha, raꞌu-ri memaroꞌo, kamia roo himia idomai ooꞌaa ruꞌa ipi, ereaꞌaa bia-ra?
6.42: Roo riaraamui eito aaꞌoi modobo bia, ‘Riaraamu-o, roo idomai ooꞌa ruꞌa horoi, ma arahuurai,’ kamia roo himia idomai ooꞌa ruꞌa ipi, eereaꞌaa bia-ra? Riꞌo daea uubi-ka! Epuui roo himia idomai ooꞌaa ruꞌa ipi-ha ma araahurai, ka roo-ro hauꞌi-ha iaꞌai aꞌai, roo riaraamui idomai ooꞌa ruꞌa horoi ma ahuurai-ri. Ruꞌai, ka ruu himia hurai-re (Matiu 7:16-20; 12:33-35)
6.43: “Mea hiꞌa ruꞌai-ro memiho hura imamirai aꞌai bia, kamia memiho ruꞌai-ro, mea hura imamirai aꞌai bia.
6.44: Turiaha ruꞌai, ruu himia imamirai hurai haato oibomai-ka, riꞌo-ro topo hiꞌa ruꞌa hurai, eepeeapeeai-da, idoꞌoi aꞌai bia, kamia mire hurai, iimuui-da idoꞌoi aꞌai bia.
6.45: Mea mereei-ro, imooꞌui aꞌai mea raarai, ruu kaukai-da irahoꞌoo mea raarai-da. Kamia memiho mereei-ro, imooꞌui aꞌai memiho raarai, ruu kaukai-da irahoꞌoo memiho raarai-da. Puꞌoi-da, oroaduꞌoi-ka, kaukai-da raꞌu hiiro-ro miiꞌa. Retoꞌa motoi, iititiido dubuoti-ka (Matiu 7:24-27)
6.46: “Riꞌo-ro moo raꞌu-ri rahoꞌoo duumo, ‘Paidubu-o, Paidubu-o’, irai mia riꞌo-ro, idodiaimo bia, moo-ro riꞌo imoaduꞌuti raarai.
6.47: Meree ata mooi-do aia mooꞌu, ida aamoromidio moo madei, kaida aia midodiai moo aaꞌo raarai, moo-ro riꞌo imoaꞌemiai raꞌai, ruu raꞌaibou mereei-ra.
6.48: Ruu dubu ata aibo-ka, moto pididi, aboi boboi goro hiꞌa piobuti, motoi aahuu ma otii-ri. Oomoi borei iooꞌui-da, motoi amaꞌadeai-ka, irai aaꞌo motoi biai poohiai, oomuo bia, mabu motoi aahuu hiꞌa-ha pididi.
6.49: Kamia moo madei imoroomidio, irai moo aaꞌo raarai idodiai bia-ra, ruu dubu ata aibo-ka, motoi ididi, abo tiato, hepu behai-da. Borei-ro aaꞌo motoi iohiai-da, aiha piiraahiai, ka ruu iiraahiai-da, memiho hiꞌa ha piiꞌi!”

7.1: Iesu ara raarai turiaha oroaduꞌuti ioropoiꞌoi-da uubi eito, ruu odai-ka Kaperaraumai-to.
7.2: Hiei-da, Roma heamoi epuuhoro dubui-ro, rio pemaꞌatidio, ruu himia moto himoꞌa meree ata, gimo hiꞌa-ka, iihiai toto-ha paꞌai.
7.3: Heamoi epuuhoro dubui-ro, Iesu pai ioromai-da, Iuda epuuhoro uubi aamiꞌa itiodoai-ka, Iesu ma atohetaimoi-ri, ma ooꞌui-ri ruu himoꞌa mereei ma omodomoiai.
7.4: Rii iooꞌumoi-da Iesui-do iha hiꞌa-ha oroarotiai-ka, “Mea hiꞌa-ka, roo-ro ruu ma omoabai.
7.5: Ruu-ro giiꞌepu imaꞌai rimo uubi, ka ruu himia-ha pididi idabu motoi, rimo-ri.”
7.6: Ka Iesu odai-ka, rii rautu. Ruu auꞌo bia motoi-da, heamo epuuhoro dubui-ro riaraamui itiodoai-ka, ruu ma oduuꞌaimoi-ri araibau, “Paidubu-o roo pauo iraromoꞌa, moo mea bia, roo ma odoro moo motoi rioi eito.
7.7: Aaꞌo rauri, moo himia iraromoi-da, moo modobo biai reereeaꞌa maaka, ma rooꞌu rooi-do. Irai made beha-ha aaꞌo, ka moo moto himoꞌa mereei ma oodomoiai-ka.
7.8: Moo roo aibo dubu ata-ka, epuuhoro uubi aamiꞌa goro ato-ka. Heamo uubi moo goroi-daka. Moo-ro arahiou aia roduuꞌai, ‘Odau!’ Ruu odai aꞌai. Kamia aure hiei aia roduuꞌai, ‘Ooꞌu,’ ooꞌui aꞌai. Moo himoꞌa mereei aia roduuꞌai ‘Ara raai ododiai,’ ruu-ro ododiai aꞌai.”
7.9: Ara madei Iesu-ro ioroomai-da urio podaudio. Ka ruu iobodoumo uubi iimeteai-da aaꞌo-ka, “Riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, Aiai eito pupuo iraromo meree ata, moo-ro, emeeꞌa bia araibau Isaraꞌera goroi-da.”
7.10: Madei iomodaumo uubi ireheꞌeai-ka, iiraimai epuuhoro dubui motoi eito. Kaida pemeeꞌaumo ruu himoꞌa mereei mea tauo-ha piiꞌi. Iesu-ro oobo himui meree rituoi ioitorai-ka
7.11: Tutuu bia Iesu odai-ka, Raira goꞌotoi eito, ruu iimatomudio mereei rautu, geema uubi-ro pobodoumo.
7.12: Ruu goꞌotoi eito iidouti gaboi hohoi-da iereedeeꞌai-da, pimeeꞌa rituo mereei tuupi rautu, iooꞌumo uubi. Iihiai mereei, himu oobo ata, meree-ohio gaaꞌu-ka, ka rituoi rautu iooꞌumo uubi, maamu himui rautu gaaꞌu-ha piihuuꞌoumo.
7.13: Paidubui-ro ruu iemeeꞌai-da, iha giiꞌepui pemaꞌai, ka ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, maamu himui eito, “Idebi aꞌaiꞌa.”
7.14: Ka ruu imadaꞌui-da, aihimodi-ka rituo mereei iorobu tautapei. Ka iomodaumo dububaiꞌoi aiꞌoi mitooꞌa duumo. Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Meree dodobai-o, roo moo-ro ai-roduuꞌai, eibua.”
7.15: Iihiai mereei eibuai-ka, aiha pemiꞌei, ka ruu oroaduꞌuti oomahoroi-ka. Kiauka Iesu-ro, ruu aiha pemaꞌai maamui eito.
7.16: Rii turiaha toei-ro imidai-da, Aiai aiha pemarahueumo, “Geema hiꞌa himogabo dubu tauo oobodi maaka, rimo tuiai-da.” Rii-ro aaꞌoumoi-ka, “Aiai tauo ooꞌu maaka, ruu uubi oroiꞌioi-da ma ideꞌai-ri.”
7.17: Iesu pai aburai-ka, turiaha Iudea hepui, aamiꞌa mati-mati rautu. Ioare Babatiso aratohetai-ka (Matiu 11:2-19)
7.18: Ioare Babatiso iomoaduꞌoumoi-da, ruu himia iimatomudio mereei-ro, Iesu iidodiai raarai, ka Ioare-ro iahoꞌootiai-ka retoꞌa (2) mereeti, iduuꞌai-ka.
7.19: Odaido, Paidubui atohetai, “Roo Aiai Iehoma-ro ooꞌu made ioaduꞌo mereei-ra, ee, dubu ata aromoti duumo?”
7.20: Riiti iooꞌuidoi-da Iesui-do aaꞌoidoi-ka, “Uubi obo imaaheemo dubui, Ioare-ro, riitiodoai mama, roo ma ratohetaidoi-ri, ‘Roo ruu-ro ooꞌu made ioaduꞌo mereei-ra, ee, dubu ata aromotii duumo?’ ”
7.21: Aaꞌo himioi haato, Iesu-ro hiiro gimo uubi pidomo, tuupi goroi gimoi-da, memiho urioi iimobodidio, ka hiiro idomai duꞌi uubi, iaꞌai iimaꞌati.
7.22: Iesu-ro Ioare iimatomudio mereeti iduuꞌai-ka, “Iraimaido, ka ita omoaduoido Ioare, riꞌoiti imiaꞌaido raarai, kamia imiromidioido madei, idomai duꞌi, ai-iaꞌaa kaumo, oto memihoi ai-imadaꞌui kaumo, tamai mobibi gimo rautui, mea imiiꞌi duumo, hepatoi mumuroi, ai-iromidio kaumo, rituoi imireibuio duumo, oroiꞌioi eito, ka pai meai, irimoaduꞌuti, raara tiato uubi eito.
7.23: Moo eaꞌa uubi-ro, rii iraromoi mooato irahio bia-ra, rii geꞌii-ha ma aꞌai.”
7.24: Ioare iimatomudio mereeti iodaido didimoi-da, Iesu-ro omahoroi-ka Ioare oaduꞌoi uubi geemai eito, “Riꞌo aaꞌo himioi iodaumoi-da Ioarei-do, opuhe mati-da, riꞌo-ro raꞌu eaꞌai iraromoumo? Ioare tataꞌoi paha gaaꞌu aibo, ruurui-ro eꞌimotatidioi-da, ma emeeꞌaumoi-ri agiraromoumo? Aabiarie.
7.25: Riꞌo auꞌoi-da raꞌu eaꞌai odaumo? Dubu ata-ra, muari hiꞌa hipura rautu? Aaꞌo emerai hipura meameai, kamia mea oroiꞌioi-da emidio uubi imeꞌai aꞌai, ohu hiꞌa pai motoi-da!
7.26: Moo romoaduꞌoumo, riꞌo raꞌu eaꞌai odaumo auꞌoi-da? Himogabo dubu-ra? Ie, iaha-ka, irai riꞌo-ro geega hiꞌai eaꞌa duumo, himogabo dubui-ro omiorai.
7.27: Ara Ioare ruu-ka, Iehoma made bukai-ro ai-aaꞌo: ‘Moo-ro otiodoai raꞌai himoꞌa mereei, roo epuui-da, roo gaboi ma omododia-ri.’ ”
7.28: Iesu-ro odabuai-ka, “Riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, Ioare geega-ka, ruu aibo ata, emidio bia epuui-to, kamia doꞌou, ara hepui-da. Irai keehibuo hiꞌai boꞌu-rie, Iehoma pai emidio erarai-da, ruu Ioare-ro omiorai-ka.”
7.29: Turiaha uubi-ro ruu ai-poroomaimo, rii-re kamia taketi imoamee uubi-reiro poromaimo, ka rii ai-poroahuomaimo, rii iraromoi Iehoma gaboi meaha-ka mabu rii Ioare-ro oboi-da ai-pimaaheemo.
7.30: Irai Pariseia uubi-re kamia bubui imatomudio uubi-reiro Iehoma rioi ai-paraiboumo, rii himia rioi-ri, kaida rii rio tiato paꞌaimo, Ioare-ro, oboi-da imaaheemoi.
7.31: Iesu imatomudioi aiha podau, “Ka moo-ro doꞌou uubi raꞌuato idoboai raꞌai? Rii raꞌui aibo-ra?
7.32: Rii hauꞌi tuiai-da emidio meree keeke aibo-ka. Aamiꞌai-ro aamiꞌai iduuꞌai-ka, ‘Rimo geꞌii raahoaꞌei iabotuti-da, riꞌo hete omaumo bia! Rimo idebi raahoaꞌei iabotuti-da, riꞌo idebi aꞌaimo bia!’
7.33: Uubi obo imaaheemo dubui Ioare tauo pooꞌu, ruu imaꞌui iemidio kamia mire obo idio bia. Kaida riꞌo-ro paaꞌoumo, ‘Ruu memiho urio rautu-ka!’
7.34: Uubihaubi mereei tauo pooꞌu, ka ruu iiho kamia idio, ka riꞌo-ro paaꞌoumo, ‘Ara dubui ma eaꞌaumo, iiho-toto hiꞌa dubu-ka, kamia mire obo idio hiꞌa meree-ka. Ruu taketi imoamee uubi-re kamia memiho uubi-rei rautu, riaraamu-ka.’
7.35: Irai Iehoma umooi ieidaimo uubi-ro, ihahai imoaꞌeemiai aꞌai kaumo, rii oroiꞌio emerai-da.” Iesu Pariseia dubui, Simora, motoi-da
7.36: Pariseia dubui Simora-ro Iesu amaꞌuei-ka, ruu motoi-da du ma iihoumoi-ri. Ka Iesu odai-ka ruu motoi eito. Ka aiha pemiꞌeitutimo, iihoi.
7.37: Aaꞌo goꞌotoi-da memiho oroiꞌio oobo ata, ai-pemidio. Ruu-ro ai-poroomai Iesu Pariseia dubui motoi-da dui iihoi, kiauka ruu-ro ribo mea herei, gaigarua keehi rautu, ruu oomodai-ka.
7.38: Iesu taitai haato potoꞌa otoi reꞌei-da, idebi imaꞌai-die idebi huoi-da otooti imimoruꞌo. Kiauka ruu epuui muhoi-da otoi iaditi-ka, otooti ihomeai-ka, ka ribo mea herei-da otoi imadouti-ka.
7.39: Ida Iesu ioꞌopai dubui-ro himia poromoaduꞌo, “Ara dubui ihaha Iehoma himogabo dubui ata-ro ooꞌaato, ruu umoo mei ooꞌa-ka ara ruuato ateai ooboi memiho oroiꞌio oobo-ka.”
7.40: Kiauka Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Simora, moo made keehi ata ararie rooi-do.” Simora-ro omoaimai-ka, “Ie, imatomudio dubu-o, romoaduꞌo.”
7.41: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Retoꞌa dubuoti, dubu atai-do abitore mori-ri paaꞌoido, atai K500, atai K50.
7.42: Aaꞌo dubuoti-ro, mori omoaimai modobo tiatoi-ri, abitorei ai-pimahurai. Aaꞌo dubu oti-da, rii abitorei imahurai dubui, ihaha boꞌu-ro rio emaꞌai maꞌai?”
7.43: Simora-ro omoaimai-ka, “Moo iraromoi-da abitorei geema-ha ioahurai mereei-ro rio emaꞌai aꞌai.” Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Roo iaha aaꞌo.”
7.44: Ruu-ro aaꞌo ooboi eemeteai-ka, ida paaꞌo Simorai-do, “Ara ooboi roo-ro ameaꞌa? Moo roo motoi irodoroi-da, moo otoi imoruꞌo obo emaꞌai bia. Irai ruu idebi huoi-da rimoruꞌo maaka, ka ruu epuui muhoi-da riaditi toatoa-ha.
7.45: Moo, roo motoi irodoroi-da, roo-ro moo ohomeai bia, irai ara ooboi-ro, moo ototi ihomei emahurai bia, moo irooꞌui-da imomahoroi-ka, imooꞌu doꞌou.
7.46: Roo-ro moo epuui here ohiꞌauti bia. Irai ruu-ro moo ototi riboi mea hiꞌa herei-da rihiꞌauti.
7.47: Moo-ro, roo ai-roduuꞌai, ara ooboi, hiiro memiho tauo remapihiti maaka. Aaꞌo rauri, ruu geema giiꞌepu oahuꞌomai, mooi-do. Irai boꞌu remapihiti keehibuo memiho, ruu keehibuo giiꞌepu oahuꞌomai aꞌai.”
7.48: Kiauka, Iesu-ro aaꞌo ooboi oduuꞌai-ka, “Roo memihoi tauo remapihiti maaka.”
7.49: Ruu rautu gaaꞌu-ha iihoumo uubi himia-ro aratohetai-ka, “Ara boꞌu-rie, uubi memihoi ma imapihiti?”
7.50: Ida Iesu-ro aaꞌo ooboi oduuꞌai-ka, “Roo himia pupuo iraromoi-ro, roo mea tauo ododiai maaka. Miroi-da odau.”

8.1: Aamiꞌa himioi didimoi-da, Iesu odai-ka goꞌoto goꞌotoi, pai meai madei Aiai Iehoma pai emidio erarai, imoaduꞌuti-ha. Ruu iobodoumo tuero (12) mereei rautu,
8.2: ka aamiꞌa upibaiꞌoi, ruu-ro memiho urioi imobodidio, kamia gimoi-da idomoiatidioi rautu gaaꞌu-ha. Maria, paira atai Magadara, ruu reꞌei-da semeri (7) memiho urio pomobodidio,
8.3: Ioara, Heroda raarai iemeaꞌa dubui Kuda, ooboi-ka, Tusara, aamiꞌa upibaiꞌoi rautu ai-poromoabaimo, rii himia raarai-da, Iesu iimatomudio mereei ma imoabaimoi-ri. Raa mate hurai iiodouti dubui (Matiu 13:1-9; Maka 4:1-9)
8.4: Goꞌoto goꞌotoi-da, iorohoumo uubi aiha pororuꞌudio, ka turiaha ioodabuaimoi-da, Iesu-ro ara obeegiri imoaduꞌoi-ka.
8.5: “Dubu ata, raa mate hurai pipeduo, aamiꞌai oto gaboi-da pirahioumo, ka uubi-ro iatuꞌuti-ka, momoꞌoi iooꞌumoi-da aiha piihoumo.
8.6: Aamiꞌai roꞌoa-roꞌoa hepui-da pirahioumo, iiꞌimo irai, pahai ai-pirademeumo, obo tiatoi-ri, ka aiha poroihiimo.
8.7: Aamiꞌai oroꞌoro tamitami tuiai-da pirahioumo, iiꞌimo irai tamitami-ro ai-piaatioumo, ka aiha poroihimo.
8.8: Aamiꞌa hurai mea hepui-da pirahioumo, iiꞌimoi-da mea hiꞌa, iha paꞌaimo, patu gaaꞌu-gaaꞌui-da ai-pimeꞌaumo haridere (100) gaaꞌu aibo.” Aaꞌo madei iaaꞌo didimoi, Iesu-ro geema madei-to aaꞌoi-ka, “Roo iroomidio hepato rautu-ra, ka oroomidio.” Obeegiri oroaduꞌuti mabui (Matiu 13:10-17; Maka 4:10-12)
8.9: Ruu himia iimatomudio uubi-ro aiha patohetaimo, aaꞌoi-ka araibau, “Ara obeegiri raꞌu moroaduꞌo?”
8.10: Ka ruu-ro rii madei imoaimai-ka, “Piro-piro madei, Iehoma pai emidio erarai, tauo imaꞌai maaka, riꞌoi-do. Irai aamiꞌai eito, obeegiri-to rimoaduꞌuti, mabu rii-ro meaꞌa duumo, irai eaꞌai aꞌai bia, moromidio duumo, irai umoo iiꞌi aꞌai bia. Iesu-ro obeegiri oaꞌeemiai-ka (Matiu 13:18-23; Maka 4:13-20)
8.11: “Ararie obeegiri oaꞌeemiai, raa matei Iehoma madei-ka.
8.12: Raa matei oroaꞌoia oto gaboi-da irahioumoi, araibau-ka, madei imoromidio duumo uubi-ro, irai Satari ooꞌui-ka madei omodadeai, rii kaukai-da, rii-ro madei ihahai eidai mooꞌai-ri, kamia rii oroiꞌioi eidai toe.
8.13: Raa matei roꞌoa-roꞌoa hepui-da irahioumoi araibau-ka: madei imoromidio duumo uubi-ro, geꞌii rautu, irai, madei kaukai goroi eito hipi odai bia. Rii-ro keehibuo iraromoi-ka, irai erematuhuti ooꞌui-da, rii irahioi-ka.
8.14: Oroꞌoro buꞌi-da iiraahioumoi, madei oromidioumoi-ka. Irai ipi-da, araibau raara-ro imomurudioi-ka: oroiꞌioi iraromo pauo, iiho-toto oroiꞌio, kamia hepui geꞌii. Ka rii aahuu iiꞌi modobo bia, mabu rii ai-piaatioumo oroꞌoro tami-ro aaꞌo rauri rii kaurau orobiꞌo ruꞌa hura aibo-ka.
8.15: Raa mate hurai, mea hepui-da irahioumoi, araibau aaꞌo, madei rii-ro imoromidio duumo, ka mea eremaabei kaukai-da, aahuu ioohidioi-ka, raa matei iiꞌi-da, meamea hura-ro ma iohui emerai. Ramepai ipuai goroi-da (Maka 4:21-25)
8.16: “Meree ata-ro, ramepai adiai-da ipuai-da atimai aꞌai bia, kamia edeꞌai aꞌai bia totoi goroi-da. Abia, ka aiha edeꞌa, ramepai himia totoi hoꞌui-da. Ka motoi eito iido uubi-ro, ramepai hehei eaꞌai aꞌai kaumo.
8.17: “Piro-piro raꞌu-ro mopiꞌomatidio, hehei-ro obodi aꞌai hauꞌi eito. Ka raꞌu momurudio, ruu memeeꞌa duumo, kamia momooꞌu duumo hehei eito.
8.18: “Roo-ro ara madei mea hiꞌa-ha ma oromidioi, mabu roo reꞌei-da raꞌu-ro mooꞌa, ruu hoꞌui-da, roo emaaꞌoai aꞌai. Kamia boꞌu meree reꞌe ato-ra tuahai, ruu reꞌei-da ooꞌa keehibuoi rautu turiaha omoahurai aꞌai.” Iesu riamiꞌoi maamui rautu (Matiu 12:46-50; Maka 3:31-35)
8.19: Iesu riamiꞌoi maamui rautu ai-podaumo ruui-do, ruu rautu ma odabuaimoi-ri, irai modobo bia, mabu uubi hiiro-ka.
8.20: Ata meree-ro aaꞌoi-ka Iesui-do, “Roo riamiꞌoi maamui rautu, raamomoti duumo kekai-da, rii rio-ka, roo ma emeeꞌaumo.”
8.21: Rii turiahai-do Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Aiai Iehoma madei, boꞌu-ro moromidio, kamia, ruu rioi boꞌu-ro mododiai, moo maamu-ra riamiꞌo-raika.” Iesu-ro tuomoi iemadohomai-ka (Matiu 8:23-27; Maka 4:35-41)
8.22: Ata himioi, Iesu oroi-ka peei-da, ruu himia iimatomudio uubi iduuꞌai-ka, “Ma raabumo damoi hapuoi eito.” Ka aiha pahiꞌiaimo aabui.
8.23: Iaabumoi-da, Iesu uro utaꞌai-ka. Tutuu bia tuomoi omumuai-ka tuiai-da, oboi araatei omahoroi-ka peei-da. Kiauka, rii oroihi modobo haato pideꞌa.
8.24: Ruu iimatomudio uubi odai-ka Iesu oitorai, ida paaꞌoumo, “Paidubu-o, Paidubu-o! Rimo aiha oroihi raꞌai kaumo!” Iesu eibuai-ka, tuomo-ra aubo-rai erara made imaꞌai-ka, kiauka tuomo-ra aubo-rai aadohuti-ka, piroha iiꞌi-ka.
8.25: Kiauka ruu-ro rii turiaha iduuꞌai-ka, “Heiꞌe-rie, riꞌo pupuo iraromoi?” Ka rii turiaha urio podaudioumo, ka toei hohoi-ha peremeeꞌaumo, ka hiei-da rii himia aratohei-ka, “Ara dubui boꞌu-rie? Tuomo-ra aubo-rairo, ruu madei-ha oroomai kaumo!” Memiho urio rautu dubui iodomoiai-ka (Matiu 8:28-34; Maka 5:1-20)
8.26: Iesu iimatomudio uubi rautu iaabumoi-da, arioi-ka, Gerasaato, Garereia damoi hapuoi-da.
8.27: Iesu iaramotoi-da memiho urio rautu dubui-ro emeeꞌai-ka, ruu aaꞌo mati-da dubu-ka. Tutuu hiꞌa poroaꞌoiadio hipura tiato-ha, kamia motoi-da emidioi modobo bia, oroihi uubi iruꞌumodioumo roꞌoa uuꞌui-da pemidiodio.
8.28: Ruu-ro Iesu iemeeꞌai-da, made geema aapoꞌiai-ka, Iesu otoi reꞌei-da irahiai-ka, ida paaꞌo geega madei-to, “Iesu, ohu hiꞌai Aiai meree! Roo raꞌu rio maꞌai mooato? Moo ai-roroaro rooi-do, moo ata riibo emaꞌaiꞌa!”
8.29: Ruu aaꞌo emerau paaꞌo, mabu Iesu-ro memiho urioi tauo piduuꞌai ruuato ma odadeaimoi-ri. Hiiro himio-ka, ruu memiho urioi-ro oaꞌoiai, uubi-ro emaꞌoidioi-ka, oto-ra tu-rai otohiti-ka aahuu hiꞌa imi-da. Irai iahiuti-ka, ka memiho urioi-ro omodai-ka opuhe mati eito.
8.30: Iesu-ro atohetai-ka ruu, “Roo pairai boꞌu-rie?” Ruu-ro omoaimai-ka, “Moo pairai-ka, ‘Hiiro’,” mabu hiiro memiho urio-ro pemidioumo ruuato.
8.31: Memiho urioi-ro, Iesui-do oroaroi-ka, rii giimui-to iitiodoaiꞌa.
8.32: Aaꞌo reꞌeu-da boomo paꞌa geemai goꞌu paꞌaimo, roꞌoai tamai-da. Ka memiho urioi-ro oroarotiaimoi-ka, Iesui-ro, rii erara ma imaꞌai boomo paꞌai haito ma odaumoi-ri, kiauka Iesu-ro madei imaꞌai-ka.
8.33: Aaꞌo dubui-da, rii ihuꞌodidioumoi-da, boomoi haato pimamiaꞌaiimo, ka turiaha aaꞌo boomo paꞌai, dodoroi iromodoimoi-da, aiha paaꞌumutimo.
8.34: Boomoi dabi uubi-ro ieaꞌaumoi-da, rii hioi-to podaumo goꞌotoi-re kamia geemaꞌeema paꞌeai-rei, iemidioumo uubi imoaduꞌuti.
8.35: Uubi odai-ka, ioobodi raai emeeꞌai. Rii iooꞌumoi-da Iesu emeeꞌai-ka, memiho urioi-ro iemeheaimo dubui, ruu oto reꞌei-da pemidio hipurai rautu, kamia mea hiꞌa iraromo moꞌui rautu. Ka rii toe peereaꞌaumo.
8.36: Idomai-da ieaꞌaumo uubi-ro pimoaduꞌutimo, aamiꞌai, aaꞌo dubui ioodomoia emerai.
8.37: Ka turiaha Gerasa hepu geemai uubi-ro Iesu oarotiai-ka, ruu-ro rii ma imeheai-ri. Mabu rii toe hiꞌa paꞌaimo. Kiauka Iesu peei-da aiha poroo imaahiꞌiai.
8.38: Memiho urioi-ro, iemeheaimo dubui-ro Iesu atohetai-ka, “Moo ai-rooꞌu, roo rautu.” Irai Iesu-ro aiha potiodoai, oduuꞌai-ka,
8.39: “Araimai, goꞌotoi eito, imoaduꞌuti, Iehoma-ro, rooi-do imododiai raai.” Ka ruu araimai-ka goꞌotoi, uubi imoaduꞌuti, Iesu-ro ruu iomododiai emerai. Iairusi meree behei-re, ka ora gimo rautu ooboi-re (Matiu 9:18-26; Maka 5:21-43)
8.40: Ka Iesu iaraimai-da damoi hapuoi eito, uubi-ro geꞌii rautu poꞌopaimo, mabu rii ruu-ha pomotiimo.
8.41: Ida pooꞌu idabu motoi epuuhoro dubui Iairusi, Iesu emaabei-ri ihimai-ka, Iesu oto reꞌei-da, Iesui-do pupuoi-to oroaroi-ka ma odaidoi-ri, ruu motoi eito.
8.42: Mabu ruu meree behei gaaꞌubuo hiꞌa-ka, burioi tuero-ka (12), iihiai tooto paꞌai. Iesu hiei eito iodai-da, uubi tuia-tuiai-ha pimadaꞌui.
8.43: Rii tuiai-da tuero (12) burioi-to, ora gimo piꞌatidio oobou rautu-ka. Ruu turiaha iiꞌapudioi, tauo-ha pipoiꞌo, ruu ma odomoiamoi-ri uubi imaꞌati-da, irai ruu meree ata-ro ma odomoiai modobo bia.
8.44: Ka ruu iooꞌui-da, Iesu rautu iodaumo uubi iiꞌi-da, aiha porooꞌopai. Ka Iesu hipurai keehibuo iaihimodi-da, ruu iꞌatidio ora gimoi-ro aiha pemeheai, gaaꞌu hiꞌa-ha.
8.45: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “O, moo boꞌu-ro rahimodi?” Rii turiaha ai-paratuhutimo. Petero-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Epuudubu-o, roo rautu rimo hiiro uubi-ro rimadaꞌui kaumo, uubi roo rautu tamai imaraihimo duumo.”
8.46: Ida Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Ie, moo meree ata-ro raihimodi, moo himia-ro umoo tauo riiꞌi maaka, moo erarai aamiꞌai-ro, emeheai-da.”
8.47: Aaꞌo ooboi umoo iiꞌi-ka, ruu tauo poibomai. Ka ruu aamohoꞌoo-ha pooꞌu, emaabei-ri ihimai-ka, Iesu hoho reꞌei-da. Turiaha uubi hohoi-da, Iesu omoaduꞌoi-ka, ruu-ro Iesu iaihimodi mabui, ka ruu gimoi gaaꞌu hiꞌa-ha ioroopoiꞌoi.
8.48: Iesu-ro aaꞌo ooboi eito aaꞌo-ka, “Moo meree-behe, roo pupuo iraromoi-ro, roo mea tauo ododiai maaka, miroi-da odau.”
8.49: Iesu aaꞌo madei ioroaduꞌuti-da, himoꞌa meree ata ooꞌui-ka, Iairusi motoi-da, “Roo meree-behei tauo iihiai maaka, imatomudio dubui aiha oomaimutiꞌa.”
8.50: Ka Iesu-ro, oroomai-ka. Ida paaꞌo, Iairusi-do, “Toe aꞌaiꞌa, roo iraromoi pupuo-ha ooꞌa. Ka ruu oodomoiaiꞌai.”
8.51: Iesu, Iairusi motoi-da iereedeeꞌai-da, ruu-ro uubi aamiꞌa iꞌopai bia, ruu rautu ma iidoumoi-ri, ii Petero, Ioare, Iemisi, kamia meree-behei maamu-ra abea-rai haa-ro piidoumo.
8.52: Turiaha uubi giiꞌepu idebi paꞌaimo, meree-behei eito, ida paaꞌo Iesu-ro, “Idebi aꞌaimoꞌa, mereei iihiai bia, irai ruu uro orobu.”
8.53: Rii-ro ruu mari pemaꞌaimo, mabu rii umoo-ka, mereei rituo-ka.
8.54: Irai Iesu-ro, ruu tui-da oꞌapuai-ka, ida pupuoi-to paaꞌo, “Moo meree, eibua.”
8.55: Ruu oroiꞌioi araimai-ka. Kiauka, ruu gaaꞌu hiꞌa-ha peibua, ida Iesu-ro iduuꞌai-ka, uuho raa ata ma emaꞌaimoi-ri.
8.56: Abea-ra maamu-rai urio podaudioido, ida Iesu-ro iduuꞌai-ka, meree ata omoaduꞌoumoꞌai-ri, raꞌu-ro oobodii.

9.1: Iesu-ro, ruu tuero (12) iimatomudio mereei, iahoꞌootiai-ka, gaaꞌu-ha, erarai ma imaꞌai-ri. Memiho urioi ma ibodidioumoi-ri, kamia gimoi ma idomoumoi-ri.
9.2: Ida rii itiodoai-ka, Aiai Iehoma pai emidio erarai ma imoaduꞌutimoi-ri, kamia gimoi ma idomoumoi-ri.
9.3: Ka ruu-ro rii iduuꞌai-ka, “Tu hai-to odaumo, garaꞌu bia, ipi haaꞌo bia, du bia, mori bia, kamia teti ata bia.
9.4: Riꞌo raati-da miꞌopai duumo, geꞌii rautu aaꞌo motoi haato ma emidioi, modau-die, riꞌo-ro aaꞌo goꞌotoi memeheai duumo.
9.5: Riꞌo uubi-ro, geꞌii rautu iꞌopai tiato-ra, ire goꞌotoi ita emeheaimo, ka otoi tuoꞌoi ita imamahuruutiimo. Ka riꞌo-ro, rii iraromo imaꞌai aꞌai kaumo.”
9.6: Ruu iimatomudio mereei emeheaimoi-ka, turiaha goꞌotoi pai meai imoaduꞌuti-ri, kamia uubi ma idomoiatidioumoi-ri, turiaha mati-da. Heroda iiraromo pauoi-ka (Matiu 14:1-12; Maka 6:14-29)
9.7: Aaꞌo himioi Garereia paidubui-ka Heroda, ruu-ro ai-piroomidio, turiaha raarai iorododiaimoi. Ka ruu pauo hiꞌa piraromo, mabu aamiꞌa uubi-ro iaaꞌoumoi, Ioare oboi-da imaaheemo dubui, ata paraimai oroiꞌioi eito.
9.8: Aamiꞌai-ro ai-paaꞌoumo, Eria-ro poobodii, kamia aamiꞌai-ro ai-paaꞌoumo, tauo hiꞌai himogabo dubui ata-ro paraimai oroiꞌioi eito.
9.9: Heroda-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Ioare epuui moo-ro pirahiai, irai moo iroomidio raarai, aꞌai dubui boꞌu-rie?” Ka ruu-ro ai-pemahibaituti, Iesu ma emeeꞌai-ri. Iesu-ro paipi tauseri (5,000) uubi iiomotoi-ka (Matiu 14:13-21; Maka 6:30-44; Ioare 6:1-14)
9.10: Iesu iiapui made himoꞌa uubi iiraimaimoi-da, ruu omoaduꞌuti-ka, turiaha rii iaꞌaimo raarai. Ruu-ro, rii himia hiꞌa beha-ha iꞌopai-ka odai, goꞌoto atai-to, pairai Besaida.
9.11: Uubi geemai-ro aaꞌo pai ioroomaimoi-da, Iesu obodoumoi-ka. Ruu-ro, geꞌii rautu piꞌopai imoaduꞌuti, Aiai Iehoma pai emidio erarai ooꞌaa emerai, kamia ruu-ro idomoiatidioi-ri, rio iaꞌaimo uubi ai-pidomoiatidio.
9.12: Himioi ooꞌuoi iomahoroi-da, Iesu iimatomudio tuero (12) uubi ooꞌumoi-ka Iesui-do, ida poduuꞌaimo, “Uubi itiodoai ma odaumo, ara taitai goꞌoto-ra paꞌea-rai eito, iihoi-re irobu mati-re ma ioohoumo, mabu ara hiou opuhe mati-ka.”
9.13: Irai Iesu-ro rii-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Riꞌo himia-ro, iomotoumo uubi.” Rii-ro omoaimai-ka, “Turiaha rimo reꞌei-da iiꞌai, tu-hapuo (5) parama ipi beha-ka, retoꞌa raai-re. Roo rio-ra rimo-ro ma rodaumo ara uubi hiiroi du imemei?”
9.14: (Aaꞌo reꞌei-da paipi tauseri (5,000) aibo-ka, dububaiꞌo behai.) Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ruu iimatomudio mereei eito, “Uubi idomoiatidioumo, pipiti (50) aibo, paꞌa gaaꞌu-gaaꞌui-da, ma emiꞌeitutiimo.”
9.15: Iesu iaaꞌo emerai, ruu iimatomudio mereei-ro iododiaimo didimoi,
9.16: Iesu-ro, tu-hapuo (5) parama ipi, raati rautu iimidai-da, imaromiai-ka aromoi eito. Aaꞌo raarai-ri, Aiai Iehomai-do geꞌii made aaꞌoi-ka, aiha pihebuti imaꞌai-ka, ruu iobodoumo mereei eito, uubi ma imaꞌatiimoi-ri.
9.17: Rii iihoumo kaupaꞌe hiꞌa. Ka Iesu iobodoumo uubi-ro, ioromoameheaimo riaꞌei, iidabuaimoi-da, tuero (12) rehai pidodiaimo. Uubi aaꞌoi-da, moo boꞌu-rie? (Matiu 16:13-19; Maka 8:27-29)
9.18: Ata himioi Iesu ai-pirudemea himia gaaꞌu-ha, ida pooꞌumo ruu iimatomudio mereei, ruui-do. Ruu-ro rii iatohetai-ka, “Uubi aaꞌoi-da, moo boꞌu-rie?”
9.19: Rii-ro omoaimai-ka, “Aamiꞌai-ro ai-aaꞌo kaumo, roo Ioare-ka, uubi oboi-da, imaaheemo dubui-ka, aamiꞌai aaꞌoi Eria, kamia aamiꞌai aaꞌoi roo tauoi himogabo dubui ata-ro paraimai oroiꞌioi eito.”
9.20: Ruu-ro rii iatohetai-ka, “Riꞌo mia? Riꞌo aaꞌoi-da, moo boꞌu-rie?” Petero-ro omoaimai-ka, “Roo Iehoma-ro iapui Paidubui-ka.” Iesu himia temeteme-ra iihiai-rai ioaduꞌoi-ka (Matiu 16:20-28; Maka 8:30—9:1)
9.21: Ka Iesu-ro erehe hiꞌa ereemaabe made imaꞌai-ka, ara raai meree ata omoaduꞌoumoꞌai-ri.
9.22: Ka ruu-ro rii iduuꞌai-ka, “Uubihaubi mereei, memiho hiꞌa temeteme eidai aꞌai. Maraibo duumo, epuu otii uubi-ro, Iehoma poue emaꞌatidio uubi epuu uubi-re, kamia bubui imatomudio uubi-re. Ruu iihiai-da edeꞌai aꞌai kaumo. Irai didimoi-to, retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) himioi-da, ruu oitorai aꞌai oroiꞌioi eito.”
9.23: Ka ruu-ro, rii turiahai-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Meree ata-ro, rio amaꞌai moo obodoi, ruu himia dodo ma ororiiꞌii, satauroi ma aaꞌotai, ka moo ma robodoi turiaha himioi.
9.24: Roo boꞌu-ro miraromo, roo himia oroiꞌioi araahoꞌoi, ka aatoai aꞌai, irai boꞌu oroiꞌioi maatoai moo-ri, ruu oroiꞌioi arahoꞌoi aꞌai.
9.25: Raꞌaibou mea-ro ooꞌai maꞌai, meree ata-ro hepu geegai ma eidai, kaida, ruu himia oroiꞌioi ma aatoai? Aaꞌa, mea bia!
9.26: Uubi-ro moo hiipo aremaꞌai duumo, kamia moo imatomudioi-re, ka rii Uubihaubi mereei-ro, aaꞌo emerai hiipo imaꞌai aꞌai, ruu himia tomioi-re, Abeai tomioi-re, kamia dubuae arerui tomioi-rei, rautu ooꞌui aꞌai-da.
9.27: Riꞌo moo-ro iaha hiꞌai riduuꞌai, riꞌo aamiꞌai araarie, oroihi aꞌai bia modau-die, Aiai Iehoma pai emidio erarai, memeeꞌa duumo.” Iesu tuupi ioroaꞌoomoi-ka (Matiu 17:1-8; Maka 9:2-8)
9.28: Ara madei iaaꞌoi-da, eiti (8) himio aibo, tauo poroohodi, Iesu-ro Petero, Ioare, kamia Iemisi iꞌopai-ka, iioi roꞌoai hoꞌui eito irudemeai.
9.29: Ruu irudemeai-da, hohoi ata aibo poroaꞌoomo, ka ruu hipurai rautu bereberei hehei aibo-ro pioohiai.
9.30: Aaꞌo ipi haato, retoꞌa dubuoti iobodidoi-ka, ruu rautu poroaduꞌutido, riiti Mose-ra, Eria-raika.
9.31: Aromoi tomioi rautu piobodiido, Iesu Ierusaremaato iihiai aꞌai emerai poroaduꞌutibiimo, Aiai Iehoma madei modoboi.
9.32: Petero aamiꞌai rautu uro hiꞌai pirobu, irai rii idomai iiaamodiimoi-da, ruu emeeꞌai-ka, tomioi rautu, retoꞌa dubuoti rautu potii.
9.33: Aaꞌo dubuoti-ro, Iesu iemeheaidoi haato, Petero-ro aaꞌoi-ka, Iesui-do, “Epuudubu-o, raꞌu meai-ra rimoibi araa-rie! Rimoibi-ro, retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) moto epuu imoamodoi raꞌai kaumo, roo himia, Mose himia, ka Eria himia.” (Ruu ihaha umoo bia ruu raꞌu aaꞌo).
9.34: Ruu ioroaduꞌuti-da dumo kopi aiha poobodi, duꞌi-ro rii iatimai-ka, ruu iimatomudio mereei iha toei paꞌaimo dumoi-ro rii iiatimai-da.
9.35: Kiauka made ata dumoi goroi-da aaꞌoi-ka, “Ara moo meree-ohioi-ka, ruu moo-ro ai-pirapui, ruui-do oromidioumo.”
9.36: Madei ioropoiꞌo didimoi-da, Iesu aaꞌo dubuoti-ro emeheai-ka. Irai aaꞌo himioi, Iesu iimatomudio mereei-ro, iaꞌaumo raarai aiha piohiidioumo, meree ata omoaduꞌuti bia. Iesu-ro memiho urio rautu meree-ohioi iiodomoiai-ka (Matiu 17:14-18; Maka 9:14-27)
9.37: Himio atai-da, Iesu rautu retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) iimatomudio uubi, roꞌoai-da piooꞌumo, ida uubi paꞌa geema-ro imeeꞌai-ka.
9.38: Ida aaꞌo uubi tuiai-da, dubu ata-ro, geema madei-to paaꞌo, “Epuudubu-o! Roo moo-ro ai-roarotiai, moo meree-ohioi, gaaꞌu hiꞌa-ka, ma rememeeꞌai-ri.
9.39: Ruu memiho urioi-ro iimamiiai-da, made geega gaaꞌu aapoꞌiai-ka, eheuꞌatoi-ka hepui-da, iimoaimuti-ka, ka ipuugaahei iamootiai-ka. Ka memiho urioi-ro, ruu aaꞌo emerai omodoboadio, ka pauoi-to emeheai-ka.
9.40: Roo iimatomudio uubi tauo rimoarotiai maaka, irai rii-ro memiho urioi omobodiomai modobo bia.”
9.41: Iesu-ro omoaimai-ka, “Riꞌo moꞌui gamoꞌo hiꞌa tiato uubi-ka, Iehomai-do riꞌo pupuo iraromo kaukai, keeke hiꞌa-ka. Moo riꞌo rautu, raꞌaibou tutuu emidioi-ra? Moo haꞌima-ro tauo piroohiai, riꞌo pupuo iraromoi iiꞌimo bia.” Ruu-ro aaꞌo dubui eito aaꞌoi-ka, “Roo mereei omooꞌu, ara hiou eito.”
9.42: Meree-ohioi iomooꞌumoi-da, memiho urioi-ro, hepui-da eheuꞌatoi-ka, iimoaimutii oomahoroi-ka. Iesu-ro pupuo madei-to memiho urioi obodiomai-ka, ka meree-ohioi aiha poodomoia, ka abeai eito meree-ohioi omoaimai-ka.
9.43: Turiaha uubi urio podaudioumo, Aiai Iehoma erehe erarai ieaꞌaumoi-da. Iesu himia iihiai, ata iioaduꞌoi-ka (Matiu 17:22-23; Maka 9:30-32) Irai Iesu iaꞌai raarai uubi-ro geꞌii rautu, geema poomaabumo, kaida ruu himia iimatomudio mereei eito aaꞌoi-ka,
9.44: “Dodo iiꞌimoꞌa moo-ro riꞌo iduuꞌai aꞌai raai! Uubihaubi mereei imaꞌai aꞌai kaumo, uubi erarai eito.”
9.45: Irai iimatomudio uubi umoo bia ara madei ihahai iaaꞌo emerai, mabu madei rii moꞌui-da ai-pimoapiꞌoma, kamia rii toe paꞌaimo ruu atohetai aaꞌo raarai hapuoi. Boꞌu-rie geema hiꞌai? (Matiu 18:1-5; Maka 9:33-37)
9.46: Iimatomudio mereei himia eemaaꞌoi oomahoroi-ka, riiato, boꞌu-ro ooꞌai maꞌai geema hiꞌai.
9.47: Iesu umoo tauo-ha piiꞌi, rii moꞌui-da raꞌu iraromoumoi, ka ruu-ro, meree-keehi ata oꞌopai-ka, ruu taitai-da omotoboai-ka,
9.48: kaida aaꞌo-ka rii-do, “Ara meree-keehi boꞌu-ro moꞌopai, moo pairai-da, moo tauo roꞌopai maaka, kamia moo boꞌu-ro roꞌopai, moo irotiodoai mereei rautu tauo oꞌopai maaka. Mabu riꞌoato keehibuoi boꞌu-rie, ruu-ka geema hiꞌai.” Roo omoamoo tiatoi boꞌu-ra, ruu roo rautu-ka (Maka 9:38-40)
9.49: Ioare-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Paidubu-o, rimo-ro dubu ata reaꞌaa duumo, memiho urioi, roo pairai-da ibodiidio. Ka rimo-ro ruu ai-roduuꞌai duumo ma emahuurai-ri, mabu ruu rimo paꞌai-da bia.”
9.50: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka ruui-do, kamia aamiꞌa iimatomudio mereei rautu, “Riꞌo-ro ruu emadohomaimoꞌa, mabu roo omoamoo tiatoi boꞌu-ra, ruu roo rautu-ka.” Samaria goꞌotoi-ro Iesu iaraiboi-ka
9.51: Iesu aromoi eito omio himioi taitai-ro ioohiai-da, ruu iraromo peidai, ka odai omahoroi-ka Ierusaremai-to.
9.52: Ka ruu-ro made himoꞌa uubi epuui-da itiodoai-ka, Samaria goꞌoto atai-to, ruu raara ma emaumodiimoi-ri.
9.53: Irai aaꞌo goꞌotoi uubi-ro, ruu oꞌopaimo bia, mabu rii umoo-ka, ruu didimoi-to Ierusaremai-to odai aꞌai.
9.54: Ruu iimatomudio uubi-da, Iemisi-ra Ioare-rairo aaꞌo raai ieaꞌaidoi-da, rii-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Paidubu-o, roo rio-ra rimo-ro erai ma rahoꞌoumo aromoi-da, ma ooruoi, rii ma iruuroi?”
9.55: Iesu-ro riiti iimeteai-ka, erehe madei-to imaaꞌo mamai-ka.
9.56: Kiauka Iesu iimatomudio mereei rautu, aiha podaumo goꞌoto atai-to. Iesu obodoi iraromo uubi (Matiu 8:19-22)
9.57: Rii gaboi iimadaꞌuimo himioi haato, dubu ata-ro Iesui-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Roo raati odai maꞌai, moo-ro roo obodoi-ha raꞌai.”
9.58: Iesu-ro ruui-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Buꞌi umui medee uuꞌu rautu-ka. Kamia momoꞌoi toto rautu-ka, irai Uubihaubi mereei hora utaꞌa mati tiato-ka.”
9.59: Ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, dubu atai eito, “Moo robodoo.” Irai aaꞌo dubui-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Paidubu-o, epuui tauo, moo abeai uuꞌumai raaraimai.”
9.60: Iesu-ro omoaimai-ka, “Oroihi rii himia rituoi-ha ma oruuꞌumoi. Roo-mia odau Aiai Iehoma pai emidio erarai imoaduꞌuti.”
9.61: Meree ata-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Moo-ro roo obodoi raꞌai, irai tauo moo ai-raraimai, moo riaraamui giiꞌepu-umoo made imaꞌai.”
9.62: Iesu-ro, ruui-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Meree ata-ro, hepui auhioi oomahoroi-da, ruu aia mereemeteuti didimoi eito, ruu modobo bia, Aiai Iehoma pai erarai goroi-da emidioi.”

10.1: Aaꞌo didimoi-da Paidubui-ro iapui-ka, ata semeriti-tui (72), itiotuti-ka retoꞌa (2), retoꞌa (2), ruu epuui-da ma odaumoi-ri, ruu odai iieremaumodi mati-mati modobo.
10.2: Ruu-ro rii-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Paꞌeai raarai iiho modobo tauo poohiai, irai iaꞌuubo uubi retoꞌati-ka, paꞌeai raarai ihai ma idabuaimo. Ma irudemeai paꞌeai rautu mereei eito, ka ruu-ro iaꞌuubo uubi ma itiodoai.
10.3: Odaumo! Riꞌo moo-ro ai-ritiodoai mamoe paha-paha aibo, buꞌi umui tuiai eito.
10.4: Mori ioidio haaꞌo, ipi haaꞌo, kamia oto tamai rautu, riꞌo-ro iꞌapudioumoꞌa. Gaboi ipi-da meree ata rautu tutuu-ha oroaduꞌuti bia.
10.5: Riꞌo odai-da raati moto modoro, epuui aiha ma aaꞌoi, ‘Miroi ooꞌa, ara motoi-da.’
10.6: Miroi umoo meree-ra, riꞌo miroi ruu reꞌei-da ooꞌai aꞌai, ii miroi umoo tiato meree-ra, miroi ma oaimai riꞌo himiai-do.
10.7: Aaꞌo motoi-da ma emidioi, riꞌo raꞌu mimedeꞌa duumo ma iihoi, kamia ma idioi, mabu omaꞌati mereei taꞌii imidai aꞌai. Moto aamiꞌai-to oroaꞌoiai bia.
10.8: Riꞌo goꞌoto atai-to aia modau duumo, ida aia mioꞌopai duumo, riꞌo hoho reꞌei-da ideꞌa, dui ma iihoi.
10.9: Gimoi ma idomoiatidioi aaꞌo goꞌotoi-da, ka uubi ma iduuꞌai, ‘Aiai Iehoma pai emidio erarai riꞌo taitai-daka.’
10.10: Ka riꞌo goꞌoto atai-to aia midoo duumo, ida geꞌii rautu ioꞌopaimo tiato-ra, ma odai gaboi ipi eito, ida ma aaꞌoi,
10.11: ‘Riꞌo goꞌotoi tuoꞌoi, rimo otoi-da imaratemoi, ai-rorotobiiti kaumo, riꞌo himiai-do. Irai ita iraromoumo, Aiai Iehoma pai emidio erarai riꞌo taitai eito, tauo ooꞌu maaka.’
10.12: Moo-ro riꞌo iaha hiꞌai riduuꞌai, aumai iimaapo himioi-da, Aiai-ro Sodoma iemaꞌai riiboi keehibuo-ka, irai ire goꞌotoi, geega riibo omiiꞌai aꞌai. Iraromoi ireheꞌeai tiato goꞌoto-goꞌotoi (Matiu 11:20-24)
10.13: “Korasi goꞌotoi-o, memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, rooi-do! Besaida goꞌotoi-o, memihoi hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, rooi-do! Mabu riꞌo reꞌei-da, iaꞌaimo urio odaudio raarai, Taia-ra Sidoro-ra goꞌototi-da aꞌai ato, aaꞌo mati epuui uubi mei emiꞌeituti kaumo, idiꞌidi hipurai-da mei aatimo kaumo, tuoꞌoi-da, ida garadodoumo, mabu rii memihoi reꞌei-da tauo pireheꞌeaimo.
10.14: Irai Aiai-ro Taia-ra Sidoro-ra goꞌototi iimaꞌai riiboi keehibuo-ka, irai aumai iimaapoi aꞌai himioi-da, riꞌo omiiꞌai aꞌai riiboi geema-ka.
10.15: Kaperarauma goꞌotoi-o, roo himia oroomioi amaꞌai aromoi eito? Bia, roo omooruoi-ha aꞌai, giimui-to.”
10.16: Ka Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ruu iimatomudio mereei eito, “Riꞌo boiꞌo-ro miroomidio duumo, ka moo iroromidio duumo, kamia riꞌo boiꞌo-ro miraibo duumo, moo araiboi aꞌai kaumo, kamia moo boiꞌo-ro raraibo duumo, rii-ro moo irotiodoai abeai rautu araiboi aꞌai kaumo.” Iesu iitiodoai semeriti-tu (72) dububaiꞌoi iiraimaimoi-ka
10.17: Ka iitiodai, semeriti-tu (72), dububaiꞌoi iha geꞌii rautu piiraimaimo, rii-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Paidubu-o, rimo-ro memiho urioi, roo pairai-da, erehe irudemea made irimaꞌaimoi-da, rii-ro rimo aiha piriroomaimo.”
10.18: Iesu-ro rii iduuꞌai-ka, “Moo-ro, Satari aiha pireaꞌa aromoi-da, bereberei emerai piiraahiai.
10.19: Oromidioumo! Riꞌo erarai tauo pirimaꞌai, auo-ra, duukorope-rai hoꞌu-hoꞌui, ma oroaꞌoiaumoi-ri, kamia riꞌo Boho Mereei pupuoi ma omoapoiꞌoumoi-ri, ka ata raa-ro, riꞌo temeteme imaꞌai aꞌai bia.
10.20: Irai geꞌii aꞌaimoꞌa, memiho urioi-ro riꞌo madei iiromidio duumoi-ri, ii geꞌii-ha ma aꞌai, mabu riꞌo pairai tauo-ha, paraꞌatiimo aromoi-da.” Iesu geꞌii rautu Abeai iemarahuei-ka (Matiu 11:25-27; 13:16-17)
10.21: Aaꞌo himioi haato, Iesu Dubuae Urioi-ro iimamiai-da, ruu geega geꞌii paꞌai, ida paaꞌo, “Aba-o, aromo-ra hepu-rai, Paidubu-o! Moo-ro, roo ai-remarahue, mabu roo-ro tauo pimoahuꞌomai ara raarai, umoo tiatoi uubi eito, irai umooi-re moꞌui uubi-rei, reꞌei-da, ai-pimopiꞌoma ara raarai. Ie, Aba-o, roo iraromo meai modoboi-da, tauo oobodii maakaumo.
10.22: “Moo Abeai-ro raarai turiaha piremaꞌai. Meree ata umoo bia, meree-ohioi boꞌu-rie, Abea behai umoo-ka, kamia meree ata umoo bia, Abeai boꞌu-rie, meree-ohio behai umoo-ka. Ka mereei-ro rio aꞌai ruu abeai aamiꞌa uubi eito ma imoaꞌemiai, ka rii-ro umoo iiꞌi aꞌai kaumo ruu.”
10.23: Kiauka Iesu ereheꞌeai-ka, ruu iimatomudio meree behai imoaduꞌuti, “Riꞌo meaha tauo iiꞌi maakaumo, doꞌou orododiai raarai, ma iaꞌaamoi-ri.
10.24: Riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai, hiiro himogabo uubi-re, kamia Pai uubi-reiro, rio paꞌaimo, riꞌo iaꞌaa raarai ma iaꞌaumoi-ri, irai iaꞌaa bia, kamia riꞌo iromidioumo madei ma iromidioumo, irai iromidioumo bia.” Mea Samaria dubui
10.25: Bubui imatomudio dubui ata, rio-ka Iesu dii ma emedeeꞌai, ruu-ro atohetai-ka, “Imatomudio dubu-o, moo raꞌu aꞌai raꞌai tutuu oroiꞌioi ma reidai-ri?”
10.26: Iesu-ro ruu omoaimai-ka, “Iehoma made bukai-ro, raꞌaibou aaꞌo? Roo-ro oaꞌeemiai-da raꞌu moroaduꞌo?”
10.27: Aaꞌo dubui-ro omoaimai-ka, “Roo-ro Paidubui Iehoma, roo kaukai-re, roo urioi-re, roo pupuoi-re, roo iraromoi-re turiaha ma emaꞌai. Ka roo taitai mereei giiꞌepu ma emaꞌai, roo himia-ro giiꞌepu eremaꞌai aiboi.”
10.28: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Roo ihaha aaꞌo, ara raarai ita idodiai, roo oroiꞌioi aꞌai.”
10.29: Irai bubui imatomudio dubui rio-ka ruu himia iraromoi-da meai-to arahoꞌoi, ka Iesu atohetai-ka, “Moo taitai mereei boꞌu-rie?”
10.30: Iesu-ro odii ataato omoaimai-ka araibau, “Dubu ata ai-poodoi Ierusaremaato Ierikoi-to, ida piroi-ro poohiaimo, hipurai imomopimutimo, iaiꞌiiaumo aumo-aumoi aꞌai-da pemeeheaimo, rii odai.
10.31: Ka aaꞌo himioi Aiai poue iemaꞌatidioumo dubui ata gaaꞌu, gaboi poodoi, irai aaꞌo dubui iemeeꞌai-da, aiha pemahee hapuoi-ha poodoii.
10.32: Irudeme motoi-da imoabai dubu ata, gaaꞌu gaboi poodoi aatu emerai, aaꞌo dubui emeeꞌai-ka, ka aiha pemeeheai hapuoi-ha poohodii.
10.33: Irai Samaria dubu ata, hiei-ha pooꞌu, ida aaꞌo dubui-ha pemeeꞌa, ka ruu-ro iemeeꞌai-da, ruu kaukai-da iha giiꞌepui peereaꞌa.
10.34: Ruu-ro oomodai-ka, tamai ratoi iiꞌaa reꞌei mire obo-ra, here raai-da imimoruꞌo, umai itohiti-ka, aiha pomiꞌai ruu iomodau doriki-da aiha paaꞌoai, omodai-ka dima motoi-da aiha pedeꞌa, ka hiei-da peaꞌaamo.
10.35: Himio atai, retoꞌa (2) mori huraati iruutiai-ka, motoi ieaꞌaa dubui emaꞌai-ka, ida poduuꞌai, ‘Meaha ita eaꞌaa, roo raꞌu eheuꞌai maꞌai ruuato, moo-ro omoaimai raꞌai arahiou hoꞌui-da.’ ”
10.36: Kiauka Iesu-ro madei opoiꞌoi-ka, “Roo iraromoi-da, retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) uubi-da piroi-ro iaiꞌiiaumo dubui tama taitai aibo mereei boꞌu-rie?”
10.37: Bubui imatomudio dubui-ro aaꞌo-ka, “Ruu giiꞌepu iemaꞌai dubui-ka.” Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Ka roo odau, gaaꞌu emerai ita aꞌai.” Iesu-ro Mata-ra Maria-rai piaamiai
10.38: Ka Iesu, ruu iimatomudio mereei rautu iodaumo gaboi ipi-da, pemeeꞌaumo, goꞌoto ata. Hiei-da oobo ata paira-ka, Mata, ruu-ro Iesu geꞌii rautu poꞌopai ruu motoi eito.
10.39: Ruu ria meree-behei, pairai Maria, Paidubui hoho reꞌei haato peiꞌei, ka ruu imatomudio emerai-ha poroomidio.
10.40: Mata geꞌii aꞌai bia, turiaha omaꞌati ruu himia haa-ro ma omaꞌati, kaida iooꞌui-da paaꞌo, “Paidubu-o, roo-ro emaabei meaha-ra? Moo ria meree-behei-ro ai-remeheai maaka, turiaha omaꞌati moo himia haa-ro ma romaꞌati-ri. Ruu oduuꞌai ma ooꞌui, moo ma romoabai!”
10.41: Paidubui-ro, ruu madei pomoaimai, “Mata, Mata! Roo iraromoi pauo-ka, kamia auma-ka, roo iraromo raara hiiroi-da,
10.42: irai gaaꞌubuo geema hiꞌa raa rooi-do, roo-ro rio aꞌai. Maria ruu, mea hiꞌa raai rio iiꞌi maaka, ka omodadeai aꞌai bia ruu aaꞌo raai reꞌei-da.”

11.1: Ata himioi, Iesu ai-pirudemea mati ataato. Ka irudemeai ioropoiꞌoi-da, ruu iimatomudio mereei ata-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Paidubu-o, rimo irudemeai ma rimatomudio, Ioare, iimatomudio mereei, iimatomudio emerai.”
11.2: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka rii-do, “Irudemeai-da, araibau-ha ma irudemeai, Aba-o, Roo dubuae pairai ita emaabeumo; Roo pai emidio erarai mooꞌu-ka.
11.3: Rimo himio gaaꞌu-gaaꞌu modobo dui, rimaꞌati.
11.4: Rimo memihoi rimapihiti, mabu rimo-ro aamiꞌa uubi, rimoi-do aꞌai memihoi imapihiti-ka. Ka rimo imatuhuti raarai-da, ita rimomurudio.”
11.5: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ruu iimatomudio mereei eito; “Roo-ro ma iraromo, roo riaraamu rautu-ra, ida ruui-do ma odau duoi tuia hiꞌai, ida ma aaꞌo, ‘Riaraamu-o, moo retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) du kopiato romoabai.
11.6: Mabu moo riaraamu ata, auꞌo matiato ooꞌu maaka mooi-do, irai moo ata raa tiato-ka, ruu ma remaꞌai!’
11.7: Kaida, rioi mereei-ro, araibau amaaꞌo, ‘Moo pauo emaꞌaiꞌa! Birii tauo romoopai maaka, moo mereei rautu uro mati-daka. Moo eibuai modobo bia, roo ata raa ma romoabai.’
11.8: Irai moo-ro riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai, ruu eibuai aꞌai bia, ruu roo riaraamui-ri, roo ata raa ma emaꞌai, irai roo-ro ruu aia matohe ata-atai hiipo tiato-ha, ruu eibuai aꞌai, roo aaꞌo raarai turiaha emaꞌai aꞌai.
11.9: “Ka moo-ro riꞌoi-do ai-raaꞌo, ma atoheitai, ka riꞌo-ro eidai aꞌai kaumo, ma oohoi, ka riꞌo-ro emeeꞌai aꞌai kaumo, birii ma aamaꞌedei, ka birii araꞌerai aꞌai riꞌoi-do.
11.10: Mabu boiꞌo-ro matohe duumo, rii-ro eidai aꞌai kaumo, boiꞌo-ro moohoo duumo, rii-ro emeeꞌai aꞌai kaumo, kamia birii araꞌerai aꞌai, birii amaaꞌede uubi eito.
11.11: Riꞌo abeamiꞌoi eito modobo-ra, roo mereei auo ma emaꞌai, ruu raa-ri oroaroi-da? Bia, modobo bia!
11.12: Kamia duukoropei emaꞌai amaꞌai, ruu kokoro hurai-ri oroaroi-da? Bia, modobo bia!
11.13: Irai riꞌo memihobaiꞌo umoo-ka, riꞌo mereei meamea raara imaꞌati. Aromoi Abeai, geema hiꞌa rio aꞌai, Dubuae Urioi imaꞌati, ruui-do oroaro uubi eito.” Iesui-re Berisaburoi-re (Matiu 12:22-30; Maka 3:20-27)
