11.14: Iesu-ro memiho urioi iobodiomai-da, made oroaduꞌuti tiato dubui-da, memiho urioi aiha pohuuꞌodidio. Ka memiho urioi iohuuꞌodidioi-da, aaꞌo dubui oroaduꞌuti oomahoroi-ka. Ka turiaha uubi geemai, urio podaudioumo.
11.15: Irai aamiꞌa uubi-ro paaꞌoumo, “Berisaburo-ro emaꞌai Iesu erarai, memiho urioi ma ibodiidio-ri. Ka Berisaburo turiaha memiho urioi epuuhoroi-ka.”
11.16: Aamiꞌai, rii rio-ka Iesu ma emahibaimo, ka ruu atohetaimoi-ka, urio odaudio raa ata, ma obodii-ri. Ka rii umoo ma iiꞌimo, ruu erarai Iehoma reꞌei-da ooꞌu.
11.17: Irai Iesu, umoo iiꞌi-ka, rii iiraromoumoi. Ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka rii-do, “Hepu ata, ruu himia, aia moroaheuti rii himia heamo ma aꞌaimoi-ri, ara hepui tutuu ooꞌai aꞌai bia, gaaꞌu aibo-ka, dubu ata, motoi-da, meree Abea emidioi, aia goroaheuti, ara dubui motoi otii aꞌai bia.
11.18: Kamia Satari ruu himia paꞌai aia moroaheuti heamo ma aꞌaimoi-ri, ruu pai emidioi mati raꞌaibou ooꞌai maꞌai? Bia, modobo bia! Riꞌo-ro ai-aaꞌo kaumo, moo memiho urioi Berisaburo erarai-da riibodiidio.
11.19: Ha, moo Berisaburo erarai-da ariibodiidio, ka riꞌo iibodoumo uubi boꞌu erarai-da, iibodiidioumo memiho urioi? Rii Berisaburo erarai-da, ibodidioumo bia. Ka eaꞌai-da, riꞌo hobou aaꞌo kaumo!
11.20: Irai moo-ro, memiho urioi, Aiai Iehoma erarai-da ariibodiidio, ka Iehoma Pai emidio erarai, riꞌoi-do tauo ooꞌu maaka.
11.21: “Pupuo dubui, heamo raarai rautu, modobo-hara, ruu himia motoi-da, ruu raarai meaha iiꞌai aꞌai.
11.22: Irai pupuo hiꞌa dubui-ro, ruu aia moohiai, ida ruu pupuoi aia momoapoiꞌo, ka ruu iimomotii heamo raarai oaidai aꞌai turiaha, ka aamiꞌa uubi eito, imaꞌati aꞌai.
11.23: “Roo, moo rautu bia-ra, ka roo-ro moo ihaha omoamoi aꞌai; meree ata, moo omoabai tiato-ra ibuꞌiidioi-da, ruu-ro iburuti aꞌai. Memiho urioi omaꞌati-ka (Matiu 12:43-45)
11.24: “Memiho urioi-ro, meree ata aia memeheai, ka ruu oroaꞌoiai-ka, toatoa hepui, hora ahue mati ma emeeꞌai-ri. Ida ata mati emeeꞌa tiato-ra, ruu-ro himiai-do aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Moo araimai rodau, moo himia motoi eito.’
11.25: Ka ruu araimai-da, motoi emeeꞌai-ka, tomio-ha tauo-ha potobioumo.
11.26: Ka ruu ohuuꞌoi-ka kekai eito, ida imooꞌui-ka, aamiꞌa semeri (7) memiho hiꞌa urioi, ruu-ro omiorai, hiei-da ma emidioumoi-ri. Turiaha iidoi oropoiꞌoi-da, aaꞌo mereei memiho hiꞌai-da ereedeeꞌai-ka, ruu epuui-to iiemidio emerai oohodii-ka.” Ihaha geꞌii
11.27: Iesu, aaꞌo emerai iaaꞌoi-da, oobo ata-ro, paꞌai tuiai-da, geema madei-to paaꞌo, “Geꞌii-ka, roo ooto-ra, oomoto-rai iaꞌai ooboi!”
11.28: Irai Iesu-ro, ruu madei omoaimai-ka. “Ie, irai geꞌii hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, Iehoma madei, oroomidio-ra, obodoo-rai aꞌai uubi eito.” Uubi rio-ka urio odaudio raa (Matiu 12:38-42)
11.29: Uubi-ro Iesu iomaaꞌeumoi-da, ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Memiho hiꞌa-ka, doꞌou ara himioi uubi! Rii ai-oroaro kaumo, urio odaudio raa-ri, irai ata raa imaꞌai aꞌai bia. Ka moo-ro rii-do imaꞌai aꞌai raai Iora iaꞌai urio odaudio raa gaaꞌu behai-ka.
11.30: Aatu emerai-ka, himogabo dubui, Iora iaꞌai raai, Ririma uubi eito, ka Uubihaubi Mereei aaꞌo emerai raa-ha aꞌai aꞌai, doꞌou ara himioi uubi eito.
11.31: Aumai imaapoi aꞌai himioi, Seba pai ooboi otooꞌai aꞌai, doꞌou ara himioi uubi ma imehiipoi-ri, mabu ruu himia hepui-da, auꞌo pooꞌu, Soromori orootomu madei oroomidioi-ri, kamia riꞌo umoo-ra ara hioꞌou-da, ata raa, raa-rie. Moo-ro riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai Soromori pai-ro omioorai-ka.
11.32: Aumai imaapoi aꞌai himio-da, Ririma uubi otooꞌai aꞌai kaumo, riꞌo imehiipoi-ri, mabu rii tauo pireheꞌeaimo memiho oroiꞌioi-da, Iora orootomui iiromidioumoi-da, ka riꞌo moo-ro umoo ridodiai, meree ata raa-rie Iora goro-ka, ruu hoꞌu-ka! Tuupi hehei-ka (Matiu 5:15; 6:22-23)
11.33: “Meree ata-ro ramepai adiai-da, opiꞌomai aꞌai bia, kamia ipuai goroi-da edeꞌai aꞌai bia. Bia modobo bia! Ruu-ro aiha edeeꞌai aꞌai ramepai ooꞌa reꞌei-da, uubi iidouti-da, hehei ma eaꞌaumoi-ri.
11.34: Roo idomai ramepai aibo-ka, roo tuupi eito. Roo idomai meaha-ra, ee-ka roo tuupi hehei-daka. Ii roo idomai memiho-ra, ee-ka roo tuupi duꞌi-daka.
11.35: Meaha ma ereaꞌai, roo tuupi hehei duꞌi iiꞌi bia!
11.36: Roo turiaha tuupi, hehe hiꞌai-dara, hapuo ata duꞌi ooꞌa bia-ra, ka turiaha hehe-haka, ramepai ma iradi emerai rooato.” Iesu-ro Pariseia uubi-re, bubui imatomudio uubi-rei, erehe madei-to pimaaꞌo (Matiu 23:1-36; Maka 12:38-40)
11.37: Iesu oroaduꞌuti ioropoiꞌoi-da, Pariseia dubu ata-ro, ai-paamaꞌue, ruu rautu ma iihoidoi-ri, ka ruu motoi iodoroi-da, aiha pemiꞌei, dui ma iihoi-ri.
11.38: Pariseia dubui urio podaudio Iesu ieaꞌai-da, dui iihoi-ha poomahoro, tui imoruꞌo tiatoi-da.
11.39: Paidubui-ro ruui-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Riꞌo Pariseia uubi, kapusi-ra mereki-rai kekai tamai imoruꞌo kaumo. Irai riꞌo goroi oroiꞌioi, iiho-toto, kamia memihoi geega-ka.
11.40: Riꞌo amaamo-ka! Iehoma-ro kekai iododiai-da, rioi ododiai bia-ra? Ie, tauo pododiai.
11.41: Irai kapusi-ra mereki-rai, rioi raarai, ma imaꞌati, raara tiato uubi eito. Ka riꞌoi-do turiaha raarai riiꞌimo tiato iiꞌai aꞌai.
11.42: “Pariseia uubi-o, memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai riꞌoi-do! Riꞌo-ro emaꞌatidio kaumo, Aiai Iehomai-do, modobo kerei, keekeebaiꞌo topo ribo raabari, kamia aamiꞌa raara paꞌeai-da. Irai riꞌo-ro, aamiꞌai eito gamoꞌo oroiꞌioi idodiaimo bia, ka riꞌo Aiai Iehomai-do, giiꞌepu aꞌaimo bia. Riꞌo-ro ire raarai aiha ma aꞌai, ka riꞌo iibodiidioumo bubui riꞌo-ro haꞌima aꞌai bia.
11.43: “Pariseia uubi-o, memiho hiꞌa-ro, ooꞌai aꞌai, riꞌoi-do! Riꞌo rio-ka idabu mati-mati-da, hoho reꞌei totoi, kamia raarai oromoamee mati-da, imaabee rautu ma imoaduꞌutimo.
11.44: Memiho hiꞌai ooꞌai aꞌai riꞌoi-do, mabu riꞌo, tu rato tiato egai boboi aibo-ka, uubi-ro umoo iiꞌi tiato-ha, hoꞌui ma oroaꞌoiaumo.”
11.45: Bubui imatomudio dubui ata-ro, aaꞌoi-ka ruui-do, “Imatomudio dubu-o, roo-ro ireibai iaaꞌodioi-da, roo-ro rimo rautu, ai-rimaaꞌutidio!”
11.46: Iesu-ro omoaimai-ka, “Bubui imatomudio uubi-o, kamia memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai riꞌoi-do! Riꞌo-ro iaaꞌo kaumo, uubi hoꞌui-da riiboi, ka riibo hiꞌa-ka, imaꞌoiai modobo bia, irai roo himia-ro, tu hura gaaꞌu omiiꞌai aꞌai bia, rii ma imoabai riiboi-da.
11.47: Memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai riꞌoi-do! Riꞌo-ro idodiai kaumo mea hiꞌa roꞌoa uuꞌui, oroihi himogabo uubi-ri, aaꞌo himogabo uubi, riꞌo rariamiꞌoi-ro piimotoumo.
11.48: Riꞌo himia aꞌai raarai-da ai-oobodi kaumo, riꞌo rariamiꞌoi iaꞌaimo raarai, rio aꞌai kaumo. Rii-ro piimotoumo himogabo uubi, ka rii iruꞌumo roꞌoa uuꞌu boboi riꞌo-ro imititi kaumo.
11.49: Aaꞌo raꞌu-da, Iehoma mooꞌui umooi-da ai-paaꞌo, ‘Moo-ro, rii imetiodoai raꞌai himogabo uubi, kamia made imaꞌoia uubi, rii-ro aamiꞌai iimotoi aꞌai kaumo, ka aamiꞌai imodoboai aꞌai kaumo.’
11.50: Ka doꞌou ara himioi uubi rii aumai-da ideꞌai aꞌai, mabu tauoi himogabo uubi, rii-ro iimotoumoi-ri hepui iododiai himioi-da, imooꞌu doꞌou.
11.51: Abera iaiꞌiia himioi-da, iooꞌu Sekaraia iaiꞌiiaumo, ruu poue totoi-re, ka dubuae hiꞌa mati-re, ipituiai-da, paiꞌiiaumo. Ie, riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, riꞌo doꞌou ara himiou uubi, rii-ri auma eidai aꞌai kaumo.
11.52: “Bubui imatomudio uubi-o, memiho hiꞌai ooꞌai aꞌai riꞌoi-do! Riꞌo-ro oꞌapudio kaumo moꞌui motoi birii aꞌeuti raai. Riꞌo himia iidoo bia, ka riꞌo-ro imomurudio kaumo, iido tooto aꞌaimo uubi!”
11.53: Iesu, aaꞌo mati iemeheai-da, bubui imatomudio uubi-re, kamia Pariseia uubi-reiro, riibo madei-to peemeehiipoumo, ka rii-ro hiiro hiꞌa raara ai-patoheumo.
11.54: Ruu oraꞌe pemedeꞌaumo, ruu memiho raa ata, aaꞌoato ma oohiaimoi-ri.

12.1: Aatu himioi-da, hiiro hiꞌa tauseri (1,000) uubi gaaꞌu-ha ioodabuaimoi-da, aamiꞌa uubi, aamiꞌai hoꞌu-hoꞌui-da ai-potooꞌutiimo. Iesu-ro epuui-da ruu iimatomudio mereei eito aaꞌoi-ka, “Ita eremaabeumo, Pariseia uubi paramai iaupaituti tuoꞌoi aibo-ka, moo-ro ai-raaꞌo, rii daea uubi-ka.
12.2: Raꞌu momurudio, eremapotai aꞌai, kamia goro hiꞌai iipiꞌomatidioi, umoo iiꞌi aꞌai kaumo.
12.3: Kaida roo-ro duꞌi-da raꞌu maaꞌo, himioi tuia hiꞌai-da, oromidioi aꞌai kaumo, ka haadoai-to raꞌu maaꞌo, oropatidio ruuꞌai goroi-da, motoi ubui-da pairautu madei-to, aaꞌoi aꞌai kaumo. Iehoma toe-ha ma emaꞌai (Matiu 10:28-33; 12:32; 10:19-20)
12.4: “Moo-ro riꞌo moo riaraamui ai-riduuꞌai, toe aꞌaimoꞌa tuupi boiꞌo-ro aiꞌiiai maꞌai duumo rituo-ha, irai memiho raa ata ododiai aꞌai bia didimoi-da.
12.5: Riꞌo moo-ro imapui raꞌai, riꞌo-ro boꞌu toe emaꞌai maꞌai duumo, Iehoma toe ma emaꞌai, ruu erara-ka, ruu-ro aiꞌiia didimoi-da, riibo mati eito ma epeduai. Ie, riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai ruu beha-ha toe ma emaꞌai.
12.6: “Tu-hapuo (5) miroria, retoꞌa (2) mori hurai-to, ideꞌai amaꞌai? Ie, iaha-ka, Iehoma-ro gaaꞌubuo miroriai ata, dodo iiꞌi aꞌai bia.
12.7: Kamia roo epuui muhoi turiaha tauo piahoꞌouti, kaida toe aꞌai bia, roo muari hiꞌa-ka, turiaha miroriai aibo bia.
12.8: “Moo-ro riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai, boꞌu-ro maaꞌo turiaha uubi hoohoi-da, ruu mooi-doka, Uubihaubi Mereei-ro, gaaꞌu emerai aaꞌoi aꞌai rii-do, Iehoma arerui hohooi-da.
12.9: Irai boiꞌo-ro raraibo duumo moo, turiaha uubi hoohoi-da, Uubihaubi Mereei-ro rii aaꞌo emerai iraiboi aꞌai Iehoma arerui hohooi-da.
12.10: “Meree ata boꞌu-ro maaꞌo omoamoo made ata, Uubihaubi Mereei eito, modobo-ka emapihiti, irai boꞌu-ro maaꞌo memiho omoamoo raara Dubuae Urioi eito, emapihiti aꞌai bia.
12.11: “Rii-ro riꞌo aia mimooꞌu duumo, idabu motoi uubi-re gamarai-re kamia aamiꞌa epuuhoro uubi hohooi-da iatohei, pauo iraromoi bia, riꞌo raꞌu aaꞌoi maꞌai duumo riꞌo himia oroomatuei ma aꞌai.
12.12: Mabu Dubuae Urioi-ro, riꞌo imatomudioi aꞌai aaꞌo himio mabui-da, riꞌo raꞌu aaꞌoi-rie.” Raara hiiro-hiiro dubui obeegiri-ka
12.13: Dubu ata-ro uubi hiiroi tuiai-da paaꞌo Iesui-do, “Imatomudio dubu-o, moo raamui oduuꞌai, rimoiti abeai-ro irimoameheai raarai, ma roromotoodeaido.”
12.14: Iesu-ro ruu omoaimai-ka, “Dubu-o, moo erarai boꞌu-ro remaꞌai riꞌoiti raarai ipituiai-da ma rimotoodeai-ri?”
12.15: Ka Iesu-ro rii-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Meaha ereaꞌaumo, ka ita ereemaabeumo riꞌo himia, rurubu oroiꞌioi-da, mabu oroiꞌioi, ihahai uubi iraahoꞌoo raarai-da ododiai bia, iahoꞌouti bia, raꞌaibou raara hiiro meree-ra.”
12.16: Kaida pimoaduꞌo, Iesu-ro ara obeegiri, “Raara hiiro dubu ata hepu rautu-ka, aaꞌo hepui-da paꞌea raarai mea hiꞌa-ha piooumo.
12.17: Ruu himia-ro iraromoi oomahoroi-ka, ‘Moo paꞌea raarai iraahoꞌoo mati tiato-ka, moo raꞌu aꞌai raꞌai?’
12.18: Ruu himia oromoaduꞌoi-ka, ‘Moo araibau aꞌai raꞌai, moo paꞌea raarai-re, kamia dui iiꞌa motoi iagogouti raꞌai, paipai ma riititi-ri, ka moo raa hurai-re, kamia aamiꞌa dui hiei-da iraahoꞌooi raꞌai.
12.19: Ida, moo himiai-do ai-raaꞌo, moo raara hiiro dubu-ka! Moo rio aꞌai meamea raarai turiaha burioi iiꞌadioi aꞌai, pauo tiato oroiꞌioi ma reidai-ri iiho idioi ma raꞌai, geꞌii rautu ma remidio!’
12.20: Irai Iehoma-ro aaꞌoi-ka ruui-do, ‘Roo amaamo-ka! Doꞌou duoi roo oroiꞌioi oaidai raꞌai, ka roo ieremaumodi raarai turiaha boꞌu-ro imidai maꞌai, roo-ro imeheai aꞌai-da?’ ”
12.21: Ka Iesu-ro obeegiri opoiꞌoi-ka, “Araibau-ka, raara hiiro-hiiroi boiꞌo-ro moromomohi duumo, rii himia-haido, rii Iehoma hohoi-da, raara tiato-ka.” Pauo iiraromoi bia (Matiu 6:25-34)
12.22: Kaida Iesu-ro paaꞌo, ruu iimatomudio mereei eito, riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, pauo iraromoi bia iiho dui eito, riꞌo ma oroiꞌioumoi-ri, kamia tuupi imaꞌoia hipurai eito!
12.23: Oroiꞌioi ihaha raa-ka, duui aibo bia, kamia tuupi ihaha raa-ka, imaꞌoia hipurai aibo bia.
12.24: Oaꞌoai ma iraromoumo, rii ruꞌa hura ioodouti bia, kamia paꞌea raa iaꞌuboumo bia, rii duu iraahoꞌoo moto tiato-ka, rii Iehoma-ro iomoto, riꞌo muari hiꞌa-ka, momoꞌoi aibo bia.
12.25: Meaha-ra, riꞌo pauo iraromo rautu emidioi, pauo iraromoi-ro, roo oroiꞌioi keehibuo, tutuu omotutuomai amaꞌai? Abiarie.
12.26: Roo-ro ara keehibuo raai ododiai modobo bia-ra, ka raꞌu-ri pauo iraromoi-ra, aamiꞌa raarai eito.
12.27: Ma iaꞌaumo buꞌi kopoi raꞌaibou miiꞌi duumo, rii omaꞌatimo bia, kamia hipura idodiaimo bia, rii himia-ri. Irai moo-ro riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai, Soromori hipurai tomioi aibo bia, kopoi tomioi, muari hiꞌa-ka.
12.28: Iehoma-ro iidodiai, buꞌi tataꞌoi tomioi, tataꞌoi doꞌou araarie, toutu uubi-ro, iipeduai aꞌai kaumo, erai-ro ma iruuroi-ri. Iehoma-ro rii hipurai imaꞌati emerai, riꞌo ihaha imaꞌati amaꞌai? Ie, ihaha imaꞌati aꞌai! Riꞌo pupuo iraromoi keeke hiꞌa-ka!
12.29: “Kamia raꞌuri-ha iraromoi-ra, iiho-ra, idioi-rai eito, pauo iraromoi bia.
12.30: Ara hepui-da, Iuda guui-da paira tiato uubi, turiaha himioi ai-iraromodio kaumo, aaꞌo raarai. Riꞌo abeai umoo-ka, riꞌo rio-ka aaꞌo raarai.
12.31: Kaida Iehoma pai emidio erarai ma iraromoi, ka ruu-ro ara hepui-da, riꞌo oroiꞌioi iraromo raarai, imaꞌati aꞌai. Meamea raarai aromoi-da (Matiu 6:19-21)
12.32: “Toe aꞌaimoꞌa, paꞌa keehi-o, riꞌo Abeai geꞌii-ka, ruu Pai emidio erara ma imaꞌai-ri, riꞌoi-do.
12.33: Turiaha riꞌo raarai ma ideꞌai oromoamei-ri, ka mori, raara tiato uubi ma imaꞌati. Oroaheꞌa tiato mori haaꞌo, ita eremaumodiimo, ka riꞌo mea irahoꞌoo raarai ita ideꞌaumo aromoi-da. Ka rii oropoiꞌoi aꞌai bia, mabu piro ata-ro imeꞌei aꞌai bia, kamia tete ata-ro itoeꞌauti aꞌai bia.
12.34: Riꞌo kaukai iiꞌai aꞌai, meamea raarai iiꞌaa reꞌei-da. Ma eremaumodi ooꞌui aꞌai raai eito
12.35: “Ma ereemaumodi, raꞌu-ro ooꞌui maꞌai eito, ka ma orododiai, oobodii aꞌai raarai eito, kamia ramepai ma adiai,
12.36: himoꞌa uubi-ro, rii epuuhoro dubui ma omotiimo emerai, oobo-ra dubu-rai idabuai mahuai reꞌei-da, ooꞌui aꞌai aiboi. Ruu araimai-da, birii amaaꞌedei aꞌai, ka birii gaaꞌu hiꞌa-ha ma emaꞌeraimo.
12.37: Geꞌii hiꞌa-ka, himoꞌa uubi rii epuuhoro dubui-ro, oroiꞌioi-da amimeeꞌa ruu araimai-da, kamia tauo ageremaumodiimo! Moo-ro riꞌo ihaha riduuꞌai, ruu eremaumodi aꞌai, ka rii iduuꞌai aꞌai ma emiꞌeitutimoi-ri, ruu-ro ma iomotoi-ri.
12.38: Ruu duoi tuiai-da, kamia didimoi-to ooꞌui aꞌai-da, rii tauo ageremaumodiimo, ida amimeeꞌa, rii geꞌii hiꞌa-ka.
12.39: Kaida riꞌo umoo hiꞌa ma ooꞌai, motoi rautu mereei umoo-ra piroi, ooꞌui aꞌai himioi, ruu-ro omoaꞌuei aꞌai bia motoi ma ehebiai-ri.
12.40: Ka riꞌo rautu ma eremaumodi, mabu Uubihaubi Mereei ooꞌui aꞌai himioi, riꞌo umoo ooꞌai aꞌai bia.” Mea himoꞌa meree kamia memiho himoꞌa meree (Matiu 24:45-51)
12.41: Petero-ro atohetai ka, “Paidubu-o, ara obeegiri rimo behaido-ra, ee turiaha uubi rautu-ra?”
12.42: Paidubui-ro omoaimai-ka, “Ka boꞌu-rie mea eremaabe emidioi, kamia moꞌui rautu himoꞌa mereei? Ruu beha-ka, epuuhoro dubui-ro, epuuhoro meree ododiai aꞌai motoi ma eaꞌai-ri, kamia aamiꞌa moto himoꞌa uubi duui ma imaꞌati-ri, duui imaꞌati himio hiꞌai-da.
12.43: Geꞌii hiꞌa-ka, ire moto himoꞌa mereei, ruu epuuhoro dubui, araimai-da, ruu aaꞌo emerai aꞌai-da amemeeꞌa!
12.44: Ie, riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, moto epuuhoro dubui-ro, motoi himoꞌa mereei epuuhoro apui aꞌai, ruu raarai turiaha ma emeaꞌai-ri.
12.45: Irai ire himoꞌa mereei-ro, ruu himiai-do aibau amaaꞌo, ‘Moo epuuhoro dubui, tutuu hiꞌa himio eidai ma araimai-ri.’ Kaida ruu-ro iimotoi amoomahuꞌuai, aamiꞌa moto himoꞌa upi dubui, iiho-ra idiorai-da imaꞌai, kamia amaamo oboi-da.
12.46: Kaida ruu epuuhoro dubui ata himioi ooꞌui aꞌai-da motoi eito, himoꞌa mereei-ro ruui-do omoti tiato himioi-da, kamia ruu umoo iiꞌi tiato himioi-da, epuuhoro dubui-ro ruu amaꞌadei aꞌai, ka otiodoai aꞌai iroomidio tiato uubi eito, rii rautu ma emidioi-ri.
12.47: “Moto himoꞌa mereei umoo-ra, ruu epuuhoro dubui-ro, raꞌu omaꞌati emaꞌai, irai ruu-ro aꞌai bia, kamia ruu-ro ereemaumodi bia-ra, ka ruu pairautu hiꞌa ororihoi aꞌai.
12.48: Irai moto himoꞌa mereei umoo bia-ra, ruu epuuhoro dubui-ro raꞌu omaꞌati emaꞌai, kamia ruu-ro memiho aia maꞌai, ruu modobo-ka, keehibuo aibo ororihoi. Hiiroi emaꞌai mereei eito, hiiro-ri oroaroi-ka. Kamia hiiro hiꞌa emaꞌai mereei eito, hiiro hiꞌa-ri oroaroi-ka.” Oroomoamoi (Matiu 10:34-36)
12.49: “Moo ai-pirooꞌu hepu geemai erai-da adiai, ka moo rio-ka ara erai iradi ma oomahoroi!
12.50: Moo temetemei-da ma romoꞌuumidioumoi-ri romotii, ka pauo iraromoi odai aꞌai moropoiꞌo!
12.51: Riꞌo iraromoi-da, moo miroi aromooꞌu ara hepu geemai eito? Abiarie, miroi bia, irai himia orootoodei!
12.52: Doꞌou ara ipi-da, imodau iiꞌai aꞌai himioi, maamu, abea, meree, tu-hapuoi-to orootoodei aꞌai kaumo, retoꞌa-gaaꞌui-ro (3) retoꞌai (2) imoamoi aꞌai kaumo, kamia retoꞌai-ro (2) retoꞌa-gaaꞌui (3) imoamoi aꞌai kaumo.
12.53: Abeamiꞌoi-ro ohio mereei imoamoi aꞌai kaumo, ka ohio mereei-ro abeamiꞌoi imoamoi aꞌai kaumo. Maamiꞌoi-ro buhe mereei imoamoi aꞌai kaumo, ka buhe mereei-ro maamiꞌoi imoamoi aꞌai kaumo. Daamiꞌoi-ro eteamiꞌoi imoamoi aꞌai kaumo, ka eteamiꞌoi-ro daamiꞌoi imoamoi aꞌai kaumo.” Himio mabui umoo ma ooꞌai (Matiu 16:2-3)
12.54: Iesu aaꞌoi-ka uubi eito, “Riꞌo-ro bubui aia meaꞌaa duumo, himioi ooruo hapuoi-da ioroi-da, riꞌo-ro gaaꞌu hiꞌa-ha aaꞌoi aꞌai kaumo, ‘Mihaei ooꞌui aꞌai,’ kiauka mihaei aiha ooꞌui-ka.
12.55: Kamia riꞌo-ro aia mereaꞌaa duumo, hapuo atai koroboi omumui-da, ka riꞌo-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Mati erara-ro oohiai aꞌai.’ Kiauka, erarai-ro oohiai-ka.
12.56: Riꞌo daea uubi-ka! Riꞌo-ro hepu-ra aromo-rai imiaꞌaa duumo, riꞌo umoo-ka raꞌu-ro oobodi maꞌai, irai raꞌu mabu-ra riꞌo-ro ara himioi orododiai raarai ihahai umoo iiꞌi tiato? Rooi-do udo mereei rautu madei ma idomoiai (Matiu 5:25-26)
12.57: “Riꞌo-ro himia ma eaꞌaumo, mea ododiai raai raꞌu-ra?
12.58: Meree ata-ro, roo aia meemehiipo, pauoi-to ma emahibai idomoiai-ri, roo omodau toe-ka, bubu uubi hohooi eito. Roo-ro aꞌai tiato-ra, roo oaredioi aꞌai kaumo, bubu uubi hohoo reꞌei eito, ka ruu-ro roo imaꞌai aꞌai idi uubi eito. Kaida roo edeꞌai aꞌai kaumo, duꞌi motoi-da.
12.59: Ka roo hieꞌei-da, emidioi aꞌai modau-die, roo iaraa mori gaaꞌui-da, taꞌii maꞌai-die.”

13.1: Aaꞌo himioi-da uubi aamiꞌa, hieꞌei-daka, rii-ro poduuꞌaimo Iesu, Pirato-ro Garereia uubi iimoto emerai, Iehomai-do poue raarai iemaꞌatidioumoi-da.
13.2: Iesu-ro rii imoaimai-ka, “Ire Garereia uubi aaꞌo emerai gaboato agimotoumo, riꞌo iraromoi-da, rii memiho hiꞌa uubi-ra, aamiꞌa Garereia uubi rautu idoboai-da?
13.3: Abiarie! Ka riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, riꞌo ireheꞌeai tiato-ra memihoi-da, riꞌo rii rautu oroihi aꞌai kaumo.
13.4: Raꞌaibou-ra ire eitiri (18) uubi iimotoi Siroamua-to, moto tutuu ata iirahiai, rii hoꞌui-da? Riꞌo iraromoi-da rii memiho hiꞌa uubi-ra, aamiꞌa Ierusarema uubi rautu idoboai-da?
13.5: Abiarie! Ka riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, riꞌo memihoi-da ireheꞌeai tiato-ra, ka riꞌo rii rautu oroihi aꞌai kaumo.” Ruꞌai-re ruu hurai-re
13.6: Ka Iesu-ro rii ara obeegiri imoaduꞌoi-ka, “Dubu ata ai-pemidio, ruu hura iiho ruꞌa ata, mire paꞌeai-da potii. Ruu ai-poroaꞌoiadio ruꞌai hura ma imeeꞌai-ri, irai hura imeeꞌai bia.
13.7: Ka ruu paꞌeai iemeaꞌa mereei eito aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Moo retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) burio tauo pirorooho, ara ruꞌai-da hura ma rimeeꞌai-ri, irai moo-ro, ata hura iohuiato imeeꞌa bia. Ita eꞌebo, ruu-ro hepui meai hobou eidai.’
13.8: Irai paꞌeai ieaꞌaa mereei-ro pomoaimai, ‘Dubu-o, tauo emeheai, burio gaaꞌu ata, moo-ro mabui emauhuuti raꞌai, ka romomoohi roro hepu ata-to.
13.9: Kaida ruꞌai hura amimamirai goroi burioi-da, meaha-ka, ii tuaha-ra, ka emeꞌeboi raꞌai.’ ” Memiho urioi-ro eitiri (18) burioi-to iemetebuti ooboi
13.10: Sabati ataato, Iesu ai-pimatomudio idabu motoi-da.
13.11: Ka oobo ata, memiho urioi-ro tuupi ai-paamia eitiri (18) burioi-to, hieꞌei-daka. Aaꞌo ooboi gamoꞌo-ha otooꞌai modobo bia.
13.12: Iesu-ro ruu iemeeꞌai-da, ahoꞌootiai-ka, ruu ma ooꞌui-ri, ida poduuꞌai, “Oobo-o, roo doꞌou gimoi-ro, emeheaiꞌai.”
13.13: Ka Iesu tui ruu hoꞌui-da ideꞌai-da, ruu aiha pitooꞌa gamoꞌo-ha, kiauka Iehoma emarahuei-ka.
13.14: Irai, idabu motoi epuuhoro dubui, iha udoi paꞌai, Iesu-ro meree ata Sabati-da iodomoiai-ri, kaida ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka uubi eito, “Rimoi-doi, tikiti (6) himio-ka ma romaꞌatimo, ka aaꞌo himioi-da, riꞌo ma ooꞌui idomoiatidioi-ri, ii Sabati-da ooꞌui bia!”
13.15: Paidubui-ro rii imoaimai-ka, “Riꞌo daea uubi-ka! Riꞌo meree ata modobo-ka boromokau, kamia doriki, omohuuꞌoi kekai eito, Sabati-da obo ma idioi-ri!
13.16: Ka ara ooboi Aberahamo aramui-ka, Satari-ro paamia eitiri (18) burioi-to, ka ruu modobo-ka, Sabati-da odomoiai!”
13.17: Iesu-ro rii iimoaimai madei-ro, ruui-do heamo uubi hiipo hiꞌa-ha pidodiai, ii aamiꞌai geꞌii hiꞌai paꞌaimo, ruu iaꞌai raara meameai-ri. Iehoma erara emidio mati obeegiri-ka (Matiu 13:31-33; Maka 4:30-32)
13.18: Iesu-ro aratohetai-ka, “Iehoma pai emidio erarai raꞌaibou-rie? Moo-ro raꞌu ato odoboai raꞌai?
13.19: Ka ruu araibau-ka, dubu ata-ro keehibuo hiꞌa ruꞌa hura, ma aroi hepui-da, ka aaꞌo raa matei iiꞌi-da, ruꞌa-ro amorododiai, ka momoꞌoi motoi aaꞌo ruꞌai ekei-da, ititi aꞌai kaumo.”
13.20: Ata Iesu-ro aratohetai-ka, “Iehoma pai emidio erarai, moo-ro raꞌu ato odoboai raꞌai?
13.21: Ka ruu araibau-ka, oobo ata-ro hiiro hiꞌa parama, paramai iaupai muramurai rautu ma iaꞌomei, ka paramai geema iiꞌi aꞌai.” Gohe keehi (Matiu 7:13-14,21-23)
13.22: Iesu goꞌoto-goꞌotoi, imatomudio-ha podau, ruu iodau modoboi Ierusaremai-to.
13.23: Meree ata-ro Iesu atohetai-ka, “Paidubu-o, kiauka-ra, retoꞌati uubi beha-ra, ee aamiꞌai imoabai amaꞌai?” Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka rii-do,
13.24: “Pauoi-to ma emahibai gohe keehi ma odoro, mabu hiiro uubi-ro emahibai aꞌai kaumo iidoi, irai modobo ooꞌai aꞌai bia, rii ma iidoumoi-ri.
13.25: Irai, motoi abeai eibuai-da birii aia momoopai, ka riꞌo birii amaꞌedei oomahoroi aꞌai kaumo, ida aaꞌoi aꞌai kaumo, ‘Epuuhoro dubu-o, rimo birii rimaꞌerai, ma riidoumo!’ Ruu-ro aaꞌoi aꞌai, ‘Moo umoo bia riꞌo, riꞌo raati-da mooꞌu duumo.’
13.26: Kaida riꞌo-ro omoaimai aꞌai kaumo, ‘Rimo roo rautu iiho idioi piraꞌaimo, roo-ro pirimatomudio, rimo himia goꞌotoi-da!’
13.27: Irai ruu-ro ata aaꞌoi aꞌai, ‘Moo umoo bia riꞌo, riꞌo raati-da mooꞌu duumo, oodadeaimo moo reꞌei-da, riꞌo turiaha memiho raara idodiai uubi-ka!’
13.28: “Aberahamo, Isaꞌako, Iakobo kamia Iehoma himogabo uubi iaꞌai aꞌai-da, Iehoma pai emidio erarai-da, riꞌo giri iimodoruuti rautu idebi iootoi aꞌai kaumo, riꞌo kekai eito iipeduai aꞌai-da.
13.29: Uubi ooꞌui aꞌai kaumo turiaha mati-mati-da, emiꞌeituti aꞌai kaumo mahuai aꞌai-da, Iehoma pai emidio erarai-da.
13.30: Amoromidio duumo, doꞌou boiꞌo-ra epuui-da, rii epuui-da iiꞌai aꞌai bia, kaida doꞌou boiꞌo-ra didimoi-da, rii epuui-da iiꞌai aꞌai.” Iesu, Ierusarema idebi iemaꞌai-ka (Matiu 23:37-39)
13.31: Aaꞌo himioi-da, aamiꞌa Pariseia uubi iooꞌumoi-da, paaꞌoumo Iesui-do, “Roo ara mati ita emeeheai, ita odau mati atai-to, mabu Heroda rio-ka roo rituo-ha aiꞌiiai.”
13.32: Iesu-ro rii imoaimai-ka, “Odaumo ire buꞌi umui oduuꞌai, ‘Moo memiho urioi riibodidio, ka uubi rautu iridomoiatidio, doꞌou ara himioi-re toutui-re, ka aaꞌo didimoi-da, oropoiꞌoi aꞌai moo omaꞌati.’
13.33: Irai moo aiha rodau doꞌou, toutui-re, kamia ara himioti didimoi-re, mabu mea bia himogabo dubui, ata matiato iihiai, Ierusarema haato iihiai meaha-ka.
13.34: “Ierusarema! Ierusarema! Roo-ro piimoto himogabo uubi, roꞌoa kopi-da iiamaꞌede, Iehoma-ro riꞌo iimetiodoai, made himoꞌa uubi! Hiiro himio, moo rio-ka, riꞌo turiaha, moo tamui-da ma rimoꞌomaatidio, kokoro maamui-ro, kokoro keekei imoꞌomaatidiodio emerai, ruu tamui goroi-da, irai riꞌo-ro moo omoaꞌue bia!
13.35: Amoromidio duumo, riꞌo motoi muio iiꞌai aꞌai. Moo-ro riꞌo ihaha hiꞌai riduuꞌai, riꞌo-ro moo eaꞌai aꞌai bia modau-die, ida himio ata ooꞌui aꞌai, riꞌo-ro aaꞌoi aꞌai kaumo, ‘Iehoma meai ruu rautu-ka, boꞌu-ro mooꞌu Paidubui pairai-da.’ ”

14.1: Sabati ata-to, Iesu ai-podau Pariseia uubi epuuhoro dubu ata, motoi-da ma iihoidoi-ri, kamia uubi-ro ihaha pemaꞌotidioumo, ruu aꞌai raa ma emeeꞌaumoi-ri.
14.2: Oto-ra tu-rai iaupaimo dubui hieꞌei-da emeeꞌai-ka.
14.3: Kaida piatohetai Iesu-ro, bubui imatomudioumo uubi, Pariseia uubi rautu, “Rimo bubui-da modobo-ra, Sabati-da uubi idomoiatidioi, ee modobo bia-ra?”
14.4: Irai rii piroha piiꞌimo. Iesu-ro aaꞌo dubui, oꞌapuai-ka, iodomoiatidio, ka aiha potiodoai.
14.5: Kaida piatohetai, “Sabati-da riꞌo meree ata meree ohioi, kamia boromokau, boboi-da aia moohuꞌumatidio, roo-ro hioi-to omioi amaꞌai?”
14.6: Irai rii-ro, modobo bia ruu madei omoaimai. Roo himia oromomioi bia
14.7: Iesu-ro umoo iiꞌi-ka, iiamaꞌue uubi-ro totoi-da meamea mati-ha iarahoꞌoutimoi, ka ruu-ro obeegiri imoaduꞌoi-ka.
14.8: “Roo meree ata-ro aia maamaꞌue, oobo-ra dubu-ra idabuai mahuai eito, mea mati haato emiꞌei bia. Aamiꞌa himioi, oobodii aꞌai roo pai-ro omiorai pai, aamaꞌuei aꞌai kaumo,
14.9: kaida riꞌoiti gaaꞌu-ha iamaꞌue mereei ooꞌui-da, roo oduuꞌai aꞌai, ‘Ire mati omoameheai.’ Kaida roo hiipo hiꞌai ereaꞌai aꞌai, ka roo goro hiꞌai-da emiꞌei aꞌai.
14.10: Kaida roo aia maamaꞌue duumo ma odai goro hiꞌai mati ataato ma emiꞌei, ka roo aamaꞌue mereei ooꞌui-da rooi-do aaꞌoi aꞌai, ‘Abeata-o, eibua ara mati eito.’ Ka roo pairai emaabei aꞌai kaumo aamiꞌa iiamaꞌue uubi hohoi-da.
14.11: Boiꞌo-ro morododiai duumo rii himia pai, rii iimoruoi aꞌai kaumo, kamia boiꞌo-ro iimoruoumo, rii pai idodiai aꞌai kaumo.”
14.12: Ka Iesu-ro iiamaꞌue mereei eito aaꞌoi-ka, “Roo-ro himio tuia du, kamia adimo du, amimaꞌai, roo riaraamui iamaꞌuei bia, roo taitai hiꞌai uubi-re, roo riamiꞌoi-re, roo raamiꞌoi-re, roo ora-gaaꞌu-ha uubi-re, kamia roo raara hiiro riaraamui-re, mabu rii-ro roo kama aamaꞌuei aꞌai kaumo, aaꞌo emerau-da, roo taꞌii aꞌai aꞌai kaumo, roo raꞌu ododiai rii-do.
14.13: Roo mahuai aꞌai-da, raara tiato uubi, dabu uubi, tuupi hapuoi ioroihiimo uubi, ka idomai tiato uubi ma iamaꞌuei,
14.14: ka roo meai eidai aꞌai, mabu rii-ro roo kama omoaimai aꞌai bia. Iehoma-ro, roo taꞌii omoaimai aꞌai, meaha iemidioumo uubi rituoi-da ireibuai aꞌai himioi-da.” Mahua geegai obeegiri-ka (Matiu 22:1-10)
14.15: Iiamaꞌue uubi ata-ro, gaaꞌu-ha iihoumo mati-da, ara madei ai-poromidio, ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka Iesui-do, “Geꞌii hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai mahuai-da emiꞌeituti aꞌai uubi eito, Iehoma pai emidio erarai-da!”
14.16: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka ruui-do, “Dubu ata-ro geega mahua paꞌai, ka hiiro uubi piamaꞌue.
14.17: Mahuai himioi iohiai-da, ruu raa himoꞌa mereei otiodai-ka, ruu-ro iiamaꞌue uubi iduꞌaituti, ‘Ooꞌumo, raarai-da riꞌo turiaha tauo imaumodii maaka.’
14.18: Irai omahoroumoi-ka, iiorobodoumoi-da, aamiꞌa orohodi made aaꞌoi, epuui mereei-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Moo hepu reidai-die, ida eaꞌai odai raꞌai, moo giiꞌepu madei roaidai.’
14.19: Atai-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Moo teri (10) boromokau rimidai-die, moo ai-rodau rii imahibai, ida moo giiꞌepu madei roaidai.’
14.20: Ata gaaꞌui-ro paaꞌo, ‘Moo ooboi doꞌou romia maaka, ida moo ooꞌui aꞌai bia.’
14.21: “Ka moto himoꞌa mereei iaraimai-da, turiaha raarai aiha pomoaduꞌuti epuuhoro dubui eito, ka ruu iha udoi paꞌai, ida paaꞌo, ruu moto himoꞌa mereei eito, ‘Hioi-to odau gabo geegai, kamia goꞌotoi gabo keekei eito, ka iꞌopo raara tiato uubi-re, tuupi hapuoi ioroihiimo uubi-re, dabu uubi-re, ka idomai iaꞌa tiato uubi-re.’
14.22: Kiauka, moto himoꞌa mereei-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Dubu atau-o, roo-ro imaaꞌo emerai tauo-ha orododiai maaka, irai ruuꞌai hiaꞌei imooꞌa.’
14.23: Epuuhoro dubui-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ruu moto himoꞌa mereei eito, ‘Odau, hepu geegai gaboi-re, ka aamiꞌa oto gaboi eito, uubi pupuoi-to iduꞌaituti, ma ooꞌumo moo motoi huru ma iiꞌi-ka.
14.24: Riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, moo-ro epuui-da iiriamaꞌue uubi mereei ata-ro moo adimo dui, topo odoboai aꞌai bia.’ ” Roo rio-ra Iesu-ro ematomudio meree iiꞌi, ka meaha ma iraromoi (Matiu 10:37-38)
14.25: Himio ataato, hiiro hiꞌa uubi Iesu rautu pimadaꞌuimo, ruu iereemeteai-da paaꞌo rii-do,
14.26: “Meree ata aia mooꞌu mooi-do, ida ruu moo-ro ematomudio meree iiꞌi amiraromo, ruu abea-ra maamu-raire, oobo-ra meree keeke-raire, raamiꞌo-ra mabiamiꞌo-raire, kamia ruu himia hiꞌa oroiꞌioi-re, kekai-da ma ideꞌai, ka ruu moo-ro ematomudio meree iiꞌi modobo-ka.
14.27: Riꞌo boiꞌo-rie satauroi iaꞌotatidio tiato, kaida moo didimoi-da moo ma robodoumo, riꞌo modobo bia moo-ro imatomudio meree iiꞌimoi.
14.28: “Riꞌo meree ata moto tutuu ma ididi-ri aia meremaumodi, epuui-to roo emiꞌei aꞌai, ka emeꞌuioi aꞌai mori modoboi, roo moto tutuui ma opoiꞌoi-ri.
14.29: Kamia roo mori modobo bia-ra, roo moto tutuui opoiꞌoi aꞌai bia, goroi ododiai oropoiꞌoi-da, ka turiaha boiꞌo-ro meaꞌa duumo raꞌu-ro morododiai, roo mari emaꞌai aꞌai kaumo, mabu roo motoi opoiꞌo bia.
14.30: Rii-ro aaꞌoi aꞌai kaumo, ‘Roo moto tutuui ididi tauo poomahoro, irai omaꞌati opoiꞌoi modobo bia.’
14.31: “Gaaꞌu aibo-ka, paidubu ata aia moobodi teri tauseri (10,000) beha uubi rautu, ma araiꞌiai-ri paidubu atai tueriti tauseri (20,000) dubui rautu, ka ruu araiꞌiiai eito odau tiatoi-da, ruu emiꞌei aꞌai, ma iraromoi-ri, ruu pupuoi modobo-ra, ata paidubui rautu ma araiꞌiaidoi-ri.
14.32: Kamia ruu modobo tiato-ra, ka made himoꞌa uubi itiodoai aꞌai, paidubu atai ma emeeꞌaumoi-ri, ka miroi ma ododiaimo ruu taitai eito oohiꞌia tiatoi haato.”
14.33: Iesu-ro madei opoiꞌoi-ka, “Aaꞌo emerai gaboi-da, roo ioohiidio raarai imeheai bia-ra, roo modobo bia moo-ro ematomudio meree iiꞌi.” Damerai ruu himia meai (Matiu 5:13; Maka 9:50)
14.34: “Damerai meai meaha-ka, irai ruu himia meai aia moropoiꞌo, ata gabo ooꞌa bia, damerai ruu himia meai ata ma orododiai.
14.35: Aaꞌo damerai mea bia, raa matei imomohi hepu toꞌoi eito, iipeduai aꞌai kekai eito. Ida riꞌo hepato rautu-ra oromidioumo.”

15.1: Ata himioi taketi imoamee uubi, kamia aamiꞌa memiho oroiꞌio uubi rautu, ai-pooꞌumo Iesu oromidioi.
15.2: Ka Pariseia uubi, bubui imatomudio uubi rautu, piro-piro made aaꞌoi oomahoroumoi-ka, “Ara dubu, memiho uubi geꞌii rautu imiꞌopo, kamia rii rautu imiiho!”
15.3: Ka Iesu-ro rii ara obeegiri imoaduꞌoi oomahoroi-ka.
15.4: “Riꞌo meree ata haridere gaaꞌu (100) mamoei ma iaꞌai, ida gaaꞌubuo ata ma araatoai, ka roo raꞌu aꞌai maꞌai? Ka roo-ro rairiti-rairi (99) imeheai aꞌai, hauꞌii-da. Ka odai aꞌai iaraatoai gaaꞌui oohoi, modau-die memeeꞌa.
15.5: Roo-ro emeeꞌai aꞌai-da, geꞌii hiꞌa rautu, berai-da aaꞌotai aꞌai,
15.6: momooꞌu-die goꞌotoi eito, kaida iahoꞌoi aꞌai roo riaraamui-re, roo taitai uubi-re gaaꞌu-ha, ida aaꞌoi aꞌai rii-do, ‘Moo geꞌii hiꞌa-ka, moo iaraatoai mamoei tauo remeeꞌa maaka. Ooꞌumo geꞌii ma raꞌaimo!’
15.7: Aatu emerai-ka, riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, aromoi-da geꞌii hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, gaaꞌubuo hiꞌa memiho oroiꞌio mereei ereheꞌeai-da, imaabee rairiti-rairi (99) uubi geꞌii aibo bia, boiꞌo-ro iraromoumo, rii tauo pireheꞌeaimo.” Iaraatoai mori hurai
15.8: “Kamia oobo ata teri (10) mori hura-hura rautu-ra, ida aamaatoai ata gaaꞌui, ruu raꞌu aꞌai maꞌai? Ruu-ro ramepai adiai aꞌai, ka ramepai hehei-da motoi otobioi aꞌai, mea hiꞌa-ha oohoi aꞌai, modau-die memeeꞌa.
15.9: Ida ruu-ro emeeꞌai-da, ruu riamabiai-re, ruu riaraamui-re, kamia ruu taitai uubi-rei rautu, turiaha iahoꞌooi aꞌai gaaꞌu-ha, ida aaꞌoi aꞌai rii-do, ‘Moo geꞌii hiꞌai-ka, moo iaraatoai mori tauo remeeꞌa maaka. Ooꞌumo, geꞌii ma raꞌaimo!’
15.10: Aatu emerai-ka, riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, Iehoma arerui geꞌii hiꞌa-ka, gaaꞌubuo memiho oroiꞌio mereei ereheꞌeai-ri.” Abeai-ro meree ohioti, rio iimaꞌai-ka
15.11: Ida, Iesu-ro paaꞌo, “Dubu ata, ruu meree ohioti rautu-ka.
15.12: Riai-ro aaꞌoi-ka ruui-do, ‘Aba-o, moo paira raarai romotoodeai doꞌou.’ Ka aaꞌo dubui-ro, ruu raarai itoodeai-ka riiti ipituiai-da, riiti paipai.
15.13: Himio aamiꞌa, ioropoiꞌoumo didimoi-da, riai raarai mori-to pomoaameumo, ka aaꞌo mori rautu, goꞌotoi emeheꞌai-ka. Ruu aiha podau auꞌo hiꞌa hepu atai-to, ka mori aiha pipoiꞌo, ereemaabe tiato oroiꞌioi-da.
15.14: Ruu raarai ioropoiꞌoi haato, aaꞌo hepui-da, du tiato himioi oohiai-ka, ka aaꞌo himiou-da ruu ata raa oromoameheai bia.
15.15: Ka ruu odai-ka, aaꞌo hepui dubu atai-do, omaꞌati. Ka aaꞌo dubui-ro, ai-potiodoai ruu paꞌea geegai eito, boomoi ma emeaꞌai-ri.
15.16: Ruu dui bobo hiꞌa paꞌai, ka ruu rio-ka boomoi iihoumo birii hurai ma iihoi. Mabu meree ata-ro, ruu uuho raa ata emaꞌai bia, ma uuhoi-ri.
15.17: Iarai-da, ruu mooꞌui imaimai-ka, ida poromoaduꞌo ruu himiai-do, ‘Turiaha moo abeai eito taꞌii-ri omaꞌati uubi, geemaꞌeema hiꞌai imiiho duumo, irai moo ara hiou-da, dui boboi iihiai raꞌai!
15.18: Moo eibuai aꞌai-da, odai raꞌai, moo Abeai eito, ida aaꞌoi raꞌai, “Aba-o, moo Iehomai-re, rooi-re, riꞌoiti hohoi-da, memiho piraꞌai.
15.19: Moo modobo bia roo-ro, roo mereei-to ma rahoꞌo, moo rooi-do taꞌii-ri omaꞌatimo meree gaaꞌu ata, aibo ita rododiai!” ’
15.20: Kiauka, ruu eibuai-ka, araimai abeai eito. “Ruu auꞌo hiꞌai haato, pemeeꞌa abeai-ro, ka kaukai-da giiꞌepu hiꞌa pemaꞌai, iaahootiai-da emaiꞌiimai-ka, aiha pohomeai.
15.21: “Mereei-ro aaꞌo-ka, ‘Aba-o, moo Iehomai-re, rooi-re, riꞌoiti hohoi-da memiho piraꞌai, ida modobo bia moo, roo mereei-to ma rahoꞌoo.’
15.22: Irai abeai-ro, ruu moto himoꞌa uubi iahoꞌootiai-ka, ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Hioi-to, muari hiꞌa hipura, omomooꞌumo, ma atimaimo, tui kakahii garaa omioumo, oto tama omiourioumo.
15.23: Ka odaumo, mea hiꞌa daꞌodaꞌo, roro boromokau, omooꞌumo, aiꞌiiaumo, ka geꞌii, mahua rautu ma raꞌaimo!
15.24: Mabu, ara moo mereei, tauo piihiai, irai doꞌou ruu ai-oroiꞌio, ruu ai-paraatoai, irai ruu tauo remeeꞌa maaka.’ Kiauka, mahua-ra gama-rai aiha poromahoro.
15.25: “Aaꞌo himioi, raamu-abeai hauꞌii-daka. Ruu iaraimai-da, motoi taitai-ro ioohiai-da, gama-ra hete-rai diamoi-ha, piroomai.
15.26: Ka ruu-ro, moto himoꞌa meree atai, ahoꞌotiai-ka, ida, patohetai, ‘Raꞌu maꞌai duumo?’
15.27: Moto himoꞌa mereei-ro omoaimai-ka, ‘Roo riai, tauo araimai maaka motoi eito, ka roo abeai-ro, mea hiꞌa daꞌodaꞌo, roro boromokau aiꞌiia maaka, mabu roo riai mea hiꞌa-ha araimai maaka.’
15.28: “Raamui iha udoi paꞌai, ka motoi eito odoro bia, ida pohuuꞌo abeai, oduuꞌai-ka, ma odoroi-ri rioi eito.
15.29: Irai raamui-ro, ruu abeai omoaimai-ka, ‘Amoromidio, ara burio hiiroi, moo rooi-do piromaꞌati, taꞌii tiato-ha, roo moto himoꞌa meree aibo. Ka moo-ro, roo rio raa ata, ododiai tiato ooꞌa bia. Roo-ro, moo raꞌu remaꞌai? Gouti keehi ata bia, moo mahua ma raꞌai, moo riaraamui rautu.
15.30: Irai, ara roo meree ohioi-ro, roo raarai imoi-da pomoapoiꞌo. Ka ruu imaraimai-da, mea hiꞌa daꞌodaꞌo, roro boromokau, emaiꞌiia maaka!’
15.31: Abeai-ro omoaimai-ka, ‘Moo meree, roo ara hiou-da emidio, moo rautu, turiaha himioi. Ka moo reꞌei iiꞌaa raarai, turiaha roo raara-ka!
15.32: Irai meaha-ka, geꞌii ma raꞌaimo, mabu roo riai ai-piihiai, irai doꞌou ruu ai-oroiꞌio, ruu ai-paraatoai, irai ruu doꞌou tauo remeeꞌa maakaumo!.’ ”

16.1: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ruu iimatomudio uubi eito, “Raara hiiro-hiiro dubu ata, ai-pemidio, ruu raa himoꞌa dubui-ro pemeaꞌaa raarai. Raara hiiro-hiiro dubui ai-poduuꞌaimo, ruu raarai iemeaꞌaa dubui-ro ruu raarai ai-pomohuꞌomai.
16.2: Kiauka, ruu ahoꞌootiai-ka rioi eito, ida paaꞌo, ‘Raꞌu-rie ara raau, moo-ro ai-riromidio, uubi reꞌei-da? Moo remaꞌai turiaha roo omaꞌati emerai geuai, mabu roo moo raara emeaꞌa meree aibo bia, doꞌou modau-die, ooꞌai aꞌai himioi eito.’
16.3: Ka raarai iemeaꞌaa dubui-ro, himia poromoaduꞌo, ‘Moo epuu dubui-ro, omodadeai aꞌai omaꞌati-da, moo raꞌu ododiai raꞌai? Moo pupuo hiꞌa bia, boboi iobuti, kamia moo hiipo-ka, uubi imoaroi.
16.4: Iee, doꞌou moo umoo tauo riiꞌi maaka, moo raꞌu aꞌai raꞌai, ka moo omaꞌati emeheai-da, moo taitai uubi emidioi aꞌai kaumo, rii-ro moo rii motoi eito, geꞌii rautu oꞌopoi aꞌai kaumo.’
16.5: “Ka raa himoꞌa dubui-ro, raarai iimaꞌati uubi iahoꞌoi-ka, ruu epuuhoro dubui, raarai ma omoaimutiimoi-ri. Ruu-ro meree atai atohetai-ka, ‘Roo reꞌei-da, moo epuuhoro dubui, raꞌaibou omoaimai-ro miiꞌa?’
16.6: Ruu-ro omoaimai-ka. ‘Orime herei haridere (100) gaigarua.’ Raa himoꞌa mereei-ro poduuꞌai, ‘Roo omoaimai araa-rie, emiꞌei, ka pipiti-ha (50) iꞌati.’
16.7: Ka ruu-ro atai atohetai-ka, ‘Roo raꞌaibou omoaimai-ro mooꞌa?’ Ida ruu-ro omoaimai-ka, ‘Turiaha gaaꞌubuo tauseri (1,000), geegaꞌeega apoho uiti-ka.’ Ka raa himoꞌa mereei-ro, aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Roo omoaimai pepai araarie, eiti-haridere-ha (800) iꞌati.’
16.8: “Aaꞌo emerai iorododiaiai-da, memiho raara himoꞌa dubui, epuuhoro dubui-ro, ai-pemarahue, mabu raarai iemeaꞌaa dubui-ro, iododiai moꞌui, ruu-ro mea hiꞌa-ha, peaꞌaa. Ka ara hepui uubi moꞌui hiꞌa-ka, aamiꞌa uubi rautu raara idodiai, irai hehei uubi ibai bia.”
16.9: Kaida Iesu-ro paaꞌo, “Riꞌo moo-ro, ai-riduuꞌai, riꞌo himia riaraamu orododiaimo, ara hepui raarai rautu, ka aaꞌo raarai oropoiꞌoi aꞌai-da, riꞌo geꞌii rautu ma iiꞌopaimoi-ka, tutuu oroiꞌio motoi eito.
16.10: Boꞌu-rie, keeke raarai meaha imaaꞌotidioi, ka ruu-ro, geegaꞌeega raarai mea hiꞌa-ha, imaaꞌotidioi aꞌai. Kamia boꞌu-rie keeke raarai meaha imaaꞌotidio tiato, ka ruu-ro geegaꞌeega raarai mea hiꞌa-ha imaaꞌotidioi aꞌai bia.
16.11: Kamia ara hepui raarai, riꞌo-ro meaha imaaꞌotidio tiato-ra, ka riꞌo-ro meamea hiꞌa raarai meaha imaaꞌotidioi aꞌai bia.
16.12: Kamia dubii dubu ata, raarai riꞌo-ro emamaaꞌotidio tiato-ra, ka riꞌo himia raarai, imaꞌai aꞌai bia.
16.13: “Raa himoꞌa mereei-ro, retoꞌa epuuhoro dubuoti, raa himoꞌa aꞌai modobo bia. Ruu-ro atai rio tiato emaꞌai aꞌai, ka ata behai rio emaꞌai aꞌai. Kamia roo-ro, Aiai Iehomai-re, mori-re, gaaꞌu-ha imoabai modobo bia.” Bubui iimoaduꞌuti-ka (Matiu 11:12-13; 5:31-32; Maka 10:11-12)
16.14: Pariseia uubi-ro, Iesu ioroaduꞌuti madei ioromidioumoi-da, mari pemaꞌaimo, mabu rii rio hiꞌa-ka mori,
16.15: ida Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Riꞌo aaꞌo uubi-ka, boiꞌo-ro miꞌatidio duumo, aamiꞌai idomai gaboi-da ma imarahueumoi-ri, irai Iehoma umoo-ka, riꞌo kaukai. Uubi-ro, riꞌo pai iraromo raarai, Iehoma idomai-da, hobou raa-ka.
16.16: “Mose bubui-re, kamia himogabo uubi-ro iꞌatimoi-re, raꞌu iimatomudioumo imooꞌu, Ioare Bapatiso himioi eito, aaꞌo himiou didimoi-da, Aiai Iehoma pai emidio erarai, mea madei ai-pimoaduꞌutimo. Kamia hiiro uubi, pauoi-to iidoo toto aꞌai kaumo.
16.17: Irai aahuu hiꞌa-ka, aromo-ra, hepu-rai, ma araatoaimo, ii modobo bia bubui hapuo keehi ata, omodadeai.
16.18: “Dubu ata ooboi aia memeheai, kaida oobo ata amomia, ruu imo aꞌai-ka, kamia boꞌu-ro momia emeheai ooboi, ruu rautu imo-ka.” Raara hiiro-hiiro dubui, Rasaro rautu
16.19: Kaida pimoaduꞌo ara obeegiri Iesu-ro. “Raara hiiro-hiiro dubu ata, ai-porododiaitutidio, geemaꞌeema hiꞌa taꞌii hipurai-da, kamia ioroiꞌioi, hoꞌu hiꞌa poroiꞌio, turiaha himioi.
16.20: Kamia raara tiato dubu ata, ruu pairai, Rasaro, turiaha ruu tuupi umai haa-ro piiꞌa, ruu ai-poaꞌoiadioumo raara hiiro-hiiro dubui, birii eito.
16.21: Ruu rio aꞌai-ka, raara hiiro-hiiro dubui, araaho iiho du toꞌurei, ma iihoi-ri, kamia umui ooꞌumoi-ka, ruu umai ma ohomeumoi-ri.
16.22: “Ka raara tiato dubui iihiai-ka, ka arerui-ro, ruu urioi aiha pomodaumo Aberahamo taitai eito. Kaida raara hiiro-hiiro dubui rautu aiha piihiai, uuꞌumaimoi-ka.
16.23: Kaida, giimui uubi reꞌei-da, geega temeteme paꞌai, ida iimaromiai-da, pemeeꞌa Aberahamo auꞌo hiꞌai-da, Rasaro ruu kekai-da pemidio.
16.24: Kaida geega madei-to paaꞌo, ‘Aba Aberahamo, moo giiꞌepu remaꞌai! Rasaro otiodoai tu hurai oboi-da ma odobiai, ka moo totobei guuaꞌo ma rododiai, mabu moo temeteme hiꞌa-ka, ara erai tuiai-da.’
16.25: “Irai Aberahamo-ro, omoaimai-ka, ‘Moo meree, roo-ro amiraromo, roo ioroiꞌio himioi-da, rooi-do meamea hiꞌa raarai-ro piiꞌa, irai Rasaroi-do memiho hiꞌa raarai-ro, piiꞌa. Ka ruu doꞌou geꞌii-daka, ahiou-da, kamia roo, temetemei-daka, irehieꞌei-da.
16.26: Kamia ire gomo hiꞌa boboi ireirie rimo ipituiai-da, kaida boꞌu rio-rie ooꞌui, modobo bia, kamia modobo bia meree ata ma aabui roo hapuoi eito.’
16.27: Raara hiiro-hiiro dubui-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Aba Aberahamo, moo ai-roroaro, Rasaro otiodoai ma odai, moo abeai motoi eito.
16.28: Moo riamiꞌoi tu-hapuo (5) ohiobaiꞌo-ka, moo rio-ka ruu ma odai, rii umoo idodiai, rii ooꞌu toe-ka temeteme mati eito.’
16.29: “Aberahamo-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Mose, kamia himogabo uubi, iꞌatimo madei rii umoo-ka, rii-ro ma oromidioi.’
16.30: Raara hiiro-hiiro dubui-ro, omoaimai-ka, ‘Irai, Aba Aberahamo, meree ata aia meibua, iihiai-da, ka ma odai-ri, rii iduuꞌai, ka rii ireheꞌeai aꞌai kaumo, memihoi-da.’
16.31: Irai Aberahamo-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Rii Mosei-re, kamia himogabo uubi-rei eito iroomidio tiato-ra, ka iihiai-da eibuai aꞌai mereei, madei oromidioi aꞌai bia.’ ”

17.1: Iesu-ro ruu iimatomudio mereei eito aaꞌoi-ka, “Uubi memihoi-da iiraahioi aꞌai raarai ai-iobodiituti kaumo, irai memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, aaꞌo erematuhuti oomahoroi aꞌai mereei eito.
17.2: Memiho-ka meree ata gigii-da, roꞌoa kopi geega otohiai, ka tibiri tuiai-da ma epeduai, irai memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai meree keehi ata boꞌu-ro momodau memiho raara ma aꞌai-ri.
17.3: Kaida meaha ma ereaꞌai roo raꞌu maꞌai. “Kamia roo riaraamui memiho oroiꞌio amaꞌai, erehei-to ma otomui, ida ruu memiho oroiꞌioi aia memeheai, ka ruu memihoi ma emapihiti.
17.4: Kamia rooi-do memiho oroiꞌio amaꞌai, himio gaaꞌui goroi-da semeri (7) modoboi-to, ka orooho semeri (7) himio gaaꞌu-gaaꞌui-da, ruu-ro aia maaꞌotuti, ‘Moo memiho oroiꞌioi tauo pirimeheai’, ka roo-ro ruu memihoi ma emapihiti.” Pupuo iraromoi-ka
17.5: Iiapui made himoꞌa uubi-ro aaꞌoi-ka, Paidubui eito, “Rimo pupuo iraromoi geegaꞌeega rimododiai.”
17.6: Paidubui-ro imoaimai-ka, “Riꞌo pupuo iraromoi hiꞌuai hura keekei aibo-ra, ka riꞌo-ro ara ruꞌa geegai oduuꞌai aꞌai kaumo, ‘Roo aaꞌuubai hipi rautu turiaha, ka odau tibiri tuiai-da ma araraaro,’ ka ruu-ro, roo aaꞌo modoboi ododiai aꞌai. Himoꞌa mereei, omaꞌati-ka
17.7: “Kamia riꞌo gaaꞌubuo ata, himoꞌa meree rautu-ra, ida hepui ma auhioi, ee, mamoei ma iaꞌai hauꞌii-da, ida aaꞌo reꞌei-da araimai-da, roo-ro ruu oduuꞌai amaꞌai, dui hioi-to ma iihoi-ri?
17.8: Abiarie! Modobo bia! Roo-ro ruu oduuꞌai aꞌai, ‘Moo adimo dui remaumodii, meaha orododiai, ka roo dui iito hipurai oromio, ka moo roomoto, moo riiho-ka, riidio-ka, roo dui didimoi-to iihoi aꞌai.’
17.9: Himoꞌa mereei, iraromoi aꞌai bia epuuhoro dubui-ro, keito made ma emaꞌai ruu rioi ododiai-ri.
17.10: Aaꞌo emerai-ka roo rautu, roo ododiai-ri oduuꞌai raarai turiaha aia midodiai, ma aaꞌoi, ‘Rimo raa himoꞌa uubi beha-ka, rimo himia omaꞌati raꞌai kaumo.’ ” Iesu-ro, teri (10) dububaiꞌoi iidomoiai-ka
17.11: Iesu gaboi iimadaꞌui-da, Samaria-ra, Garereia-rai, ieremahiaimo hiaꞌei-ha podau, Ierusaremai-to.
17.12: Iesu goꞌoto ata podoro, ida pimeeꞌa, teri (10) dububaiꞌo mobibi gimoi rautu, rii auꞌoi haato pitooꞌutiimo.
17.13: Ida pai rautu madei-to paaꞌoumo, “Iesu-o! Epuudubu-o! Rimo giiꞌepu rimaꞌai!”
17.14: Iesu-ro, rii iimeeꞌai-da piduuꞌai, “ Odaumo, Iehomai-do poue emaꞌatidio dubui-ro, riꞌo ma imaꞌeemuti.” Ka rii iodaumo goroi haato, tamai oodomoiaumoi-ka.
17.15: Ata gaaꞌui-ro himia iereemeeꞌai-da, ruu tauo-ha poodomoia, ka ruu iaraimai-da Iesui-do, Iehoma geegaꞌeega madei-to, pemarahue.
17.16: Ruu iimohorai-ka, Iesu oto reꞌei-da, keito made aaꞌoi-ka. Aaꞌo dubui Samaria dubu-ka.
17.17: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Ire hiei-da turiaha imodomoiaumo teri-da (10), rairi (9), heiꞌe-ra?
17.18: Mabui raꞌu-rie, mati ata meree haa-ro araimai, Iehoma emarahuei?”
17.19: Iesu-ro aaꞌo-ka ruui-do, “Eibua, odau, roo pupuo iraromoi-ro, roo mea tauo ododiai maaka.” Uubihaubi Mereei ooꞌui aꞌai himioi (Matiu 24:23-28,37-41)
17.20: Himio ata, Pariseia uubi aamiꞌa-ro, Iesu atohetaimoi-ka, “Iehoma pai emidio erarai raa himiou ooꞌui maꞌai?” Ruu-ro, rii imoaimai-ka, “Iehoma pai emidio erarai, roo-ro eaꞌai-ri iraromo emerai-da, eaꞌai aꞌai bia.
17.21: Meree ata-ro, araibau aaꞌoi aꞌai bia, ‘Emeeꞌa araarie!’ Kamia, ‘Auꞌoirie!’ Mabu Iehoma pai emidio erarai riꞌo reꞌei-da ireirie.”
17.22: Ida Iesu-ro ruu iimatomudio uubi eito aaꞌoi-ka, “Himio ata ooꞌui aꞌai, roo-ro rio hiꞌa aꞌai aꞌai, Uubihaubi Mereei ooꞌui aꞌai himioi ma eaꞌai-ri, irai roo-ro eaꞌai aꞌai bia.
17.23: Aamiꞌai-ro aaꞌoi aꞌai kaumo riꞌoi-do, ‘Emeeꞌaumo, auꞌoirie!’ Kamia, ‘Emeeꞌaumo araarie!’ Irai odai bia kekai eito oohoi.
17.24: Aromoi hapuo atai-da, bereberei aia meremabeai, ruu hehei-ro aromoi adiai aꞌai, ka hehei aabui aꞌai hapuo atai eito, ka Uubihaubi Mereei himioi-da, aaꞌo emerau orododiai aꞌai.
17.25: Irai epuui-da, ruu geema hiꞌa riibo, omiꞌai aꞌai, ka maraibo duumo, doꞌou ara himioi uubi-ro.
17.26: Roa himioi-da, iooꞌa emerai ooꞌai aꞌai, Uubihaubi Mereei himioi-da.
17.27: Turiaha uubi, iiho idioi paꞌaimo, upi dubu iiorooboumo, ida pooꞌu aaꞌo himioi, Roa oroi-ka pee geegai-da, borei iooꞌui-da turiaha uubi aiha piimoto, rituo-rituo-ha.
17.28: Roti himioi-da, iooꞌa emerai, turiaha uubi iiho idio, oroomoamee, iodouti, kamia ititi paꞌaimo.
17.29: Irai aaꞌo himioi-da, Roti-ro, Sodoma goꞌoto geegai iemeheai-da, erai erara hiꞌa roꞌoa kopi-kopi rautu, aromoi-da mihaei emerai paaꞌo, turiaha aiha piimoto.
17.30: Aaꞌo emerai orododiai aꞌai Uubihaubi Mereei himioi ooꞌui aꞌai-da.
17.31: Aaꞌo himiou-da, meree ata motoi ubui-dara, ruu ooꞌuoi aꞌai bia, motoi rioi-da raarai ma imidai-ri. Aatu emerai meree ata hauꞌii-dara, ruu araimai aꞌai bia motoi eito, raarai ma imidai-ri.
17.33: Boiꞌo-ro miraromo duumo, rii oroiꞌioi iraahoꞌoi, iatoai aꞌai kaumo, kamia boiꞌo oroiꞌioi miatoai duumo, rii oroiꞌioi iraahoꞌoi aꞌai kaumo.
17.34: Riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai araibau, aaꞌo duoi-da, retoꞌa mereeti, gaaꞌu-ha irobui aꞌai, atai eidai aꞌai, atai emeheai aꞌai.
17.35: -36 Retoꞌa (2) ooboti, raa-hurai iatuꞌuti aꞌai kaido, atai eidai aꞌai, atai emeheai aꞌai.”
17.37: Iimatomudio mereei-ro, Iesu atohetai-ka, “Heiꞌe-rie, Paidubu-o?” Ruu-ro imoaimai-ka, “Rituo tuupi ratii-darie, oaꞌoai odabuai aꞌai kaumo, hiꞌei-da.”

18.1: Ka Iesu-ro ruu iimatomudio mereei obeegiri imoaduꞌoi-ka, rii ma imatomudioi-ri, rii turiaha ma irudemeumo aiboi, ka irudemei-da rii haꞌima aꞌaimoꞌai-ri.
18.2: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Goꞌoto ata-to ai-pemidio bubui umoo hiꞌa dubu ata, Iehomai-do toe iꞌatidio bia, kamia uubi imaabeedio bia.
18.3: Ka oobo himu ata, aaꞌo goꞌotoi-da pemidio, ruu ai-poroohodio, aaꞌo dubui eito, ruu kiritooto iemaꞌatidio mereei bubui-da ma omodadeai-ri. Ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Moo romoabai, moo meree ata-ro kiritooto remaꞌatidio!’
18.4: Tutuu himio, ruu rio tiato piꞌatidio omoabai, irai iarai-da, ruu himiai-do oromoaduꞌoi-ka, ‘Moo Iehomai-do toe iꞌatidio bia, kamia moo uubi imaabeedio bia,
18.5: irai ara oobo himui-ro, turiaha himioi moo aiha romorooho, aaꞌo rau-ri, moo-ro eaꞌai raꞌai ruu odomoiai bubui-da. Mabu moo-ro aꞌai tiato-ra, ruu aiha oroohoi aꞌai, ka iarai-da, moo haꞌima ododiai aꞌai!’ ”
18.6: Ka Paidubui-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Oromidioumo, ire bubui umoo hiꞌa dubui aaꞌo raai, irai ruu memiho-ka.
18.7: Ida Iehoma-ro, ruu himia uubi bubui-da imoabai amaꞌai, ruu himio-ra duo-raida atohei-ri, ma imoabai-ri? Modobo-ka. Kamia ruu-ro rii emera-ha imoabai amaꞌai? Abiarie, modobo bia.
18.8: Moo-ro riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai, rii rioi-da bubui-da imoabai aꞌai, ka hio hiꞌai-to ododiai aꞌai. Irai Uubihaubi Mereei ooꞌui aꞌai-da, pupuo iraromo moꞌui emeeꞌai amaꞌai ara hepui-da?” Retoꞌa dubuoti irudemeai iodaido obeegiri-ka
18.9: Aamiꞌa uubi-ro ai-piraromoumo, rii beha mea-ka, rii iraromoi-da uubi amiꞌai mea bia, kaida pimoaduꞌo Iesu-ro, ara obeegiri.
18.10: “Retoꞌa dubuoti, ai-piioido irudeme motoi-da irudemeai, atai Pariseia dubu-ka, atai taketi imoamee dubui-ka.
18.11: “Ka Pariseia dubui ruu himia-ha pitooꞌa, iirudemeai-da paaꞌo, ‘Iehoma-o, moo keito raaꞌo rooi-do, moo turiaha uubi aibo bia, moo iiho-toto meree bia, moo erematuhuti meree bia, kamia moo imo-dubu bia, kamia moo aire taketi imoamee dubui aibo bia.
18.12: Moo puura gaaꞌui goroi-da retoꞌa himio, imaꞌui emidioi-ka, kamia moo puura gaaꞌui goroi-da, imeeꞌatuti teri (10) raarai-da, gaaꞌubuoi roo emaꞌai-ka.’
18.13: “Irai taketi imoamee dubui auꞌo aibo haato pitooꞌa, ruu hohoi imaromia bia aromoi eito, gomoi aramaꞌedeai-ka, ida paaꞌo, ‘Iehoma-o, moo giiꞌepu remaꞌai, moo memiho meree-ka.’ ”
18.14: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, riiti iodaidoi-da himia-himia motoi eito, Iehoma hohoi-da mea hiꞌa iiꞌi mereei taketi iimoamee dubui-ka, Pariseia dubui bia. Boiꞌo-ro, moroomomiourio duumo, rii ioruoi aꞌai kaumo, kamia boiꞌo-ro, moromomoruodio duumo, rii iioi aꞌai kaumo.” Iesu-ro meree keekei iahoꞌoi-ka (Matiu 19:13-15; Maka 10:13-16)
18.15: Uubi aamiꞌai, meree keekei ai-pimooꞌumo, Iesu tui rii hoꞌui-da ma iaaꞌoi-ri, kaida iimatomudio mereei-ro, ieaꞌaumoi-da erehe madei-to pimaaꞌoumo,
18.16: irai, Iesu-ro meree keekei aiha piahoꞌoo, ida paaꞌo “Imeheaimo, meree keekei mooꞌumo-ka mooi-do, mabu Iehoma pai emidio erarai, rii aibo uubi-ro eidai aꞌai kaumo.
18.17: Moo-ro riꞌo ihaha riduuꞌai, boꞌu-ro eidai tiato maꞌai, meree keehi aibo, Iehoma pai emidio erarai, ruu-ro odoroi aꞌai bia.” Raara hiiro-hiiro dubui-ka (Matiu 19:16-30; Maka 10:17-31)
18.18: Iuda epuuhoro dubu ata-ro, Iesu atohetai-ka, “Mea imatomudio dubu-o, moo raꞌu ododiai raꞌai tutuu oroiꞌioi ma reidai-ri?”
18.19: Iesu-ro, ruu atohetai-ka, “Roo-ro moo raꞌu-ri meai-to rahoꞌoo? Meree gaaꞌu ata mea bia, Iehoma beha-ka.
18.20: Roo umoo-ka Iehoma bubui, ‘Imo aꞌai bia, maꞌoamo aꞌai bia, piro aꞌai bia, meree ata paira ematuhuti aibo, ahoꞌoi bia, roo maamu-ra, abea-rai, ma imaabei.’ ”
18.21: Aaꞌo dubui-ro omoaimai-ka, “Moo keehibuoi imooꞌu doꞌou, moo-ro ara bubui turiaha tauo pirimaabedio.”
18.22: Iesu-ro aaꞌo madei ioroomai-da, ruui-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Gaaꞌu hiꞌa raa ireirie, roo-ro ma ododiai, roo reꞌei-da iiꞌaa raarai turiaha taꞌii-to ita omameumo, ka mori raara tiato uubi ita imaꞌati, kaida roo-ro, meamea raarai imeeꞌai aꞌai aromoi-da, ka ooꞌu, moo robodo.”
18.23: Irai aaꞌo dubui-ro, ara madei ioroomai-da, ruu giiꞌepu hiꞌa paꞌai, mabu ruu raara hiiro-hiiro dubu-ka.
18.24: Iesu-ro, ruu giiꞌepu hohoi ieaꞌai-da, paaꞌo, “Aahuu hiꞌa-ka, raara hiiro-hiiro mereei-ro, Iehoma pai emidio erarai goroi odoroi,
18.25: aahuu-ka kameroi, iroi gaꞌerei ma odoroi, kaida aahuu hiꞌa-ka raara hiiro-hiiro mereei-ro, Aiai Iehoma pai emidio erarai goroi odoroi.”
18.26: Ioromidioumo uubi-ro, ruu atohetaimoi-ka, “Ka roo aaꞌo raarai ihaha-ro ooꞌaato, tutuu oroiꞌioi boꞌu-ro eidai maꞌai?”
18.27: Iesu-ro imoaimai-ka, “Raꞌu-rie modobo tiato raai uubi eito, Iehomai-do modobo-ka.”
18.28: Kaida Petero-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Ka ma emeeꞌa, rimo goꞌoto-goꞌotoi ai-pirimeheaimo, roo ma robodoumoi-ri.”
18.29: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka rii-do, “Moo-ro, riꞌo ihaha riduuꞌai, meree ata-ro, goꞌotoi aia memeheai, ooboi-re, riaraamui-re, maamu-ra abea-raire, kamia mereei-re, Iehoma pai emidio erarai iraromoi-ri,
18.30: ruu-ro hiiro hiꞌa meai imidai aꞌai ara ooꞌa himioi-da, ka tutuu oroiꞌioi, emaꞌai aꞌai ooꞌui aꞌai himioi-da.” Iesu iihiai ioaduꞌoi-ka Ierusaremaato (Matiu 20:17-19; Maka 10:32-34)
18.31: Iesu-ro ruu iimatomudio tuero (12) mereei, imodadeai-ka kekai eito, ida paaꞌo rii-do, “Oromidioumo! Rimo ai-riioo kaumo Ierusaremai-to, ka turiaha raarai iaha hiꞌai oobodi aꞌai kaumo himogabo uubi-ro iꞌatimo emerai Uubihaubi Mereei-ri.
18.32: Ruu emaꞌai aꞌai kaumo Iuda guui-da paira tiato uubi eito, ka madei-da emerioi aꞌai kaumo, omomoruodioi aꞌai kaumo, ka oobei-da mamouti duumo.
18.33: Ka rii-ro ruu ororihoi aꞌai kaumo, ka maiꞌia duumo rituo-ha, irai retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) himioi didimoi-da, oroitorai aꞌai oroiꞌioi eito.”
18.34: Irai iimatomudio tuero (12) mereei-ro, umoo iiꞌimo bia, ruu turiaha iaaꞌo raarai, madei iha hiꞌai ai-pimoapiꞌoma rii reꞌei-da, kamia rii-ro umoo iiꞌimo bia, Iesu ioroaduꞌuti raarai. Iesu-ro idomai tiato dubui iodomoiai-ka (Matiu 20:29-34; Maka 10:46-52)
18.35: Iesu Ieriko taitai ioohiai-da, idomai tiato dubu ata, gaboi barai-da pemidio, ai-poroarodio.
18.36: Kaida piromidio uubi hiiroi iorohotutimoi-da, ruu-ro araatoi-ka, “Raꞌu maꞌai duumo?”
18.37: Rii-ro ruu oduuꞌaimoi-ka, “Rasareta dubui Iesu-ro orohodi.”
18.38: Ruu-ro geema madei-to aaꞌoi-ka, “Damida mereei Iesu-o, moo giiꞌepu remaꞌai!”
18.39: Iesu hoho reꞌei imadaꞌuimo uubi-ro udoi-to ai-pemaaꞌoumo, ka oduuꞌaimoi-ka piroha ma iiꞌi-ri, irai pairautu hiꞌa madei-to aaꞌoi-ka, “Damida mereei-o, moo giiꞌepu remaꞌai!”
18.40: Iesu iimadaꞌui-da, otoꞌai-ka, ida paaꞌo, “Omooꞌumo,” ka omooꞌumoi-ka Iesu taitai eito, Iesu-ro atohetai-ka,
18.41: “Roo raꞌu rio maꞌai, moo-ro ma romododiai?” Ka ruu-ro omoaimai-ka, “Paidubu-o, moo rio-ka ma riaꞌa.”
18.42: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka ruui-do, “Ka iaꞌa! Roo pupuo iraromoi-ro, tauo odomoia maaka.”
18.43: Ruu idomai gaaꞌu hiꞌa-ha odomoiai-ka, kiauka aiha pomahoro Iesu obodoi, Iehoma emarahue-ha. Turiaha uubi-ro ieaꞌaumoi-da, Iehoma aiha pemarahueumo.

19.1: Iesu Ieriko iodoroi-da, goꞌotoi tuiai imadaꞌui omahoroi-ka.
19.2: Aaꞌo reꞌei-da taketi iimoamee uubi epuuhoro dubu ata pairai-ka, Sakaio, ruu raara hiiro-hiiro dubu-ka.
19.3: Ruu rio-ka Iesu ma emeeꞌai, ruu boꞌu-rie, uubi hiiroi tuiai-da, irai modobo bia mabu ruu komubuo dubu-ka
19.4: Aaꞌo raꞌu-ri, ruu hioi-to podau rii epuui-da gaabi aibo ruꞌai pioro Iesu ma eaꞌai-ri, mabu Iesu aaꞌo reꞌei gaboi-ha orohodi aꞌai-ri.
19.5: Iesu aaꞌo mati eito iooꞌui-da, imaromiai-da paaꞌo Sakaioi-do, “Sakaio, oruo hioi-to, mabu moo roo motoi-da emidioi raꞌai ara himioi.”
19.6: Sakaio hio hiꞌa-ha pooꞌuo, ka Sakaio-ro Iesu geꞌii hiꞌa rautu poꞌopai.
19.7: Turiaha iomahoroi-da, ieaꞌaumo uubi piro-piro made aaꞌoumoi-ka, “Ara dubui ai-odau memiho dubui motoi eito.”
19.8: Sakaio iotoꞌai-da paaꞌo, Paidubui eito, “Paidubu-o, oromidio! Moo raarai itoodei raꞌai raara tiato uubi ma rimaꞌati-ri. Kamia moo-ro meree ata aia rematuhia, ruu iroaidai raai omoaimai raꞌai, kamia ata retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3), ruu hoꞌui-da, taꞌii aꞌai raꞌai.”
19.9: Ka Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ruui-do, “Ara motoi eito omoaabai, oroiꞌioi tauo ooꞌu maaka, ara himioi-da. Mabu ara dubui Aberahamo aramui ata-ka.
19.10: Uubihaubi mereei ai-pooꞌu iaratoaimoi iohoi, ka ma imooꞌui oroiꞌioi eito.” Tuuoti (10) moto himoꞌa mereei obeegiri-ka (Matiu 25:14-30)
19.11: Ida uubi-ro ara madei ioromidioumoi-da, Iesu-ro iemahurai reꞌei-da omahoroi-ka, ida pimoaduꞌo ara obeegiri. Ruu taitai hiꞌa-ka Ierusaremaato, kaida rii-ro ai-piraromoumo Iehoma pai emidio erarai ihaha-ka, oobodi aꞌai.
19.12: Kaida Iesu-ro paaꞌo, “Hoꞌu epuuhoro dubu ata, ai-podau auꞌo hiꞌa hepui-to, Pai ma edeeꞌaumoi-ri, ka didimoi-to ma araimai goꞌotoi eito, pai ma emidioi-ri.
19.13: Ruu emeheai tiatoi-da, ruu tuuoti (10) moto himoꞌa uubi iahoꞌotiai-ka, mori gaaꞌu-gaaꞌui iimaꞌati-da, piduuꞌai, ‘Ita oroomaemeumo, ara mori-da, moo odai aꞌai muioi-da.’
19.14: Ruu himia uubi-ro, rio tiato pemaꞌaimo, ruu pai ma emidioi-ri, ka aaꞌo raꞌu-ri, made himoꞌa uubi pemetiodoaimo, didimoi-da, pai epuuhoro dubui, ma omoaduꞌoumoi-ri, ‘Rimo rio bia ara dubui, rimo pai emidioi.’
19.15: “Aaꞌo dubui paidubu tauo pododiaimo, kaida iaraimai-da, made edeꞌai-ka, ruu moto himoꞌa uubi ma oobodimoi-ri ruu hohoi-da, umoo ma iiꞌi-ri raꞌaibou idodiaimo.
19.16: Epuu mereei ooꞌui-ka, ida paaꞌo, ‘Paidubu-o, moo tuuoti (10) mori hura-hura piridodiai, roo-ro iremaꞌai mori gaaꞌui-da.’
19.17: Ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Mea hiꞌa paꞌai. Roo mea moto himoꞌa meree-ka. Roo keeke raarai-da iraromoi ooꞌai-ri, roo moo-ro tuuoti (10) paipai goꞌoto epuuhoro edeꞌai raꞌai.’
19.18: Epuui moto himoꞌa mereei didimoi mereei, ooꞌui-ka, ida paaꞌo, ‘Paidubu-o, moo-ro tu-hapuo (5) mori hura-hura piridodiai, roo-ro iremaꞌai mori gaaꞌui-da.’
19.19: Aaꞌo moto himoꞌa mereei eito, ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Roo tu-hapuo (5) paipai goꞌoto epuuhoro aꞌai aꞌai.’
19.20: “Ata moto himoꞌa mereei ooꞌui-ka, ida paaꞌo, ‘Paidubu-o, ara-rie roo mori, moo-ro ai-piremedeeꞌa, hipura keehi-da iretebeai.
19.21: Mabu roo aahuu dubu-ka, kamia roromo-ka, moo rooi-do toe piraꞌai, roo raa bia, irai eidai-ka, idoꞌoi-ka roo-ro iodouti tiatoi.’
19.22: Ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka aaꞌo mereei eito, ‘Roo memiho moto himoꞌa meree-ka! Moo-ro roo himia madei modoboi-da odoboai raꞌai! Roo umoo-ka moo aahuu dubu-ka, kamia roromo-ka, moo raa bia irai eidai-ka, idoꞌoi-ka moo-ro iiodouti tiatoi.
19.23: Kamia raꞌu mabu ato-ra, roo-ro moo mori iiꞌa motoi-da emedeꞌa tiato? Kaida moo-ro ma rimidai hoꞌui-da emaꞌoai mori rautu, iiraimai-da.’
19.24: “Kaida ruu-ro iotimo uubi eito aaꞌoi-ka, ‘Mori omodadeaimo ruu reꞌei-da, ka emaꞌaimo tuuooti (10) mori hurai iꞌapudio moto himoꞌa mereei eito.’
19.25: Irai rii-ro paaꞌoumo, ‘Paidubu-o, ruu tuuoti (10) mori hura-hurai imiohidio!’
19.26: Ruu-ro pimoaimai, ‘Moo-ro riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai, boꞌou reꞌei-da miiꞌa raarai, ka hiiroi ruui-do ma emaꞌai. Irai boꞌu-ra raara tiatoi, ka ruu reꞌei ooꞌa keehibuo rautu, turiaha ooaidai aꞌai.
19.27: Ka, doꞌo hiꞌai, ire mooi-do heamo uubi, rii boiꞌo-ro rio tiato aꞌaimo, moo rii Paidubu ma riiꞌi, imooꞌumo, ahiou eito ma imotoumo moo hohoi-da.’ ” Iesu Ierusarema iodoroi-ka (Matiu 21:1-11; Maka 11:1-11; Ioare 12:12-19)
19.28: Iesu aaꞌo madei iaaꞌo didimoi-da, ruu rii epuui-da pidiai Ierusaremai-to.
19.29: Ka ruu iooꞌui-da, Betapagi-re Betari-re goꞌotoi taitai, Orime roꞌoai-da, ruu iimatomudio mereei-da, retoꞌai (2) itiodoai-ka, epuui-da ma odaidoi-ri,
19.30: ara madei rautu, “Odaido auoirie epuui ooꞌa goꞌotoi eito, riꞌoiti iidoi-da emeeꞌai aꞌai kaido otoꞌa hoho doriki ata orotohiatidioi-da, meree ata-ro emiꞌei bia ruu ohui-da. Ita omopimoido, ka ita omooꞌuido ara hiou eito.
19.31: Meree ata-ro aia maraato, raꞌu-ri momopimo duumo, ita omoaduꞌoumo, ‘Epuuhoro dubui rio-ka.’ ”
19.32: Iodaidoi-da, turiaha raarai Iesu-ro iaaꞌo emerai-ha pimeꞌaido.
19.33: Riiti-ro doriki imi iomopimoidoi-da, doriki abeai-ro paaꞌo, riiti-do, “Raꞌu-ri momopimo duido riꞌoiti-ro?”
19.35: Ka riiti-ro doriki aiha pomodaido Iesui-do, riiti turiaha ohui hipura tutuꞌutui, doriki hoꞌui-da aiha pihoꞌoutido, Iesu omoabaidoi-ka, ma ioroi-ri.
19.36: Iesu doriki-da iooꞌui-da, uubi hipura tutuꞌutui aiha pihoꞌoutimo gaboi ipi-da.
19.37: Ruu iooꞌui-da Ierusarema taitai eito, Orime roꞌoai ioruodio gaboi-da, ruu iimatomudio uubi geemai-ro, Iehoma pairautu madei-to pemarahueumo, kamia keito made aaꞌoumoi-ka, rii-ro turiaha pai raarai iaꞌaumoi-da.
19.38: Rii-ro paaꞌoumo, “Iehoma meai ai-ooꞌa, Paidubui-da, boꞌu-ro mooꞌu Iehoma pairai-da, kamia miroi ai-ooꞌa aromoi-da, ka hoꞌu hiꞌai Iehomai, ai-remarahue kaumo!”
19.39: Kaida aamiꞌa Pariseia uubi-ro paaꞌoumo uubi tuiai-da Iesui-do, “Imatomudio dubu-o, roo iimatomudio mereei erehe madei-to imaaꞌo piroha ma iiꞌimo!”
19.40: Iesu-ro imoaimai-ka, “Moo-ro riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai, rii piroha amiiꞌi duumo, roꞌoa kopi-kopi-ro geegaꞌeega made aaꞌoi aꞌai kaumo.” Iesu-ro Ierusarema giiꞌepu pemaꞌai
19.41: Ruu iohiꞌiai-da goꞌoto geegai taitai eito, kaida ruu-ro ieaꞌai-da, idebi pemaꞌai.
19.42: Ka ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “O, riꞌo umoꞌu-ha umoo ita iiꞌimo, riꞌo geꞌebadi raꞌu-ro imomooꞌui maꞌai! Irai riꞌo-ro doꞌou eaꞌaa bia!
19.43: Himio ata ooꞌui aꞌai, riꞌo boho uubi-ro, roꞌoa hepu marai-da iimoaaꞌei aꞌai kaumo, ka riꞌo rioi-da imomurai aꞌai kaumo, turiaha hapuo-hapuoi-da.
19.44: Riꞌo ihaha itoeꞌauti aꞌai kaumo, ka riꞌo hoai rioi uubi-re, roꞌoa kopi ata emeheai aꞌai bia, ruu himia boboi-da. Mabu riꞌo-ro oibomaimo bia, Iehoma iooꞌu himioi, riꞌo imoabai.” Iesu irudeme motoi iodoroi-ka (Matiu 21:12-17; Maka 11:15-19; Ioare 2:13-22)
19.45: Iesu irudeme motoi iodoroi-da, raarai ioromoameumo uubi ibodidioi omahoroi-ka kekai eito.
19.46: Ka rii iduuꞌai-ka, “Iehoma made bukai-da tauo piꞌatimo, ‘Moo motoi irudeme moto-ka,’ irai riꞌo-ro ai-pemeheꞌeaimo piroi opiꞌo mati-to!”
19.47: Turiaha himioi Iesu ai-pimatomudiotuti, irudeme motoi-da. Ka Iehoma poue emaꞌati uubi epuuhoro uubi-re, bubui imatomudio uubi-re, kamia uubi epuuhoro uubi-re, rii rio-ka Iesu ma aiꞌiaumo.
19.48: Irai rii-ro ruu ma aiꞌiaumo gabo emeemeꞌa bia, mabu turiaha uubi ruu-ha poromidioumo. Rii rio bia made ipi ata ihimoi.

20.1: Ata himioi Iesu irudeme motoi-da uubi pimatomudio, ka pai meai madei imoaduꞌuti-ka, Iehomai-do poue emaꞌatidio uubi epuuhoroiꞌoi-re, bubui imatomudio uubi-re, ka pai uubi-re turiaha ooꞌumoi-ka Iesui-do.
20.2: Kaida paaꞌoumo ruui-do, “Rimo ma riduuꞌai, raꞌu eraraato maꞌai roo-ro ara raarai? Boꞌu-ro emaꞌai roo erarai, ara raarai ma aꞌai-ri?”
20.3: -4 Iesu-ro rii pimoaimai, “Doꞌou moo-ro riꞌo ai-riatohetai, moo ma roduuꞌaimo, Ioare uubi oboi-da imaaheemo erarai Iehoma reꞌei-da agooꞌu, ee, uubi reꞌei-da agooꞌu?”
20.5: Rii himia-ro omahoroi-ka oromoamoi, “Rimo-ro raꞌu aaꞌoi raꞌai duumo? Rimo-ro aia raaꞌo duumo, ‘Iehoma reꞌei-da pooꞌu,’ ruu-ro aaꞌoi aꞌai, ‘Ka raꞌu mabu-ra riꞌo pupuo iraromoi Ioareato ideꞌa, tiato?’
20.6: Kamia rimo-ro araibau araaꞌo duumo, ‘Uubi reꞌei-da pooꞌu,’ ara uubi hiiroi-ro, rimo roꞌoa kopi-da iamaꞌadei aꞌai kaumo rituo-rituo-ha, mabu rii iraromoi-da umoo tauo piiꞌimo, Ioare himogabo dubu-ka.”
20.7: Kaida rii-ro pomoaimaimo, “Rimo umoo bia ara erarai aati-da ooꞌu.”
20.8: Kaida Iesu-ro paaꞌo rii-do, “Ka moo-ro riꞌo iduuꞌai aꞌai bia, raꞌu eraraato raꞌai ara raarai.” Mire paꞌeai eaꞌa uubi (Matiu 21:33-46; Maka 12:1-12)
20.9: Kaida pimoaduꞌo Iesu-ro uubi ara obeegiri, “Dubu ata, mire paꞌea pioodouti, ka imaꞌai-ka ma emeaꞌaumoi-ri uubi eito, ka goꞌotoi iemeheai-da, tutuu hiꞌa-ha pemidio iodau mati-da.
20.10: Himioi iohiai-da mire hurai ma idoꞌoumoi-ri, himoꞌa mereei otiodoai-ka, ruu mire paꞌeai emeaꞌai imeheai uubi eito, ruu omotoodeai mire hurai ma emaꞌaimoi-ri, irai paꞌeai emeeꞌai imeheai uubi-ro himoꞌa mereei ai-pamoꞌoboumo, imotiodoaimo araimai tuhaito-ha.
20.11: Ka ata himoꞌa mereei otiodoai-ka, irai mire paꞌeai emeaꞌai imeheai uubi-ro ai-paiꞌiaumo, iemaꞌaumo, otiodaimoi-ka araimai tuhaito-ha.
20.12: Kaida potiodoai ata himoꞌa mereei, mire paꞌeai emeaꞌai imeheidio uubi-ro aiha pamaꞌadeumo, rato-ratoi rautu omohuꞌoi-ka kekai eito.
20.13: Kaida mire paꞌeai rautu mereei-ro paaꞌo, ‘Moo raꞌu aꞌai raꞌai? Moo himia hiꞌa meree ohioi otiodoai raꞌai, eaꞌai-da ihaha-ka, rii-ro ruu emaabei aꞌai kaumo.’
20.14: Irai mire paꞌeai eaꞌaumo uubi-ro iemeeꞌaumoi-da, rii himia poroduuꞌaimo, ‘Ara paꞌeai rautu dubui mereei-ka, ma raiꞌiaumo rituo-ha, ka ruu raarai, rimo raara-ro ma iiꞌai-ka.’
20.15: Kiauka rii-ro, ruu omohuꞌoi-ka, mire paꞌei-da, rituo-ha imaiꞌiaumo.” Iesu-ro iatohetai-ka, “Ka raꞌaibou-rie, mire paꞌeai rautu mereei raꞌu aꞌai maꞌai mire paꞌeai eaꞌa uubi eito?
20.16: Ruu ooꞌui aꞌai, aaꞌo uubi rituo-ha mimoto-die, ka mire paꞌeai imaꞌai aꞌai aamiꞌa eaꞌa uubi-do.” Uubi-ro ara madei ioromaimoi-da, kaida paaꞌoumo, “Ihaha bia!”
20.17: Ka Iesu-ro rii hohoi iarodio ida piatohetai, “Irai Iehoma made bukai raꞌu oroaduꞌo toto maꞌai, ara made diamoi-da? ‘Roꞌoa kopi moto ititi uubi-ro memihoi-ri araiboi, oroameheai aꞌai, ka ruu emaabe roꞌoa kopi-ro orododiai aꞌai, rii turiahai-do.’
20.18: Turiaha uubi boiꞌo-ro mirahio duumo ara roꞌoa kopi hoꞌui-da, orotoeꞌauti aꞌai kaumo kerekere-ha, kamia ire roꞌoa kopi meree ata hoꞌu ato amirahiai, aaꞌo mereei patapata hiꞌa-ha ododiai aꞌai.” Iesu taketi-ri iatohetaimoi-ka (Matiu 22:15-22; Maka 12:13-17)
20.19: Bubui imatomudio uubi-re, ka Aiai Iehomai-do poue emaꞌatidio epuuhoro uubi-re, ai-piraromoumo Iesu aiha ma oꞌapuaimo. Mabu rii umoo tauo piiꞌimo, Iesu-ro iimoaduꞌo obeegiri-da rii ai-pimooꞌamo, irai rii toe paꞌaimo uubi eito.
20.20: Ka rii-ro aꞌai emera pororohoumo. Rii-ro uubi aamiꞌa taꞌii paꞌaimo, Iesui-do ma orooahuꞌomaimo, rii aaꞌoi aꞌai madei iaha-ka. Kaida pitiodoaimo Iesu oraꞌe ma emedeꞌaumo aamiꞌa atohetaiato. Ka ma emaꞌaimo ruu Roma Gamarai erara aꞌai epuuhoro uubi tui eito.
20.21: Ara taꞌii iaꞌaimo uubi-ro paaꞌoumo Iesui-do, “Imatomudio Dubu-o, rimo umoo-ka roo aaꞌo raai-re, kamia imatomudioi-re, meaha-ka, rimo umoo-ka roo gaaꞌu emera-ka turiaha uubi eito, kamia Iehoma gaboi iha hiꞌai imatomudio.
20.22: Rimo riduuꞌai, rimo himia bubui imoamoi araꞌai duumo, Gamara Kaisarai-do taketi aꞌai-da, ee, imoamoi aꞌai bia-ra?”
20.23: Irai Iesu-ro umooi iiꞌi-da, rii erematuhuti, ida paaꞌo rii-do,
20.24: “Moo meree ata-ro mori hura gaaꞌu ma romoahuꞌomai. Boꞌu paira-ra hoho-rai-ra ara?” Rii-ro pomoaimaimo, “Gamara Kaisara.”
20.25: Ka Iesu-ro paaꞌo, “Ka meaha-ka, Kaisara raai ma emaꞌai Kaisarai-do, Iehoma raai ma emaꞌai Iehomai-do.”
20.26: Hieꞌei-da uubi hohoi-da, ruu oraꞌe emedeꞌai modobo bia, ruu himia madei-da, ka rii madei iimoaimai emerai ioromidioumoi-da, hoho-ha peremeꞌaumo kiauka piroha piiꞌimo. Oroihi iraimai aꞌai kaumo oroiꞌioi eito (Matiu 22:23-33; Maka 12:18-27)
20.27: Sadusi uubi-ro aaꞌoi, uubi oroihi-da ireibuai aꞌai bia, rii amiꞌa-ro ooꞌumoi-ka Iesui-do ida paaꞌoumo,
20.28: “Imatomudio dubu-o, Mose-ro ara bubui rimoi-do piꞌati, ‘Dubu ata aia miihiai, ida ooboi meree tiato-ha amemeheai, ruu riaraamui-ro oobo himui ma omiai, ka meree ma imeꞌaido, ka iihiai dubui mereei-to ma iahoꞌoumoi-ka.’
20.29: Ai-pemidioumo riaraamui, turiaha semeri (7), epuu mereei oobo omiai-ka, irai meree imeeꞌa tiatoi haato piihiiai.
20.30: Ka ruu iobodoi-ro omiai-ka aaꞌo oobo himui.
20.31: Ka meree ipiai-ro omiai-ka, aatu emerai raaha-ro pobodi turiaha aaꞌo semeri (7) eito. Rii aiha poroihiimo meree imeꞌatuti tiatoi haato.
20.33: Kaida oroihii ireibuai aꞌai himioi-da oroiꞌioi eito, ruu boꞌu oobo-ro ooꞌai maꞌai? Mabu turiaha semeri (7) dubu-ro poromoameheumo.”
20.34: Iesu-ro pimoaimai rii, “Doꞌou ara himioi-da, upi dubui ai-orobo kaumo.
20.35: Boiꞌo-rie Iehoma aaꞌoi-da meai, rii ireibuai aꞌai kaumo ioroihimo reꞌei-da, ka emidioi aꞌai kaumo ooꞌui aꞌai himioi-da, irai rii oroboi aꞌai bia.
20.36: Rii arerui aibo orododiai aꞌai kaumo, oroihi aꞌai bia. Rii Iehoma meree-ka, mabu rii ireibuai aꞌai kaumo oroiꞌioi eito.
20.37: Ka Mose himia-ro aahuu pododiai oroihi ireibuioi aꞌai kaumo oroiꞌioi eito. Erai-ro iiruro buꞌi ioaduꞌo made ipi-da Paidubu ai-poaduꞌo, ‘Aberahamo Iehomai-ka, Isaꞌako Iehomai-ka, kamia Iakobo Iehomai-ka.’
20.38: Ruu oroiꞌio uubi Iehoma-ka, ruu oroihi uubi Iehoma bia, turiaha uubi ai-roroiꞌio kaumo Iehoma hohoi-da.”
20.39: Bubui imatomudio uubi aamiꞌai-ro paaꞌoumo, “Imatomudio Dubu-o! Roo madei oaimai mea hiꞌa-ka.”
20.40: Kamia rii toe piraromoumo aamiꞌa atohetai made ma aaꞌoumoi-ri. Iehoma-ro iapui mereei iaratoumoi-ka (Matiu 22:41-46; Maka 12:35-37)
20.41: Iesu-ro iatohetai-ka rii, “Raꞌaibou-da maaꞌo duumo, Aiai-ro iapui mereei, Damida aramui-ro ooꞌai aꞌai?
20.42: Kamia Damida himia-ro ai-paaꞌo rahoaꞌe bukai-da, ‘Paidubui-ro, moo Pai eito paaꞌo, “Emiꞌei ara hioꞌou-da, moo iha-tui hapuoi-da,
20.43: modau-die moo-ro roo boho uubi aia rideꞌa roo otoi goroi-da oto imoti toto aibo” ’
20.44: Ka raꞌaibou-darie ruu Damida aramui? Damida-ro ruu ai-poibomai ida pahoꞌo, ‘Paidubu.’ ” Bubui imatomudio uubi ma eremaabei (Matiu 23:1-26; Maka 12:38-40)
20.45: Ka turiaha uubi ruu ioromidioumoi-da, Iesu-ro paaꞌo ruu iimatomudio mereei eito,
20.46: “Riꞌo ita eremabeumo bubui imatomudio uubi eito, boiꞌo-ro moroaꞌoiadio duumo muari hiꞌa hipura tutuꞌutui rautu, rii rio-ka imaabe rautu ma iꞌopoumo eremaro mati-da. Hoho reꞌei totoi rio-ha aꞌai-ka, idabu motoi-da ma emiꞌeitutimo, kamia meamea mati-ha ma iiohoumo mahuai-da.
20.47: Rii-ro imatuhutidio kaumo himu upibaiꞌoi, motoi piro ma imaꞌaimoi-ri. Kamia irudeme made tutuꞌutui aaꞌoi-ka ma imarahueumoi-ri! Rii imidai aꞌai riiboi memiho hiꞌa-ka!”

21.1: Iesu-ro, keka-kekai iarodioi-da piaꞌa, raara hiiro-hiiro uubi giiꞌepu raai idiꞌamoumoi-da, irudeme motoi mori idiꞌamo reꞌei-da.
21.2: Ida peaꞌa Iesu-ro raara tiato hiꞌa oobo himui-ro mori hura keeketi iiomiai-da.
21.3: Kaida ruu-ro paaꞌo, “Riꞌo moo-ro ihaha riduuꞌai, ara raara tiato oobo himui-ro edeꞌa geega hiꞌai aamiꞌai rautu idoboai-da.
21.4: Turiaha uubi aamiꞌai giiꞌepu raai iemaꞌaimoi hiiroi-da pitoodemo, irai oobo himui ruu raara tiato hiꞌai-da pedeꞌa, ruu ma oroiꞌioi raai.” Iesu-ro irudeme motoi ioaduꞌoi-ka (Matiu 24:1-2; Maka 13:1-2)
21.5: Iimatomudio meree aamiꞌai irudeme motoi poaduꞌoumo, eaꞌai-da mea hiꞌa-ka, mea hiꞌa roꞌoa kopi-kopi-da pididimo, kamia tomio hiꞌa giiꞌepu raarai iemaꞌatimo emerai Iehomai-do. Kaida Iesu-ro paaꞌo,
21.6: “Turiaha riꞌo-ro ara miaꞌa duumo raarai, himio ata ooꞌui aꞌai, roꞌoa kopi gaaꞌu ata ruu himia boboi-da emeheai aꞌai bia, turiaha ipeduai aꞌai goroi eito.” Auma-ra oromodoboa-rai (Matiu 24:3-14; Maka 13:3-13)
21.7: Rii-ro atohetaimoi-ka, “Imatomudio Dubu-o, ara raai raꞌu himio oobodi maꞌai? Ka raꞌu-ro oobodi maꞌai, aaꞌo raai oobodi aꞌai himioi taitai-da?”
21.8: Iesu-ro paaꞌo, “Ita eremabeumo, meree ata-ro imatuhiaꞌa, hiiro uubi moo pairai-da ooꞌui aꞌai kaumo, aaꞌoi aꞌai kaumo, ‘Moo ruu-ka!’ ka ‘Himioi tauo ohiai maaka!’ Irai rii ibodoumoꞌa.
21.9: Toe aꞌaimoꞌa, riꞌo-ro iromidioi aꞌai raarai, boho araiꞌia, kamia haharubuae aꞌai, araibau raarai aiha oobodi aꞌai kaumo hepui-da. Irai ara raarai-ro aaꞌo bia oropoiꞌoi himioi taitai-ka.”
21.10: Ruu ioroaduꞌuti-da, paaꞌo, “Paꞌa atai-ro paꞌa atai heamo emaꞌai aꞌai, gaaꞌu hapuoi paꞌati araiꞌiai aꞌai kaido.
21.11: Ka memiho hiꞌa mumuꞌoi orohoi aꞌai kaumo, du tiato himioi, kamia himia-himia hoho gimoi iobodi aꞌai kaumo, turiaha mati-da, ka aromoi-da toe hiꞌa iobodi tiato raarai, iobodituti aꞌai kaumo.
21.12: Moo mabu ato, ara raarai oobodi tiatoi-da, riꞌo iohii aꞌai kaumo, mimodoboa duumo, ka mideꞌa duumo, ma imahibaimoi-ri idabu motoi-da, ka mideꞌa duumo, duꞌi motoi-da, kaida imodai aꞌai kaumo pai uubi-re, epuuhoro uubi-rei hohoi eito.
21.13: Ka riꞌoi-do mea hiaꞌei-ro orododiai aꞌai, geua ma imoaduꞌoumoi-ri.
21.14: Raarai orododiai tiato himioi-da, iraromoi gaaꞌu-ha ma ideꞌai, ka roo iraromo hiiro-hiiro aꞌai aꞌai bia, roo himia-ro raꞌaibou oromoatuei maꞌai.
21.15: Mabu riꞌo moo-ro mea made, kamia mooꞌui imaꞌai raꞌai, ka roo aaꞌoi aꞌai madei rii-do heamo meree ata-ro omotaumai modobo bia.
21.16: Riꞌo abea maamui-ro, riꞌo raamiꞌoi-ro, riꞌo guu uubi-ro, ka riꞌo taitai riaraamui-ro, imaꞌai aꞌai kaumo epuuhoro uubi eito, aamiꞌai iimotoi aꞌai kaumo rituo-rituo-ha.
21.17: Moo mabu ato, roo turiaha uubi-ro udo rautu araiboi aꞌai kaumo.
21.18: Irai riꞌo epuui-da, muho gaaꞌu ata araatoai aꞌai bia.
21.19: Aahuu-ha ma ooti, ka riꞌo oroiꞌioi iapudioi aꞌai kaumo.” Iesu-ro Ierusarema otoeꞌauti ioaduꞌoi-ka (Matiu 24:15-21; Maka 13:14-19)
21.20: Iesu-ro paaꞌo, “Roo-ro eaꞌai aꞌai Ierusarema oomaaꞌei aꞌai kaumo, heamo uubi-ro, ka roo umoo-ha ita iiꞌi, taitai-ka Ierusarema otoeꞌauti.
21.21: Kaida boiꞌo-rie Iudeaato, ma odaudioi hioi-to roꞌoai eito, ka goꞌoto geegai-da boiꞌo-rie, ma odaudioi, ka boiꞌo-rie aamiꞌa mati-da, iidoi bia goꞌoto geegai eito.
21.22: Ka aaꞌo himioi Iehoma kamai araꞌai himioi-ka, Iehoma made bukai-da iꞌatimo emerai ihahai ma oobodi-ri.
21.23: Aaꞌo himioi-da memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, topii rautu upi-re, kamia meree guge rautu maamiꞌoi eito! Kaida, pauo hiꞌa oroiꞌioi ara hepu hoꞌui-da irahiai aꞌai, ka Iehoma udoi uubi eito aꞌai aꞌai.
21.24: Aamiꞌai hapuo-hapuoi hiꞌua eꞌakerei-ro iimotoi aꞌai, aamiꞌai itohiti aꞌai kaumo ma imodaumoi-ri aamiꞌa hepui eito. Iuda guui-da paira tiato uubi-ro Ierusarema atuꞌuti aꞌai kaumo, modau-die, rii himioi mohiai. Uubihaubi Mereei ooꞌui aꞌai emerai-ka (Matiu 24:29-31; Maka 13:24-27)
21.25: “Aamiꞌa aape raara iobodi aꞌai kaumo, himioi-da, omei-da, kamia oroꞌioi-da. Ara hepu geemai-da, emidioumo uubi, pauo hiꞌa iraromo rautu emidioi aꞌai kaumo, kamia toe aꞌai aꞌai kaumo, tibiri aubo geemaꞌeemai diamoi oromidioi aꞌai-da.
21.26: Aromoi iiꞌa raarai oomuoi aꞌai-da, uubi toei-da iimoaꞌobeaitutii aꞌai kaumo, rii omoti aꞌai-da, raꞌu-ro oobodi maꞌai duumo ara hepu geemai-da.
21.27: Kaida rii-ro eaꞌai aꞌai kaumo Uubihaubi Mereei dumoi goroi-da ooꞌui aꞌai, ruu himia erarai-re, kamia geega hiꞌa tomioi rautu.
21.28: Ara raarai orododiai omahoroi-da, ita itooꞌaumo, epuui ma imiꞌaimo, mabu riꞌo oroiꞌioi eidai taitai-ka.” Ruꞌai obeegiri imoaduꞌoi-ka (Matiu 24:32-35; Maka 13:28-31)
21.29: Kaida rii pimoaduꞌo Iesu-ro ara obeegiri, “Ma iraromoumo, hura iihodio ruꞌai gaabii aibo, kamia aamiꞌa ruꞌai-re.
21.30: Riꞌo-ro rii iaꞌai-da pahai ioboodi amomahoro duumo, roo umoo iiꞌi aꞌai, tuomoi himioi taitai-ka.
21.31: Aatu emera gaboi-da, riꞌo-ro iaꞌai aꞌai kaumo ara raarai ooboodimoi aꞌai emerai, riꞌo umoo iiꞌi aꞌai kaumo Iehoma pai emidio erarai ooꞌui taitai-ka.
21.32: “Moo-ro riꞌo ihaha riduuꞌai, ara raarai ooboodimoi aꞌai kaumo, doꞌou emidio uubi oroihi tiatoi-da.
21.33: Aromo-ra hepu-rai oropoiꞌoi aꞌai kaumo, irai moo madei oropoiꞌoi aꞌai bia.” Meaha ereaꞌaumo
21.34: “Meaha ma ereaꞌaumo, riꞌo kaukai iiho-ra, idio-ra geegaꞌeegai-da riibo idodiai bia, kamia kaukai iraromo hiiro-hiiroi-da riibo idodiai bia, ara hepui oroiꞌioi pauoi-ri, mabu aaꞌo himioi-ro riꞌo oraꞌei emerai iiohiai toe-ka.
21.35: Mabu aaꞌo himioi ooꞌui aꞌai, turiaha uubi eito, ara hepu geegai-da.
21.36: Meaha ma ereaꞌai, kamia ma irudemei pupuoi-ri, ka riꞌo pupuo-ha oti aꞌai kaumo, iobodi aꞌai raarai goroi-da, kaida itoꞌai aꞌai kaumo Uubihaubi Mereei hohoi-da.”
21.37: Iesu irudeme motoi-da pimatomudiodio, himioi imatomudioi-da, ka adimoi-ro ohiai-da, odai-ka kekai eito, ka duoi Orime roꞌoai-da opoiꞌoi-ka.
21.38: Turiaha himioi duoduo hiꞌai, turiaha uubi odai-ka irudeme motoi eito, ruu ma oromidioumoi-ri.

22.1: Iaupai tiato parama mahuai aꞌai himioi, taitai-ro ioohiai-da. Aaꞌo mahuai pairai-ka, Orohodi Mahua.
22.2: Iehoma poue emaꞌatidio uubi epuuhoro uubi-re, ka bubui imatomudio uubi-re, rii toe paꞌaimo uubi eito. Kaida piroha gabo pomohooumo, Iesu rituo-ha ma aiꞌiaumoi-ri.
22.3: Ka Satari-ro Iudasi iimamiiai-ka, ruu paira atai Isikariota, Iesu iimatomudio tuero (12) mereei ata-ka.
22.4: Ka Iudasi odai-ka, oroaduꞌuti poue emaꞌatidio uubi epuuhoro uubi-re, kamia irudeme motoi idomai uubi epuuhoroi rautu, raꞌaibou imaꞌai maꞌai ruu-ro, Iesu rii-do.
22.5: Rii geꞌii paꞌaimo, ka rii made gaaꞌu paaꞌoumo, ruu mori-to taꞌii aꞌai.
22.6: Iudasi rio iiꞌi-ka, ida poomahoro, mea gabo ioohoi, Iesu raꞌaibou imaꞌai maꞌai rii-do, uubi umoo iiꞌi tiato-ha. Orohodi mahuai ireemaumodimoi-ka (Matiu 26:17-25; Maka 14:12-21; Ioare 13:21-30)
22.7: Himioi oohiai-ka, iaupai tiato parama mahuai-ri, mamoe daꞌodaꞌo ma iimotoumoi-ri, Orohodi Mahuai eito.
22.8: Iesu-ro itiodoai-ka, Petero-ra, Ioare-rai, ara madei rautu, “Odaido, Orohodi iihoi ereemaumodi, ma riihoumo.”
22.9: Riiti-ro atohetai-ka ruu, “Rimo-ro ratii-da ereemaumodi miraromo, roo-ro?”
22.10: Ruu-ro imoaimai-ka, “Riꞌoiti odai aꞌai-da, goꞌoto geegai-da, dubu ata obo gaigaruai omodai aꞌai, ruu-ro riꞌoiti imeeꞌai aꞌai. Ita obodoido, ruu odoroi aꞌai motoi rioi eito.
22.11: Ka ita aaꞌoido motoi rautu dubui eito, ‘Imatomudio dubui-ro ai-aaꞌo maaka rooi-do, “Heiꞌe-rie, ruu iimatomudio mereei rautu Orohodi Mahuai iihoi aꞌai ruuꞌai?” ’
22.12: Ka ruu-ro riꞌo imapui aꞌai geema ruuꞌa ata, emidioi-re, kamia iiho totoi-rei rautu, hoꞌui motoi ruuꞌai-da. Ka hieꞌei-da turiaha raarai ita ereemaumodiido.”
22.13: Ka riiti iodaidoi-da, raarai Iesu-ro iaaꞌo emerai-ha, pimeeꞌaido. Kiauka rii eremaumodi-ka, Orohodi Mahuai. Paidubui eito iraromo iiho (Matiu 26:26-30; Maka 14:22-26; 1 Koriti 11:23-25)
22.14: Himio mabui ioohiai-da, Iesu iiho totoi taitai-da emiꞌei-ka, ruu iiapui made himoꞌa uubi rautu.
22.15: Ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka rii-do, “Moo ihaha rio piraꞌai ara Orohodi Mahuai riꞌo rautu ma riihoi-ri, moo riiboi eidai tiatoi-da!
22.16: Kamia moo-ro riꞌo araibau riduuꞌai, ara mahuai moo-ro ata iihoi aꞌai bia, modau-die mahuai ihahai moobodi, Iehoma pai emidio erarai-da!”
22.17: Ka Iesu-ro mire koimoi eidai-ka, Iehomai-do keito made aaꞌoi-ka, kaida paaꞌo, “Eidaimo araa-rie, ka ereemaꞌatimo riꞌo himia-ro.
22.18: Ka moo-ro riꞌo ai-riduuꞌai, doꞌou moo-ro ara mire oboi ata idioi aꞌai bia, modau-die Iehoma pai emidio erarai mooꞌu-die.”
22.19: Ka ruu-ro parama hapuoi eidai-ka, Iehomai-do keito made aaꞌoi-ka, ehebiai-ka, rii-do imaꞌai-ka, ida paaꞌo, “Ara moo tuupi-ka, riꞌo-ri rimaꞌai, araibau ita iꞌatidioumo, moo ma riraromoumoi-ka.”
22.20: Gaaꞌu emerai gaboi-da, mire koimoi imaꞌai-ka rii-do, iihoumo didimoi-da aaꞌoi-ka, “Ara mire koimoi Iehoma oio aaꞌoi-da rereemedeeꞌa kaumo, moo orai-da rahiai, riꞌo-ri oruodii.
22.21: “Irai ma emeeꞌaumo, gaaꞌubuo ata, moo oaꞌuei aꞌai mereei, ruu moo rautu-ka, araa-rie iiho totoi-da.
22.22: Uubihaubi Mereei iihiai aꞌai, Iehoma-ro orododiai iiraromo emerai, irai memiho hiꞌa-ro ooꞌai aꞌai, moo uubi eito oaꞌuei aꞌai mereei eito.”
22.23: Ka rii himia-ro araatohei oomahoroi-ka, riiato boꞌu-ro aꞌai maꞌai ibai. Boꞌu-ro ooꞌai maꞌai pai
22.24: Iimatomudio uubi himia oomahoroi-ka eemaaꞌoi, riiato uubi-ro boꞌu iraromai maꞌai duumo, ruu pai-ka.
22.25: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka rii-do, “Iuda guui-da paira tiato pai uubi, rii erara-ka rii himia uubi, ka erara uubi-ro, araahoꞌoo kaumo pairai, ‘uubi imoabai uubi’.
22.26: Irai ara hiou gaboi bia riꞌoi-do, kaida, riꞌo tuiai-da geema mereei, keehibuo meree aibo ma iiꞌi, ka epuuhoro mereei, himoꞌa meree aibo, ma orododiai.
22.27: Boꞌu-ra geemai, dui iiho beha emiꞌei mereei-ra, ee dui ereemaꞌati mereei-ra? Ie, emiꞌei mereei, irai moo riꞌo tuiai-da, ereemaꞌati meree-ka.
22.28: “Riꞌo ihaha tauo pemidioumo moo rautu, moo iremahibaitutiimo goroi-da.
22.29: Kaida moo Abeai-ro iremaꞌai pai erarai, riꞌo ma rimemeꞌeuatidioi-ri, ka moo-ro riꞌo, aatu erarai imaꞌai raꞌai.
22.30: Moo pai emidio erarai-da, riꞌo moo iiho totoi-da, iiho-ra, idio-rai aꞌai aꞌai kaumo, ka riꞌo pai uhui-da emiꞌeituti aꞌai-da, imemeꞌeuatidioi aꞌai kaumo, Isaraꞌera tuero (12) paꞌai.” Petero-ro Iesu atuhei ioaduꞌoi-ka (Matiu 26:31-35; Maka 14:27-31; Ioare 13:36-38)
22.31: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, Simora Peteroi-do, “Simora, Simora, oromidio! Satari made tauo eidai maaka, riꞌo turiaha ma imahibaitutui-ri, ruꞌa hurai ma imamuhuꞌuuti emerai.
22.32: Irai moo tauo rirudemea maaka roo-ri, Simora-o, roo pupuo iraromoi iiraahiaiꞌai-ri. Ka roo ereheꞌeai aꞌai-da mooi-do, roo riaraamui pupuo ita idodiai.”
22.33: Petero-ro omoaimai-ka, “Paidubu-o, roo aia modau duꞌi motoi eito, kamia iihiai eito, moo rautu-ka.”
22.34: Iesu-ro omoaimai-ka, “Petero, roo ai-roduuꞌai, roo-ro moo retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) atuhe made aaꞌoi aꞌai, roo umoo bia moo, himioi ooaho taitai-da, kokoroi made aaꞌo tiatoi haato.” Mori haaꞌoi-re, ipi haaꞌoi-re, ka eꞌakerei-re
22.35: Kaida Iesu-ro iatohetai-ka, ruu iimatomudio mereei, “Moo-ro riꞌo iiritiodoai-da, aaꞌo himioi mori ioidio haaꞌo, ipi haaꞌo kamia oto tama tiato, riꞌo reꞌei-da ata raa, agororoohoo?” Rii-ro omoaimai-ka, “Ata raa bia.”
22.36: Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Irai doꞌou, boꞌu reꞌei-da mooꞌa mori ioidio haaꞌo, kamia ipi haaꞌo, ma eidai, ka boꞌu-rie heamo eꞌakere tiatoi, tuupi erara hipurai taꞌii-to ma edeeꞌai, ka gaaꞌubuo ma eidai.
22.37: Ka riꞌo moo-ro ai-riduuꞌai, Iehoma made bukai-da tauo piꞌatimo, ‘Ruu memiho uubi-da ai-poodabuai’, ihahai ma obodi moo-ri, mabu moo-ri, raꞌu iꞌatiimo, ihahai eito ai-obodii kaumo.”
22.38: Ka iimatomudio mereei-ro paaꞌoumo, “Paidubu-o, ma imeeꞌa, araa-rie retoꞌa heamo eꞌakereeti.” Ruu-ro imoaimai-ka, “Kiauka.” Iesu iirudemei-ka Orime Roꞌoai-da (Matiu 26:36-45; Maka 14:32-42)
22.39: Iesu-ro goꞌoto geemai emeheai-ka, ruu iꞌatidio emerai, odai Orime Roꞌoai eito. Ka iimatomudio mereei ruu rautu podaumo.
22.40: Ka ruu aaꞌo mati-da iereedeeꞌai-da, ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka rii-do, “Irudemeumo, mabu erematuhuti ooꞌui-da, riꞌo iiraahio toe-ka.”
22.41: Kiauka, ruu araahuꞌiodoai-ka rii reꞌei-da, roꞌoa kopi ma eheuꞌai auꞌoi emerai, popu-popu iimohorai-ka irudemeai-ri.
22.42: Ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Aba-o, roo rio-ra, ara temeteme koimoi omodadeai mooato, irai moo rioi obodooꞌa, roo rioi moo-ro eidai raꞌai.”
22.43: Ka aromoi areru ata oobodii-ka ruui-do, ka ruu pupuo emaꞌai-ka.
22.44: Ka ruu kaukai-da geema riibo peidai, ka pupuo hiꞌai-to pirudemea, ka buaꞌeai orai aibo paramio, hepui eito.
22.45: Irudeme reꞌei-da, otooꞌai-ka araimai, iimatomudio mereei reꞌei eito, ida pimeeꞌa, rii giiꞌepu iraromo pauoi-da, haꞌima uroi pirobu.
22.46: Ka ruu-ro aaꞌoi-ka rii-do, “Riꞌo raꞌu uro-ha mirobu? Ireibuaumo ma irudemeumo, ka erematuhuti ooꞌui-da, riꞌo iiraahio toe-ka.” Iesu oohiai-ka (Matiu 26:47-56; Maka 14:43-50; Ioare 18:3-11)
22.47: Iesu ioroaduꞌuti haato pereedeꞌaumo uubi hiiroi, Iudasi-ro pimooꞌu, Iudasi tuero (12) iimatomudio mereei ata-ka. Ruu ooꞌui-ka Iesu ma ohomeai-ri.
22.48: Ka Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Iudasi, Uubihaubi Mereei roo-ro ohomeai-da amoaꞌue?”
22.49: Kamia iimatomudio mereei-ro, oobodi tooto iaꞌai rai ieaꞌaumoi-da, rii-ro Iesui-do aaꞌoi-ka, “Paidubu-o, rimo-ro heamo eꞌakerei-da, rii aia rimooto duumo?”
22.50: Kiauka rii gaaꞌubuo atai-ro, Iehoma poue emaꞌatidio uubi, epuuhoro dubui moto himoꞌa mereei, iha hapuoi hepatoi aiha patuiꞌa.
22.51: Irai Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka, “Kiauka, ata aꞌaiꞌa.” Ruu-ro aaꞌo dubui hepatoi aihimodi-ka aiha poateai.
22.52: Poue emaꞌatidio uubi epuuhoro uubi-re, ka irudeme motoi idomai uubi epuuhoro uubi-re, kamia pai uubi-reiro, pooꞌumo Iesu oohiai, Iesu-ro aaꞌoi-ka rii-do, “Riꞌo eꞌakerei-re, kamia eꞌai rautu ma ooꞌumo, moo riꞌo piro mereei-ra?
22.53: Turiaha himioi, moo riꞌo rautu piremidio irudeme motoi-da, ka riꞌo-ro emahibaimo bia, moo oohiai. Irai doꞌou, riꞌo omaꞌati himioi-ka, duꞌi erarai ooꞌai-da.” Petero-ro Iesu iatuhei-ka (Matiu 26:57-58,69-75; Maka 14:53-54,66-72; Ioare 18:12-18,25-27)
22.54: Ka rii-ro Iesu oohiaimoi-ka omodai, Iehoma poue emaꞌatidio uubi epuuhoro dubui motoi rioi eito, ka Petero-ro auoꞌauo-ha pobodoo.
22.55: Erai adoroumoi-ka aaꞌo motoi ipituiai hauꞌii-da, ka Petero-ro imodabuai-ka erai iemaꞌoidioumo uubi.
22.56: Ka moto himoꞌa oobo ata-ro emeeꞌai-ka erai kekai-da, pupuo hiꞌai-to, taitai hiꞌai-da poibomatidio, ida paaꞌo, “Ara dubui Iesu rautu-ka.”
22.57: Irai Petero-ro atuhe made paaꞌo, “Oobo, moo umoo bia ruu.”
22.58: Ka ipi-ro iopoꞌi didimoi-da, dubu ata-ro Petero oibomai-ka, ida paaꞌo, “Roo rautu, rii ata-ka!” Irai Petero-ro pomoaimai, “Dubu-o, moo bia.”
22.59: Himio mabu gaaꞌu iorohodi didimoi-da, dubu ata-ro erehei-to paaꞌo, “Ihaha-ka, ruu Iesu rautu ka, mabu ruu Garereia dubu-ka.”
22.60: Irai Petero-ro pomoaimai, “Dubu-o, roo raꞌu maaꞌoi, moo umoo bia!” Gaaꞌu hiꞌa-ha ruu ioroaduꞌuti goroi haato, kokoroi madei aaꞌoi-ka.
22.61: Ka Paidubui iereheꞌeai-da, gamoꞌo-ha emeeꞌai-ka Petero, kaida piraromai, Petero-ro, Paidubui iaaꞌo madei, “Roo-ro moo retoꞌa-gaaꞌu (3) atuhe made aaꞌoi aꞌai, roo umoo bia moo, himioi ooaho taitai-da, kokoroi made aaꞌo tiatoi haato.”
